name: Kim Nguyen
subject: grateful & fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | I wanted to say a quick but heartfelt THANK YOU for the incredible support you showed my campaign ahead of last week’s FEC deadline.

Over the last few days, House Republicans have given us a front-row seat to why it’s more urgent than ever that we send Michelle Steel and her GOP allies packing.

Whether they’re bringing the government to the brink of a shutdown or fighting among themselves about who should be Speaker of the House, we simply cannot trust Steel and her friends to lead the People’s House and govern effectively.

I’m more fired up than ever to flip this Biden-won seat blue and actually get things done for Orange County families.

I’ve already earned more endorsements than any other Democrat in this race – from Federal leaders like Katie Porter to organizations like the Orange County Labor Federation to local leaders here in the district. They know I have what it takes to win.

[Are you with me, too? Sign on if this week’s GOP chaos in the House has you fired up to flip CA-45 blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70907916/430651772/-2088135123?refcode=KBN_EM_PT_1MO_231003_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDNhNzljM2EtNDk2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=grRUXw8vdDXf2VyaPWjg3TtYj95YlboLPOJQsKUQa5k=&emci=af03eb1c-3d62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d3a79c3a-4962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=9674971)

Thanks again for all your support,

Kim

| **Democrat Kim Bernice Nguyen is running for Congress in CA-45, one of the most competitive districts in the entire nation.** The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant, Kim's story is the quintessential California tale of sacrifice, hard work, and dedication to community. At just 25, she became the youngest person ever elected to the Garden Grove City Council. Now, she's running for Congress to reduce prescription drug costs, increase housing affordability, invest in working families, and strengthen our democracy.

---
Despite being the target of yet another vicious witch hunt, President Trump has NEVER been more committed to Make America Great Again!

And YOU could meet President Trump on October 26th when he hosts a special gathering at Mar-a-Lago to commemorate being nearly 1 YEAR OUT from the most consequential election in the history of our country.

One lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) will be flown to Mar-a-Lago to attend this fall reception – and to really make it special, you’ll get your picture taken with President Trump and a hat signed by him. Now doesn’t that sound fun?

Your flight, your hotel, and your tickets to the reception will all be on President Trump...

... _All the President asks is that you make a contribution of any amount to help us win back the White House in 2024 – and you’ll be automatically entered to win. How easy is that?_

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Rigging the game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

We’ll put it simply: Democrats know they can’t win on their ideas alone, so they’re trying to rig the system to come out victorious in 2024.

From loosening the voting laws to taking down common-sense voter ID and even trying to allow illegal immigrants to vote, they want to build an election system that produces **guaranteed Democrat victories.**

**No matter who wins, elections should be free and fair for BOTH parties. Republicans are working to restore election integrity to our country, but we need your help.**

**[Can you pitch in now and help us continue to fight for SECURE elections in 2024?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7000cfe964044459b1703bc0f375e74b&_e=RsJKW_jmd5ruhvPlGJBZgOHnc6CnOHppagkQhybth3z1y6ClDvTUXVEpfpXXOBLLDhY7VIwFlhjgONqJrDNUrVDFCSPPEUeB9UXjITrJHjOsDWE0f3ahjpTsmOsG4WbyCrJDKHvSA_LFHhnrl7JpJ5cHPITCmRobpKEeaLyo9spUyFGcAAuEqYczi1OD4VdYRtxV7AOyl2r7o1XzhhsmBXoAIRSmG9r1srfXiZvFyKa8Gq5xSkZnl-6DS8OnDv2cWYB3cY7_qBElwv1rsjLxUTu-c-H9RelM9peYq4R8eRxZ4tAEMEBuIq2fKSNaM0IWZlEETXf2EtYurtaFdz0-2dH-45TV3lRvfiZrRdHuKO0S0l9FAF4IYXLbxBkBhrGk)**

[**SAVE OUR ELECTIONS**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7000cfe964044459b1703bc0f375e74b&_e=RsJKW_jmd5ruhvPlGJBZgOHnc6CnOHppagkQhybth3z1y6ClDvTUXVEpfpXXOBLLDhY7VIwFlhjgONqJrDNUrVDFCSPPEUeB9UXjITrJHjOsDWE0f3ahjpTsmOsG4WbyCrJDKHvSA_LFHhnrl7JpJ5cHPITCmRobpKEeaLyo9spUyFGcAAuEqYczi1OD4VdYRtxV7AOyl2r7o1XzhhsmBXoAIRSmG9r1srfXiZvFyKbd2gqgjRHEThRj6r9j4m0vX7Mix0Y1R9wk_aDsAPyIZ80BV1OyPpaD837qXvUQ7eyqgnqY7anYFusTiRxnwgILLh_bt0wRHXawOh_rK39jhpIivePkrRZdeS_AeKrgaFwDAN-2AYQvaPm-u9iyCEfv)
---
We want as many people as possible to participate in our democracy, Peter.

But if you’re going to vote, you have to follow the rules.

We have election laws for a reason, Peter: so that everyone who follows the rules is allowed to vote, and everyone who doesn’t follow the rules is not allowed to vote.

_But the Democrats want to throw that system out the window._

Elections are the core of our democracy, and if we can’t trust them, we might as well throw our whole country away.

_**Republicans won’t let it come to that.**_

**[Please, join our team today to SECURE our elections with common-sense protections!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=7000cfe964044459b1703bc0f375e74b&_e=RsJKW_jmd5ruhvPlGJBZgOHnc6CnOHppagkQhybth3z1y6ClDvTUXVEpfpXXOBLLDhY7VIwFlhjgONqJrDNUrVDFCSPPEUeB9UXjITrJHjOsDWE0f3ahjpTsmOsG4WbyCrJDKHvSA_LFHhnrl7JpJ5cHPITCmRobpKEeaLyo9spUyFGcAAuEqYczi1OD4VdYRtxV7AOyl2r7o1XzhhsmBXoAIRSmG9r1srfXiZvFyKb4y-_T7_EdRwW0MTKoFfNzvpy0wGhpP6HW4_vpiubYvu7ajZ4qUGuYzclL8Aswi-4Ns9u7v9d1MJ1v_3-nHm_2DdBb8PSqPctovIDZ_DT5GoAy0ryBzUx2GElV3FiloLGQ0U5O2Tt6v7xn77iMugEw)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, We’ll put it simply: Democrats know they can’t win on their ideas alone, so they’re trying to rig the system to come out victorious in 2024. From loosening the voting laws to taking down common-sense voter ID and even trying to allow illegal immigrants to vote, they want to build an election system that produces guaranteed Democrat victories. No matter who wins, elections should be free and fair for BOTH parties. Republicans are working to restore election integrity to our country, but we need your help. We want as many people as possible to participate in our democracy, Peter. But if you’re going to vote, you have to follow the rules. We have election laws for a reason, Peter: so that everyone who follows the rules is allowed to vote, and everyone who doesn’t follow the rules is not allowed to vote. But the Democrats want to throw that system out the window. Elections are the core of our democracy, and if we can’t trust them, we might as well throw our whole country away. Republicans won’t let it come to that. subject: I just voted to remove Kevin McCarthy
body:
A wild day in history. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908567/430663909/657127102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhjNzQ4ZGUtNGM2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGdztXT2lXvwMSM3rxlA3iKukOlZDAeOB5spGatRmNI=) | Peter, I just left the House floor after voting to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. It passed with 216 votes, including 8 Republicans. **This is a historic moment. Never before has a Speaker been removed from office like this.** Kevin McCarthy’s refusal to reign in the MAGA extremists in his own party ended up being his downfall. And I sure as heck wasn’t going to be the one who saved him. Keep reading to hear my inside scoop on this crazy day, and if you can, please rush in a donation to help us take back the House and stop the chaos. Here’s a _**[link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908568/430663910/1094747814?&refcode=E4397-20231003-McCarthyVote-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhjNzQ4ZGUtNGM2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGdztXT2lXvwMSM3rxlA3iKukOlZDAeOB5spGatRmNI=)**_. This morning I actually had very little intel on how this day was going to play out. But once I saw Matt Gaetz formally submit his motion to vacate (aka kick Kevin McCarthy out of his Speakership) I knew it was going to be chaos. I rushed over to an emergency meeting with the full democratic caucus to discuss how we wanted to handle it. As you can imagine, it was an intense meeting with lots of opinions that ended up lasting multiple hours. Ultimately, with Hakeem Jeffries’ leadership, we decided it wasn’t our place to save Kevin McCarthy from his own party. Then it was time to vote. Every member’s name was called and we each had to stand up and state our vote. The mood was incredibly tense to say the least. I was surprised that right before me (because our names are so close in the alphabet), Marjorie Taylor Greene actually voted to save McCarthy. But then it was my turn. I solemnly stood, said “aye” and voted to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker. **So where do we go from here?** Over the next few days, Republicans need to figure out what the heck they are going to do and who will lead them moving forward. It’s literally never happened in history before. Then, once they coalesce around a new leader, there will be another vote for Speaker. It may take awhile (it took 15 times for McCarthy if you remember), and when that time comes I look forward to proudly casting my vote for Hakeem Jeffries. I certainly won’t be doing anything to help Republicans pick a new extremist to lead them. The frustrating thing is that all this political chaos means the House of Representatives is about to grind to a halt. We can’t vote on anything meaningful until the Republicans get their clown car in order. Clearly the Republican party is in shambles. They have fully given into the extremists. The only way for our democracy to start working again is if Democrats win in November and take back the House. _[**So if you’re tired of the chaos, I hope you’ll donate to my campaign so we can elect a Democratic majority and stop the MAGA chaos in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908569/430663911/1094747814?&refcode=E4397-20231003-McCarthyVote-SL-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhjNzQ4ZGUtNGM2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGdztXT2lXvwMSM3rxlA3iKukOlZDAeOB5spGatRmNI=)_ _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $10 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908570/430663912/1094747814?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4397-20231003-McCarthyVote-EG-GOP&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhjNzQ4ZGUtNGM2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGdztXT2lXvwMSM3rxlA3iKukOlZDAeOB5spGatRmNI=) | [DONATE $25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908571/430663913/1094747814?express_lane=true&&refcode=E4397-20231003-McCarthyVote-EG-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhjNzQ4ZGUtNGM2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SGdztXT2lXvwMSM3rxlA3iKukOlZDAeOB5spGatRmNI=)

Just this afternoon, Matt Gaetz led a vote to oust McCarthy from his speakership. And now that it passed, the House is once again stalled on all business until a new speaker is appointed. **But friend, none of these Republicans are qualified for the job.** This is the mess Kevin McCarthy has helped create. So you know what Matt, you’re certainly right about one thing: **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908759/430670079/944681175?&refcode=E4398-20231003-McCarthyOusted-Image-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc0MTgzOS00ZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNLLb2-QxFvN0H4OPENRar0yYOxRZqwK-cPcwq7UoeA=)** What kind of leadership, you ask? **NOT ‘leadership’ that bows to extremism and causes cat fights on the House floor. We need leadership that is unified in helping the American people.** | [TIME FOR DEMOCRATIC HOUSE LEADERSHIP »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908760/430670080/944681175?&refcode=E4398-20231003-McCarthyOusted-SB-GOP&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Njc0MTgzOS00ZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNLLb2-QxFvN0H4OPENRar0yYOxRZqwK-cPcwq7UoeA=)

Hey friends — It’s Sarah reaching out to say THANK YOU for your support during our end of quarter fundraising push! **We ask a lot, and we appreciate you rising to the occasion each and every time.** Even though campaigns were focused on fundraising this weekend, **that certainly didn’t stop us from some great community events - including with some of the very Delawareans that drive our party and our progress forward.** **I visited the annual Building Trades BBQ.** The Building Trades are the backbone of our economy and its unions are a core part of the foundation of our labor movement in Delaware! I loved joining fellow elected officials, labor leaders, and union-members! | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908850/430674045/-1047396217?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231003_na_thanks_cand_nc_opdon_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE1ODM3ZC01MDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OXxGzee-x1ujb82rvL3sY1PYDQdheYXV-WRf_H87LwY=)

**We also stopped by the Belle Everett Dinner.** Kent Democrats are the lifeblood of our state party. And it was great to join so many dedicated Delaware Democrats to celebrate the volunteers and party officials that push us all forward.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70908851/430674046/-1047396217?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20231003_na_thanks_cand_nc_opdon_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGE1ODM3ZC01MDYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OXxGzee-x1ujb82rvL3sY1PYDQdheYXV-WRf_H87LwY=)

I can’t thank everyone who opens these emails (or follows me on social media or says hi at an event!). Your support continues to blow me away and show everyone watching this race that there’s a grassroots movement backing this campaign.
See you soon!
\- Sarah

And it was great to join so many dedicated Delaware Democrats to celebrate the volunteers and party officials that push us all forward. = I can’t thank everyone who opens these emails (or follows me on social media or says hi at an event!). Your support continues to blow me away and show everyone watching this race that there’s a grassroots movement backing this campaign. See you soon! \- Sarah = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. Box 1904 Wilmington, DE 19899 United States Emails like this are important to stay in touch with supporters and raise crucial funds. If you no longer want to receive these emails from us, please . Want to stay involved with Sarah's campaign? , update your information, and we'll send you fewer fundraising emails.

subject: re: Trump’s latest ATTACK on Jack Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
please don’t let us down!
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨
Trump Escalates Attacks on Special Counsel Jack Smith** Donald Trump has been threatening and attacking Special Counsel Jack Smith for indicting him for his crimes — even calling Smith _“deranged!”_

**We _refuse_ to sit by while Trump spouts his nonsense, so we’re sending Jack Smith a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53960?t=6&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53960?t=7&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui)
---
TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, we feared he would NEVER be held accountable.

Thanks to you, we’re one step closer to finally booting Trump out of politics for good. **_IT’S ABOUT TIME!_**

I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats across the country stand with you.

[**I can’t thank you enough for indicting Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53960?t=8&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/53960?t=9&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=10852%2E878179%2EBuW4ui)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20WAGOP?=
subject: Chairman's Video & Republican Events
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Listen to WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh's newest video on the 6 initiatives. Plus join us at one of these upcoming Republican events nearest you....

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

() Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

Friend,
On paper, Jim Jordan leads the Judiciary Committee but he really only pretends to be Chairman: he has unabashedly weaponized the committee in order to smear and attack Joe Biden and prop up Donald Trump. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Who will be the next National Defender of Life?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
__Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda!| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.-5bTWFQz_BYgBWSITyw)

[ ](http://trk.secureandprosper._DSuUa9a_II6xbw)
---
---
| |
---
---
---
| |
Dear Pro-Life Partner,

When I was in Milwaukee at the first Republican presidential debate of 2024 election cycle, it was clear to me which candidates are and are not prepared to be a National Defender of Life. As a supporter of the pro-life movement, I'm sure you noticed this too!

Some were bold in thier statements, sharing the plight of the unborn, and calling for pretections. Others had positions that were simply unacceptable.

Without a doubt, the pro-life issue will make a big impact on who the GOP nominee will be this election as 72% of Americans support abortion limits by no later than 15 weeks of a baby's development when they can feel pain.

**That's 7 in 10 Americans speaking up for the pro-life cause and standing up for protections of the unborn and their mothers. We have the majortiy voice. But there's a problem.

** Several of the Republican candidates keep playing a game of defense rather than offensively attacking the issue with the same vehemence our opponents across the aisle are. Big Abortion and its extremists in American halls of power work hard every day to gain ground in this fight. We must offensively fight harder in the same battle over the next 12 months as we see the very fabric of our country changing before our eyes.

So who in your opinion will be the best National Defender of life? Who would you select to go head to head with the extreme abortion agenda and fight for the unborn in our contry?

**Take our poll at the link below and let us know which pro-life candidate is our enxt National Defender of Life!

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/best-presidential-candidate-poll

](http://trk.secureandprosper.-NIAjr1DeQsJmjoR7zA)I hope you'll take just 1-minute and share your view on this critical topic. Make your voice heard as we head into the 2024 election cycle.
---
| | [Take the poll](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
| | In these unprecedented times of uncertainty and extremism, we must be the voice of reason for the unbourn and their mothers in our country. For LIFE, Marjorie DannenfelserPresident, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
| | **I think the next National defender of Life will be:**

[Take the poll](http://trk.secureandprosper.-oz63sbQoARj7vw)
---
|

Arlington, VA, 22206

---
In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk8gbtgnf18mgmpqd75555u07njd6vc49mm3tijg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i68o74chh2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt6eo53agp1fqdtej0luf4jk240td2b1tl4vf2b0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i68o74chh2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).

clean_body: What grabs your attention, Friend? We'd like to know what ranks at the top of your list in this election. | | | | | | | | | | Survey Alert 📝 We've got two missions: 1) Earning your support to help Ron DeSantis defeat Joe Biden in November 2024. 2) Making sure you understand how much we appreciate the incredible impact you're making. We're seeking your input today to help us achieve mission #2. What grabs your attention, Friend? We'd like to know what ranks at the top of your list in this election. We're committed to making sure you're getting exactly the kind of content you're interested in. | | "☐Revitalizing the economy" "☐Saving our education system" "☐Standing up to the Chinese Communist Party" "☐Fighting against woke ideology" "☐Securing our border" "☐Fighting against mask/ vaccine mandates and lockdowns" "☐Restoring our American energy dominance" "☐Standing up for parents’ rights" "☐Making sure our military puts the mission first" "☐Protecting the unborn" "☐Keeping tabs on Joe Biden and his failures" "☐Defending religious freedom in America" "☐Seeing what the media is saying about the campaign" "☐Restoring law and order over riots and disorder" Note: you can select as many as you want! We're excited to keep you in the loop about everything that matters most to you, friend. We hope you'll let us know what you want to see! | | In Freedom, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zt6vik7ubr44ha870aref2v8ns49elmdhkgpvr3o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i6cor5c5h2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zra00244rhritkcma6rfiu1m6t412f5qdr08pioo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i6cor5c5h2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zovo2gvjpe5avds1a8aansldar9cojmno1l635dg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i6cor1c3h2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd520ijgeu286svuh4picqe0or32jh11ap7eclfo_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i6cor1c3h2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Team DeSantis

| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zekutsft4rn4vmabqftq1ft85qus2rd8j7bd5drg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i6aob2c1h2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbudb6d2jjon59ukcdfgidj7ct6k10f2chon3kao_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5i6aob2c1h2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EoySaLpUqMEU4DvXSYaI6g&sysid=1)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679797%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EoySaLpUqMEU4DvXSYaI6g&sysid=1)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24657%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sz59ghy8aIAgn3E3Ym5sng&sysid=1)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24657%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sz59ghy8aIAgn3E3Ym5sng&sysid=1)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Karen Crnkovich
subject: Crnkovich for Congress Q3 Update - On the Bright Side
body:
We just closed the books on another federal reporting deadline, and I wanted to give you a quick update. As I promised from the start, I have been to every corner of CD03 listening to the concerns and challenges our communities are facing. I am working tirelessly to earn every vote I can, one person and one conversation at a time.
__
____
I knew this would be hard work, some people told me it would be impossible. But over the course of my life, I have accomplished "impossible things" time and time again. So I'm pleased to share that momentum continues to build. My candidacy and my message of thoughtful conservatism and critical problem-solving are resonating with voters. **People are weighing their options and rapidly recognizing that I am the candidate who is best positioned to beat Sharice Davids.**
__
____
The last few months have also reinforced that politics isn’t for the faint of heart.____
The antics and shenanigans of truth have already begun, which means I must be doing something right! I will run my campaign just as I will serve –**with integrity and honor**.
__
____
I am also starting to earn endorsements from respected organizations.____
Most recently, I was endorsed by Plumbing, Heating, Cooling Contractors (PHCC) National Association. Earning their support and confidence so early in the campaign is a tremendous boost!
__
____
Finally, in the interest of transparency, I 'll share I was hoping to post better fundraising numbers this quarter. Raising money is one of the hardest parts of campaigning, but it is not the only metric a candidate is to be measured by! **This fight is not about having the deepest pockets; it’s about nominating the person who can beat Sharice Davids. We must re-write the playbook._The voters of CD03 deserve much more than a participation trophy!_**
__
____
____
**You have indicated you want to help and I am most grateful. Here are several ways you can:**____
**1\. Please consider a donation. Literally, any amount helps. Donations can be made on my website [www.KCforKansas.com](http://www.kcforkansas.com/)** ____
**2. Please like my FB campaign page @KCforKansas ____**
**3\. Please****follow me on X/Twitter****@KCforKansas ____**
**4\. Please tell****everyone in your network that "your friend Karen is running for US Congress" and has your support! ** ____
____
Nothing is going to deter me. There is too much at stake and we’re just getting started!____
Together, we will be able to make a real difference.____

Best regards,____
Karen ____

Karen Crnkovich for Congress, KS03 ____
[www.kcforkansas.com](http://www.kcforkansas.com/) ____
913-414-4446
#teamkc

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z991c4rce7toj7jf3f7304r73v7klbf8798sql0o_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5h64or4c3h2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbr6froh9v3n7tvn7kcgnsoe07jgsqfdlhicjfk0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5h64or4c3h2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Mike Soboleski
subject: 42 hours
body:
quick update- not asking for contributions No images? [Click here](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-o/) [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-r/) Peter,I hope this email finds you well. Last week, I had the great opportunity of travelling to Waldo, Piscataquis, and Washington counties for some great events. On Thursday night, I got to meet the great folks at the Waldo County Republican Committee in Palmero I really enjoyed listening to their concerns and answering their questions. I got to see my colleague Representative Reagan Paul at the meeting. [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-y/) On Friday night, I attended the Piscataquis County Republican Committee potluck and meeting. I got to see Representatives Chad Perkins and Jim White; two of my good friends in the State Legislature.On Saturday morning, I attended the USS Augusta christening in Eastport where I got to see Senator Marianne Moore and Representative Tiffany Strout. It was a foggy morning, and the ceremony was incredible.The USS Augusta is the second Naval ship or submarine named after Maine's capital. [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-j/) I even got myself a new hat! [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-t/) **_I am committed to travelling across the district to earn the Republican nomination and meeting the people Maine's Second Congressional District._** I don't take your support for granted, and will do everything I can to earn it.The insights I gained during these campaign days will certainly inform my campaign for Congress.If you haven't already, please take a few moments and follow my social media pages. [](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-i/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-k/)[](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-u/) Peter, can you do me one last favor?Would you mind sharing this email with friends and family? This really helps get our message out to a wider audience.Have a great rest of your day, Representative Mike Soboleski | | **Mike Soboleski for Congress** PO Box 603Augusta, ME 04332 **Mike Soboleski** is a born and raised Mainer and a lifelong conservative with Maine values. He's running for Congress in Maine's Second Congressional District because he knows our state and country is going in the wrong direction. [Preferences](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/y-xlrhkid-150DA8AB-ddldgdkhd-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://mikesoboleskiforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xlrhkid-ddldgdkhd-n/)
---

name: Your America
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24679%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7A2%2fX7YYskOkSuFaEiZGww&sysid=1)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you’re like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can’t say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can’t say the same thing even today. You don’t have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It’s one of our nation’s great achievements. But there’s a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That’s why today I hope you’ll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24670%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GisMXCabc7xjNc9vhevtpw&sysid=1)**_
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24671%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w7FHnyaHb%2fy6kXzUfOC%2bRg&sysid=1)
---
| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we’ll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24672%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zRkNXDnpd3%2fRTDgtn8Q69A&sysid=1)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you’ll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson’s book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He’s also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, “In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure.” ** Thank you so much for your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism--especially among younger Americans--that is essential to preserving citizenship and free government. Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach **[Hillsdale College](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24673%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zw2FK%2bl1gKNzFMaKNY6Egw&sysid=1)**
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---

Your America News
---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?
%recipient.md5_hash%
| [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e279d74fbb594af29533c5e42f3f7a8c&_e=GPESL89vzTtIFgPGvIo8txDe2-yw-bQe0x-61HSNPLJ7mvEmrNbj4-ox4EESTzCa3jQr-97Weu-idgAFjNvOhZSE3CFgV3oOAMZVtQlmpBDdDYcnm7rFFPrFtM2v_PdaYDkLSpl_a9bHrw68YtSlQ4EIJIFRR-ofFoDBEyvvlnk_CBDpl-6CKT21ydOT84z7fPbQvBpk5sfaqcjnzJY9DmBswKy5uOcG1wcOsHjgCBYiIDMTt-lYmilIkGkToVDkC5Ggbw42-j3xVbxwJiCuf-oFKj4IMtuI-rP1caq6SiiR0tgjFA_dzaCG7wZHZOwFff-svxfV8EyltQArLEnnjehVc1XbRSghHEninvvG5ck5TAi-aZRiqhy-3ihfrxneaxBYB6MSBMMrvzsRDDwFdQ%3D%3D)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e279d74fbb594af29533c5e42f3f7a8c&_e=GPESL89vzTtIFgPGvIo8txDe2-yw-bQe0x-61HSNPLJ7mvEmrNbj4-ox4EESTzCa3jQr-97Weu-idgAFjNvOhZSE3CFgV3oOAMZVtQlmpBDdDYcnm7rFFPrFtM2v_PdaYDkLSpl_a9bHrw68YtSlQ4EIJIFRR-ofFoDBEyvvlnk_CBDpl-6CKT21ydOT84z7fPbQvBpk5sfaqcjnzJY9DmBswKy5uOcG1wcOsHjgCBYiIDMTt-lYmilIkGkToVDkp4Mtvf3FUZ-5zZ--dtPdFPu16X3mUp3vbm8IlOL95ETbqL0d7HggvZ02hfkdLtLXflpbWefnTjyKZT_WCgWvC1Ho7KeDeZKJHHAgbWiMhV-EnafHgI_EJ0LlJaRljnYQqKv-7miiPds1eeMxQCJ2Gw%3D%3D)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.
[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e279d74fbb594af29533c5e42f3f7a8c&_e=GPESL89vzTtIFgPGvIo8txDe2-yw-bQe0x-61HSNPLJ7mvEmrNbj4-ox4EESTzCa3jQr-97Weu-idgAFjNvOhZSE3CFgV3oOAMZVtQlmpBDdDYcnm7rFFPrFtM2v_PdaYDkLSpl_a9bHrw68YtSlQ4EIJIFRR-ofFoDBEyvvlnk_CBDpl-6CKT21ydOT84z7fPbQvBpk5sfaqcjnzJY9DmBswKy5uOcG1wcOsHjgCBYiIDMTt-lYmilIkGkToVDkcDg93J5NySTzqdXNNL2N-eLNRXRXiS2mtOVhZaf7f4R-LmZPdeXkjHjxpFAjnHsQI5oTXzfYNArEUZu_uPu5HHZlBGkEq1sdiFlxMEuqpCnjhTwQ3a9U-YVTMd7z755TMYezSimJiz05czobVgSkzw%3D%3D)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: Historic Vote Ousts McCarthy, Congressman Gets Carjacked, and a Town Sings For a Doctor
body:
The House of Representatives has deposed its speaker, an unprecedented event in American history. Rep. Patrick McHenry will serve as interim House Speaker until a replacement is voted in, and the House isn’t expected to take a vote until next week.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1957, the Space Age began with the launch of the Soviet Union's _Sputnik 1_ into low Earth orbit, alarming the U.S. into launching its own space program. The first Sputnik, the size of a beach ball, could be seen from Earth. ([See Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAQQH8NbFhwYGMPDFmypWtHi-AjvhZ_yFxi9d9X6dz5PT3pfd7GW6RC6-MjLhg4b2NMTC8cjVZOgb2MIKeQEQGtxGC6oXNgLHRyDq73yccePAzJ5r4dpnuXsLdmMglizpICaLBGa6eH1jnb-PatGoh3uOvWZ-E0TsTb0XxttPKMufxsLzyatC2yhJl5r8JeBFwFXM_zbOoeE76pgKvtrTWq7k9e6VvVyFgKMar8XFWOiWsz81LkEab9pFKodl44_Vgilb8-_7_7GwAA__8dAlaG)). ## House Deposes Its Speaker in Historic First
The House of Representatives [has deposed its speaker](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGTsyAUAH8Ndji8B2pSUKSxy9d-pYP4iFwQHCB6-fc3ufq6ndlmZ__fp7vxwcfHP7ORri5NxlZ_0ASCK47yNmGzaEeEJBvS0F97hSCxb1atHF6EBGkNIMhFCANKORrcABdn5rnxGgVKEEKJa6eUbIcOr1YCmhln0Q2OKUGLrym3X8nHupIL73RQbm3amqDXWvfC5I3hyHA8z7ONs410lo9nOO4p-OptYTjaFB-ZygefdPjIN2tNruubp1eptPCyk3lS5mt6FeKRvisvlfbCs40G4NL10GS97KcPwZd-YEo8NuPDb0r9-8xPAAAA__9c-mZp), an unprecedented event in American history. Rep. Patrick McHenry will serve as interim House Speaker until a replacement is voted in, and the House isn't expected to take a vote until next week. Despite the support of a majority of Republicans, Keven McCarthy was voted out as speaker through an [unlikely alliance of Democrats with eight Republicans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOgzAQBNCvMR1ovTY4Llykocu1VyJj1mFPJkbggPL3J66-bqQZ6Unz_RgenhO_nl9-IVdiHnwofNAgodY1qvuA1eQiEZKqyMnOdhqlwq6ane-M16Gj9mbbaEY1TjdNVge0Y4jWthU7BFQSQINttVaNadEGJdGPOEJrotBAE5e8NT-ZX2WmmD75oK0JeamSm0tZd6HuAnuB_XmezZoTFw75GgjsEx9Uv9fJF9oF9pcmsJcgsIcrhfx6brRf3RKC38r8qXmv87vUAFJaY021uWk9OSXeOyM0PBfP6c8v_9_xGwAA___6zF6v), led by Rep. Matt Gaetz, who blamed McCarthy for making deals with Democrats. The question now is, who will succeed McCarthy? He said Tuesday [he didn't plan to run ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOgzAQRL_G7hzZuwZC4SINXa69Ehmz4L0zOAKHKH9_CvV1MxqNnvS-7_3dc-J1_vILuTLl3ofCB_VGK6sAbz3I0U1EQCjJmbqtLRiEWkZnAJsrNuOAAINuq2qyaEbQwV4HGJEkO9CARmur28pavDQVtAEN-AEGXTWTsJpGLnm7_GReS6QpvfNB2yXkRSYXS3nsAm8COgFdiRQ5pc8moIt5oZVe-xmfOwnoLGDV1K06uzpyIZWfe-F1VvuD_C9tagnBbyW-VeKDVPiw_Pz5ys2NjxenxHvdCKvnxfOJkuV_K38BAAD__7KRY2c)for the role again. The angry divisions between McCarthy's supporters and the eight detractors means Democrats will have significant leverage in any vote. Moreover, under the Constitution, the speaker not only doesn't have to be in the majority party, they don't even have to be an elected official. [Here's a list of potential candidates.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L-SgyAYBPCnwQ4HPhBjQZHGLtde6SB8Ri4oDn_i5O1vvPrK3W1-s9-P6WF88Pvzy2yoyxInY4t_48QZlRTEfYLG6QURUDSouRqUBC5ANasWN8Zni1wBH4zsBMz94JTgdpllf1O88RoYCM6YZEMnpWj7DgYrOJgZZtb1C5EMnS8xtT_R72XFJXziG1Nr49YEvZZyZCLuBEYC43mebcJaMOVrv5qYgiMw1nyFNVIba3A0V2sRHU141Dl4a3b6wrff6WatSWX90HygeWGiNdM11oz0clLOKBMExiZpd5w-BJ9VTyR7bsaHP1L5_6HfAAAA___IPWcc)
## Largest Health Care Strike Yet Set for Today
Kaiser Permanente's 85,000 unionized workers planned to walk off the job this morning in seven states and Washington D.C. in [the largest health care strike in U.S. history](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8GNiL8wNgMDFm8pWtHC-PnQItNBK-O8vdVOnc-6U66z9t88ymn4_7hd3S0ldkHSifOnRRagLrOwFe3IQIqjq4z1mjoFBgenVZ21CoYL5Udx7Ba482yrbaDoR_ALjw5kKA6KbW0vdbqMvRgg-rAL7DIftiYlrgmKvXyVdJBEbf8KifWSyg7zy4SPRpTVwYTg4kixpTzmzGYDny2jERYG4Np-WnpwNYEhnKU_cVg0qD0qI3Ivt6xkcATq4joM0URfEXRqKZvFLmU_a3g1a2PZ8o5NTMwLe-7T38xTv9_-Q0AAP__1cxkaA). Striking workers would include [hundreds of positions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAQQH8N3mwdB_hjYMjClq4dLYKP-BoSIkBx---rdO78pPf0Ps_r2XPix_XD38m2mFcfGr9oldDrHtVpxW6zkQhJdWTluIwapcKx261S5jKPgMtEG5jZ6xhpBgnBBFxg9h1bBFQSQMNitFbDZHAJSqK_4AXMFIUG2rjlMnxlfrSdYvrJLypDyPcu2b21ZxXqJNAJdMdxDP6bc31Tge7tFugkCHSAAt3Nc6XS11b4Rv2Ry41K7Xfyqe3BF-qK3Z4Hp8R1nISG691z-ku1_89_AwAA___k21hL), including nurses, technicians, radiologists, sonographers, and others. The main issues revolved around staff shortages and worker burnout, which union leaders say causes patient neglect. Kaiser says it has contingency plans if the planned three-day strike does happen today and that its hospitals and emergency departments will stay open.
## America's Most Unhappy Workers: Nurses, Teachers
Employee happiness has [steadily declined since 2020](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D-PtCAYBPBPgx0GHv74WlBsY7dve6VBeFi5oBjANfvtL2d93WQyxS_z9ZyfNqa4v_7bDU0LebauxTfOnFFJQTxm6LwJiICiQ8P1qCVwAbpbjRyCE2rk2iq-aO6CDsE79S9IoVAH30UDDARnTLJRSSn6QcHoBAe7wMLUEIhk6GPLpf_OcW8rhvTJbyy9y1uXzNraUYl4EJgITNd19YvdlpzXe0BgKljzWRxWAtPrjP4OuB0pfxDpao8j7lgrXTn9lRAQd4e10bj7s7byoS7vtZXTtZj3rhh_XDGlWPVAJHttNqYb0_7-5icAAP__iIBnwg), and that decline accelerated in 2023, according to a new benchmark study that ranks eight major industries by how happy its employees are. According to the ranking, based on how likely employees are to recommend the industry to others, the happiest employees are in [the construction industry](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOrCAUhJ9GO8zhAHopKLax29ve0iAel7NBMUjW3Lf_49Z_M5nMJJPJ9-85PT0n3l9__UaurnnyofKHJglCC1SPCdvFrURIqiUne9trlAr7NjowxvoBQCOR_aNADUrOaKwmBGl61bJDQCUBNFijteoGgzYoiX7GGcywNhpo4ZpL986810hr-p8_VLqQtza5WOtxNurR4NjgeF1XF_Y53GWD4z3d4Aj29rfUyKfgU9RIIvrjYDqreOdZ8P7NrlzSInwIuSy8v0TNYqdLFDrJlxC7WLfUFrccF6fEZz80Gl6b5_R9U3-H8xMAAP__89pjxA), buoyed by billions of dollars of new federal infrastructure spending. The unhappiest: Workers in health care, who feel overworked and understaffed since the pandemic. They beat out teachers for being the most unhappy with their field. ([See Full Rankings](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D-PtCAYBPBPgx0GHv74WlBsY7dve6VBeFi5oBjANfvtL2d93WQyxS_z9ZyfNqa4v_7bDU0LebauxTfOnFFJQTxm6LwJiICiQ8P1qCVwAbpbjRyCE2rk2iq-aO6CDsE79S9IoVAH30UDDARnTLJRSSn6QcHoBAe7wMLUEIhk6GPLpf_OcW8rhvTJbyy9y1uXzNraUYl4EJgITNd19YvdlpzXe0BgKljzWRxWAtPrjP4OuB0pfxDpao8j7lgrXTn9lRAQd4e10bj7s7byoS7vtZXTtZj3rhh_XDGlWPVAJHttNqYb0_7-5icAAP__iIBnwg))

clean_body: The House of Representatives has deposed its speaker, an unprecedented event in American history. Rep. Patrick McHenry will serve as interim House Speaker until a replacement is voted in, and the House isn’t expected to take a vote until next week. | | | | . | | WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1957, the Space Age began with the launch of the Soviet Union's Sputnik 1 into low Earth orbit, alarming the U.S. into launching its own space program. The first Sputnik, the size of a beach ball, could be seen from Earth. (). If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, Want to comment on a story? Head over to our . Finally, if you'd like to help the Flyover avoid departure delays, check out our sponsor today: "NativePath". | House Deposes Its Speaker in Historic First The House of Representatives , an unprecedented event in American history. Rep. Patrick McHenry will serve as interim House Speaker until a replacement is voted in, and the House isn't expected to take a vote until next week. Despite the support of a majority of Republicans, Keven McCarthy was voted out as speaker through an , led by Rep. Matt Gaetz, who blamed McCarthy for making deals with Democrats. The question now is, who will succeed McCarthy? He said Tuesday the role again. The angry divisions between McCarthy's supporters and the eight detractors means Democrats will have significant leverage in any vote. Moreover, under the Constitution, the speaker not only doesn't have to be in the majority party, they don't even have to be an elected official. Largest Health Care Strike Yet Set for Today Kaiser Permanente's 85,000 unionized workers planned to walk off the job this morning in seven states and Washington D.C. in . Striking workers would include , including nurses, technicians, radiologists, sonographers, and others. The main issues revolved around staff shortages and worker burnout, which union leaders say causes patient neglect. Kaiser says it has contingency plans if the planned three-day strike does happen today and that its hospitals and emergency departments will stay open. America's Most Unhappy Workers: Nurses, Teachers Employee happiness has , and that decline accelerated in 2023, according to a new benchmark study that ranks eight major industries by how happy its employees are. According to the ranking, based on how likely employees are to recommend the industry to others, the happiest employees are in , buoyed by billions of dollars of new federal infrastructure spending. The unhappiest: Workers in health care, who feel overworked and understaffed since the pandemic. They beat out teachers for being the most unhappy with their field.
