name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a36a41e0e436470795863a5caeb7fff4&_e=ddRFr0UsCMyTe0lncOU0sFBmMYhyaDEy9sa5FGvIwB1nX9NuBLNSPQz-NpmhZMZgOtMDpOgkTRM3ge3c-EhpR3ZmM8u90042xoG4Ct_NM9as0_-PeNWNB4g_LN_3OB7DAefFpA-MoHVI903M2GwPE5UJTiH5Ap-l9kR3vaNXqJcWwneWLjWX6QuR0REyT3EN4IWnetkNe22kg7Zy6IsXbpTX2Zc6NfRa90bpS7BejSPnzKcl55stTQMdo_hPEUD5vBsUzCE8FeG4FE-omkxD_jlpILqVsM2k-cFzGxOMJrIE3mtsiU3IyPyJvZyYV0BYl245ukf-Xz4-HbP8XnR5g_9wZbeuCBJzQSNYbda3Sc020jgHD2eQC2ugKFbM2ULusrlBWSSA1wpd_UWUN7oTh9oe77rJUAZQdiCeJLuZwCOwHWhcPaae3DuNyS1_GwY4TGC0KmBiclQDT6O9VZnOjt5YJzAgV3mY6soxrtdmpRt1A0I6tYDKarol6Yc8XSv2BjpNi1QKazUy8jLJfQBAsVYFuu1zJuBubvtHkP3oKQ6j_Dr0ETVJnUJuW7FABBRKualkRqYwV3w_apWwf_--TO04eZsdqi54QhomJ20rRYajfWxQ-AF5JPzk7fcy30CVO5Ne6gXF04lfdyFRYoNqtQ%3D%3D)
---

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a36a41e0e436470795863a5caeb7fff4&_e=ddRFr0UsCMyTe0lncOU0sFBmMYhyaDEy9sa5FGvIwB1nX9NuBLNSPQz-NpmhZMZgOtMDpOgkTRM3ge3c-EhpR3ZmM8u90042xoG4Ct_NM9as0_-PeNWNB4g_LN_3OB7DAefFpA-MoHVI903M2GwPE5UJTiH5Ap-l9kR3vaNXqJcWwneWLjWX6QuR0REyT3EN4IWnetkNe22kg7Zy6IsXbpTX2Zc6NfRa90bpS7BejSPnzKcl55stTQMdo_hPEUD5vBsUzCE8FeG4FE-omkxD_jlpILqVsM2k-cFzGxOMJrIE3mtsiU3IyPyJvZyYV0BYl245ukf-Xz4-HbP8XnR5g_9wZbeuCBJzQSNYbda3Sc020jgHD2eQC2ugKFbM2ULusrlBWSSA1wpd_UWUN7oTh9oe77rJUAZQdiCeJLuZwCOwHWhcPaae3DuNyS1_GwY4TGC0KmBiclQDT6O9VZnOjt5YJzAgV3mY6soxrtdmpRt1A0I6tYDKarol6Yc8XSv2MICq9u7RlCCZedPmb4Kf3WuuwYzBBZ00FjVy_vCWhHnxv9pEIbMYy0wDedPrPAcOSDjs2-SH2w6xPylZtNPDml_uH-hioIBAuQaM90uu0OTEFLr4HJR1iSGV0LPchBvvpLofd7FLDBa9aY28fSEsgQ%3D%3D "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a36a41e0e436470795863a5caeb7fff4&_e=ddRFr0UsCMyTe0lncOU0sFBmMYhyaDEy9sa5FGvIwB1nX9NuBLNSPQz-NpmhZMZgOtMDpOgkTRM3ge3c-EhpR3ZmM8u90042xoG4Ct_NM9as0_-PeNWNB4g_LN_3OB7DAefFpA-MoHVI903M2GwPE5UJTiH5Ap-l9kR3vaNXqJcWwneWLjWX6QuR0REyT3EN4IWnetkNe22kg7Zy6IsXbpTX2Zc6NfRa90bpS7BejSPnzKcl55stTQMdo_hPEUD5vBsUzCE8FeG4FE-omkxD_jlpILqVsM2k-cFzGxOMJrIE3mtsiU3IyPyJvZyYV0BYl245ukf-Xz4-HbP8XnR5g_9wZbeuCBJzQSNYbda3Sc020jgHD2eQC2ugKFbM2ULusrlBWSSA1wpd_UWUN7oTh9oe77rJUAZQdiCeJLuZwCOwHWhcPaae3DuNyS1_GwY4TGC0KmBiclQDT6O9VZnOjt5YJzAgV3mY6soxrtdmpRt1A0I6tYDKarol6Yc8XSv2fRIH9MMW7z9dQaKieLysKG4GmW1h7FahyPE4MNuGS99wlEOHgM1IaUw5GwZ2pt6sBfcR7qg2g9MCms-GY7vKvtEWHEgtNHdtP4jB9J6XiLRAg8DlYrLtmUODQi87UOtE6q5TrIYwL67N6K80LccW-w%3D%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a36a41e0e436470795863a5caeb7fff4&_e=ddRFr0UsCMyTe0lncOU0sFBmMYhyaDEy9sa5FGvIwB1nX9NuBLNSPQz-NpmhZMZgOtMDpOgkTRM3ge3c-EhpR3ZmM8u90042xoG4Ct_NM9as0_-PeNWNB4g_LN_3OB7DAefFpA-MoHVI903M2GwPE5UJTiH5Ap-l9kR3vaNXqJcWwneWLjWX6QuR0REyT3EN4IWnetkNe22kg7Zy6IsXbpTX2Zc6NfRa90bpS7BejSPnzKcl55stTQMdo_hPEUD5vBsUzCE8FeG4FE-omkxD_jlpILqVsM2k-cFzGxOMJrIE3mtsiU3IyPyJvZyYV0BYl245ukf-Xz4-HbP8XnR5g_9wZbeuCBJzQSNYbda3Sc020jgHD2eQC2ugKFbM2ULusrlBWSSA1wpd_UWUN7oTh9oe77rJUAZQdiCeJLuZwCOwHWhcPaae3DuNyS1_GwY4TGC0KmBiclQDT6O9VZnOjt5YJzAgV3mY6soxrtdmpRt1A0I6tYDKarol6Yc8XSv2DOTGS0FtVlmlbz-EvedTdkkqo2C5CuKOLos6p8yvN0SC5rmsxOs55QEASg7cQvLvxeQH6X_PK5rO2ezceH_fMq1EXqlLG-Q7bX1EpsVUTQfx3sYSr8djOOkaZllzMbF0ld4aWlbhdUyWERy7k2Dbmw%3D%3D)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a36a41e0e436470795863a5caeb7fff4&_e=ddRFr0UsCMyTe0lncOU0sFBmMYhyaDEy9sa5FGvIwB1nX9NuBLNSPQz-NpmhZMZgnlwDRc4T5mKHfX1WHDtkG5SXwLKLEPUCrA6qnT5ndQp1qBkAM68FFubZCMMdS1AUN2ByyN7M-X7ddnOHG3_LHJ9oi_R7nEyc2Rr20ceNRZ4oBIXa3bn-HJpWx51vkBUn4uGWuQfObuxrHN-qEHmaEel7Qj2eWVgmqrIL0xcTrAwpJEOSx8k2XXltvhqUydy5n2tc2s0dLo6dbjVsl-OD95Yl_LBZtbRLV_mFIWRr5tZgPn7VhAHbjkOqbRT0tZVZ-rGSImKQBpTPVf0gYSLd50PM6rNzSvMoUROgNODseU8K4PkqcdZW0kdGnxmTAmGkOXUa1QbIgUHd1p4uZS6esf3iruKp-RC_GwI0FI3_XsrAmP0RdDyLi5MjIWktxeyiuiytLvGQQD3nepX6IcZ2vF1REuySRoKhRHgOlYNzsS6wGkU1NlykhZGRluF8gRItuY9ZdMgmwGrufF2QhqIeAmBVq43c2K0ObuwEM5Hz0jNqI2uBY7aAetpVug24R4TwD-8wFx0peAJdEGEam9NgQwtcL2Xl3DBzyARwV04qpC3TRB_d2YFyYgN6dIVF2g8G38BNitsPjMtfmenYzD_G_Q%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Citizenship requires vigilance
body:
Are you proud to be an American citizen?

| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca13e89ca7fa4ad6bc205d8a4387d66a&_e=tt1qrGWqvnw2NyEO-DgvMwte6B307sQx4fTovtwj-id4Ke_w6TiRq5OqncwQvmFAMRixJnW023tR9ysQ8LyZa4mfp8sumsU-HhFcuMlscXtE1fpkQNCaldAQYoFqqfjYp9NNUXXzCrPdGxR5MLU0bBqRm-bQ5HD7Iavo8dD_8lDXXw6IhjBuacx88eY1SNZGdvilEQejdOgpGwe6rVaBkR8M_wRNBJyiQx8WwIZNWRQyTFirYayrkTvt6JfPyeFJRby0GUq4VnoT57TdlsXvi_bC7U7l_s-jvyHwzhdihl3FBUJ6lgnTSPflmHMhDmNxAWrqQUP2TWvb8kRszWKbNxYE58ZLvWtzF12QKwCOxjF3KC38fZHXaIJbvKsSQ6wqIluVDbDM3XqxYvnqwOdFj4rh7a39eV3BZ9YPiWJtuCFiKzSkpOTZ-orDx7DnqWjZ)
---
| |
Are you proud to be an American citizen? If you're like me, you give thanks to God every day that you live in a country that is free, peaceful, and where citizens have inalienable rights. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain.
---
| | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. Everyone who wishes to defend freedom in America requires an understanding of the nature and scope of these challenges. And as a college, we know that a proper education is the best defense of liberty. That's why today I hope you'll support our _**[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca13e89ca7fa4ad6bc205d8a4387d66a&_e=tt1qrGWqvnw2NyEO-DgvMwte6B307sQx4fTovtwj-id4Ke_w6TiRq5OqncwQvmFAMRixJnW023tR9ysQ8LyZa4mfp8sumsU-HhFcuMlscXtE1fpkQNCaldAQYoFqqfjYp9NNUXXzCrPdGxR5MLU0bBqRm-bQ5HD7Iavo8dD_8lDXXw6IhjBuacx88eY1SNZGdvilEQejdOgpGwe6rVaBkR8M_wRNBJyiQx8WwIZNWRQyTFirYayrkTvt6JfPyeFJRby0GUq4VnoT57TdlsXvi9uLdpK3oi7CWbYcmO2zloM91baGEt-Sag8Ptx2lhYv5WW_j3hwocjDVXfPNx2z8tbanTX3rN7Pd-9Y7uLV0PM58jgBvtaa882jVHvEqQezemnI2v1P7JMuwGkec1ObzifIQ5nYfFCto6a86izDt_q2o1BQWLal_O0NAgqybfvCg)**_

| | This ambitious and extensive project has three main goals.
* **The first important goal **of this campaign is to inform debates about the critical issues of our time through _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, to increasing numbers of homes and businesses--free of charge. We already reach millions--we must reach hundreds of thousands more.
* **The second vital goal **is to teach millions of citizens about the Constitution, American history, and free-market economics through free online courses.
* **The third critical goal **is restoring excellence to K-12 education in America through our expanded Hillsdale K-12 Education Office and Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum.

And unlike the vast majority of colleges and universities, we must **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about liberty. And we have to do it without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain proudly independent. This means that _ your_ support is critical to our success. With your help, we'll engage the far-Left on the battlefield of education. With your help, we will defend liberty against dangerous ideologies. And with your help, we will preserve freedom for future generations of American citizens. We urgently need your support, because, to implement the **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** fully, we need to raise $1.5 million in the next few months. **You can give safely and securely at this link:** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-citizenship-and-defend-liberty**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca13e89ca7fa4ad6bc205d8a4387d66a&_e=tt1qrGWqvnw2NyEO-DgvMwte6B307sQx4fTovtwj-id4Ke_w6TiRq5OqncwQvmFAMRixJnW023tR9ysQ8LyZa4mfp8sumsU-HhFcuMlscXtE1fpkQNCaldAQYoFqqfjYp9NNUXXzCrPdGxR5MLU0bBqRm-bQ5HD7Iavo8dD_8lDXXw6IhjBuacx88eY1SNZGdvilEQejdOgpGwe6rVaBkR8M_wRNBJyiQx8WwIZNWRQyTFirYayrkTvt6JfPyeFJRby0GUq4VnoT57TdlsXvi3SQWfNmVm6FO0TGJ-UUSlHZ88hYZIIT6zsIqR18UzLfc1TXbMsEjnpZ91PjOjQ0mFszEzNH4LZ3MSA5mOpytzZhTSacY764C-3Lzn4_17shQLvv0R2-V0Dgb7eVQfemTtd2NDsqdUg-O9t8oiw0MeYXFL8Gega86RLiKi7XGCjb)_ And for a gift of $100 or more, you'll receive a special hardcover edition of Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen: How Progressive Elites, Tribalism, and Globalization Are Destroying the Idea of America. _Victor Davis Hanson is a frequent commentator on Fox News and online. He's also a historian and distinguished fellow here at Hillsdale. Regarding the book, my boss and teacher, Hillsdale President Larry P. Arnn, has written, "In this book, Hanson demonstrates yet again his command across time and for our time. **This book and he are a treasure. Most people in history can't say the same thing--in fact, most people in the world can't say the same thing even today. You don't have to be a historian to see that the long practice of citizenship in America is unprecedented. It's one of our nation's great achievements. But there's a catch--citizenship requires vigilance and knowledge to maintain. | | Especially now, when it faces threats from the far-Left and progressive economic policies, illegal immigration, and more. name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679719%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1ZVTo720ShGFxd65%2fZ4sAw&sysid=1)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679710%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oXUsnyCPDn6l4mHZnfeSGQ&sysid=1)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.
[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c679711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0%2fhiM5LeyptM11TttHv2yw&sysid=1)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2692%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=YVPsQoic3l4c%2ftdeKLJlJQ&sysid=1)

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e9cb1de533c4a9e948b212a61278150&_e=g1tazcil3FAmQq9rZybUQD0W7g0fB2pX006PqvOjWJFAZZB5LhpCLENw5BA5sIHnn9RxtXLT8B2sYdTmey-el6GCqbwoAsUGJZVVBjchrBGAQ2u2r8657_XMyM-MPb394tgDxsIIDSs5sNBqFLkHHh3O_zDU1xoTS6lwFKrl1OzGYoe_wH7sXmzds2iBajchnPqy2kXGOrjDUp2U8sQPFdyZRN0oyX6kLKWV5JUPjiEzL4ZWGd5Re5sYtxD21yAHdtnT6pdMO7WMhdyCgUJjBXdrOMpEw6NsYxvW2jTGX-_FEQ_3P4E2nYdPVDmtMWCTUK5cEXPOFP_3rfwSsZNZdl05o5Nm09WKyQK26Ls73GoWeZ3skThU1oB4aCPQJQDTKK8egnJaChnxFuwDVNjgrQ%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e9cb1de533c4a9e948b212a61278150&_e=g1tazcil3FAmQq9rZybUQD0W7g0fB2pX006PqvOjWJFAZZB5LhpCLENw5BA5sIHnn9RxtXLT8B2sYdTmey-el6GCqbwoAsUGJZVVBjchrBGAQ2u2r8657_XMyM-MPb394tgDxsIIDSs5sNBqFLkHHh3O_zDU1xoTS6lwFKrl1OzGYoe_wH7sXmzds2iBajchnPqy2kXGOrjDUp2U8sQPFdyZRN0oyX6kLKWV5JUPjiEzL4ZWGd5Re5sYtxD21yAH9zF8ey6xg-L8YNC9HAKLXcXbJwBd42cE76TTp7vbZ2IZ9pZLg_XGQg_o_SwmIYZX_o9qpmZ43hNO_nU-PKTk93Wp8b71ZQz1nZjEMHnjux2eYxCg_lLgGHFFEx6oF20uXaXCVFbdfrztoSM6xYprIg%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=089372c3539d46ababa22ec17d5dcc3d&_e=Fh4XDn2v0-_QnK4rVE0VJgLEsfupJhPT1nlCfn2g7vvU2SAqK3qF2pI84FNgj5f1KdCLx5s48vPMc1ZbEhenEEqJRKcIIgAoC1gQeXsIq5UsRAHXaEQAvMkgigKt5lSyb5ZrWtz1sjEUmuW3x6ZgolRuQhz8P2uBkrjozcTKoPwLJSYE5g0HYoX1CvJSR10ToNLpEHmMC8HP2baOQeCF-JA5zqN4EowQZomPqws9jiu_5EuIC2HsZEvA-M3_FYX8CobYyvUjJHp_12J1wrLiCYpRIG0PUtv0X2pPknqE8kUCc4TTZSDv7z1nO3yThsZArhqSYfupyTJH_AgsSO-VckVGgD7mhFqI4SifmT6IeqiBvGXkeLtwzEB50KGyv7anBAZ8Fiqwk42rGfTnwKoj3g%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=089372c3539d46ababa22ec17d5dcc3d&_e=Fh4XDn2v0-_QnK4rVE0VJgLEsfupJhPT1nlCfn2g7vvU2SAqK3qF2pI84FNgj5f1KdCLx5s48vPMc1ZbEhenEEqJRKcIIgAoC1gQeXsIq5UsRAHXaEQAvMkgigKt5lSyb5ZrWtz1sjEUmuW3x6ZgolRuQhz8P2uBkrjozcTKoPwLJSYE5g0HYoX1CvJSR10ToNLpEHmMC8HP2baOQeCF-JA5zqN4EowQZomPqws9jiu_5EuIC2HsZEvA-M3_FYX8qOVJwkR4w3w_JgEN4Y4N-kU0vH_rJC1NKdmpMUUbnYGHzxahqg-jMeNTz4aN5V9pgoKCY5JwCIfefoykhvObgpm6ZZMGTwdRcdaEAUAD-eXs7YzyFtbBmoRYKp-UO6PSmCgpzM3ZIKs2QhtYw5Khdw%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---

---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

We're committed to making sure you're getting exactly the kind of content you're interested in. | | "☐ Revitalizing the economy" "☐ Saving our education system" "☐ Standing up to the Chinese Communist Party" "☐ Fighting against woke ideology" "☐ Securing our border" "☐ Fighting against mask/ vaccine mandates and lockdowns" " ☐Restoring our American energy dominance" "☐ Standing up for parents’ rights" "☐ Making sure our military puts the mission first" "☐ Protecting the unborn" "☐ Keeping tabs on Joe Biden and his failures" "☐ Defending religious freedom in America" "☐ Seeing what the media is saying about the campaign" "☐ Restoring law and order over riots and disorder" Note: you can select as many as you want! We're excited to keep you in the loop about everything that matters most to you, friend. We hope you'll let us know what you want to see! | | In Freedom, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. body:
What grabs your attention, Friend? We'd like to know what ranks at the top of your list in this election.

We're committed to making sure you're getting exactly the kind of content you're interested in._

In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zei2n2hh4cbmoqqrr6nl42tn7v01hjj8812lhing_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5j6cob4cph2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z85740gnhbplsb1irfsss2ausbfq9541nhcdutkg_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5j6cob4cph2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). We'd like to know what ranks at the top of your list in this election. | | | | | | | | | | Survey Alert 📝 We've got two missions: 1) Earning your support to help Ron DeSantis defeat Joe Biden in November 2024. 2) Making sure you understand how much we appreciate the incredible impact you're making. We're seeking your input today to help us achieve mission #2. Will you respond to this survey to let us know which issues you want us to keep you updated on? We're committed to making sure you're getting exactly the kind of content you're interested in. | | "Revitalizing the economy" "☐Saving our education system" "☐Standing up to the Chinese Communist Party" "☐Fighting against woke ideology" "☐Securing our border" "☐Fighting against mask/ vaccine mandates and lockdowns" "☐Restoring our American energy dominance" "☐Standing up for parents’ rights" "☐Making sure our military puts the mission first" "☐Protecting the unborn" "☐Keeping tabs on Joe Biden and his failures" "☐Defending religious freedom in America" "☐Seeing what the media is saying about the campaign" "☐Restoring law and order over riots and disorder" Note: you can select as many as you want! We're excited to keep you in the loop about everything that matters most to you, friend. We hope you'll let us know what you want to see! | | In Freedom, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. * I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=921e5fd9e31545408d29b858479463ec&_e=utW-XmJP5uBvEWv9s-JzSJsNClxHqmA9QVpeQCPGqy3XljWK1J8SYPwv8TvBzCCtS0GC7_7sNR3kfamNT1WlBbI9XVYxkZRJ_4-5Ebrvd-N18chQoc7pxGEQ1xSXOJoUWnMaD8vl5aNt6-ShAZw2ca_DwlyeuZDuJiL6uU6RvwiMBmcjjwWVInndu5mHFZpFmy9W0UhMIYP8UsSIlzUtGZeDWq6pO1qz1pl7NUfbqvZBK3_Vug9J3rSFsEj0HSR7wVih4dnjwNYoORgsCWQCa8CwWJ4Ql_R3H4vjjTo2Jp4wOxGoQmzLCQG3wNn_vcXTjVMu1GB0eijavv0vBGPeqqQe2jwHlFhE76I050U6EPkybns-yX6TZYAhOodMLavbVJ4MKzchxtRQSHxwmRIgiQ%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=921e5fd9e31545408d29b858479463ec&_e=utW-XmJP5uBvEWv9s-JzSJsNClxHqmA9QVpeQCPGqy3XljWK1J8SYPwv8TvBzCCtS0GC7_7sNR3kfamNT1WlBbI9XVYxkZRJ_4-5Ebrvd-N18chQoc7pxGEQ1xSXOJoUWnMaD8vl5aNt6-ShAZw2ca_DwlyeuZDuJiL6uU6RvwiMBmcjjwWVInndu5mHFZpFmy9W0UhMIYP8UsSIlzUtGZeDWq6pO1qz1pl7NUfbqvZBK3_Vug9J3rSFsEj0HSR70cNBGQuWNqyl6Up_9pXo_Tv8yzp73liEb9GKTEVD8iE3vAXKe-oPmrGAk0Tv8Kjn7ZlEe5Pr9oQuxBlFFHx8ue5441uD8kBgMyoFsLlWZaPvq2mapWd_M-318jz3jrCY5dtfwoAmta-s0zrtTgMZsA%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). subject: This is why McCarthy is out. (the truth)
body:
Let’s set the record straight on why McCarthy is no longer Speaker. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensrenewingamerica.com/were-on-the-offensive-10393255?e=17913c7d6d)
---
| | |
---
| | |
#
Friends,

I’m sure you heard the news. Kevin McCarthy is out as Speaker of the House.

The D.C. cartel is already working overtime to spin the defeat and malign the 8 brave members of the house who held McCarthy accountable for breaking his promises.

**So let’s set the record straight on why McCarthy is no longer Speaker.**

In January, after 15 rounds of voting, Kevin McCarthy became Speaker after agreeing to a historic power-sharing agreement with conservatives in the House.

At the heart of this new coalition government were promises made by McCarthy to pursue a bold conservative agenda, including:

→ Funding the government through individual appropriations bills.
→ Defunding woke and weaponized federal programs.
→ Using all available tools to restrain the Biden Administration.

And to ensure McCarthy kept his promises to voters, House conservatives secured the power to raise a motion to vacate if McCarthy violated the terms of this new coalition government.

He did that--twice--on the most vital leverage points that provided opportunities to check the Biden Administration. Instead of working with conservatives, he chose to go into a coalition with House Democrats on critical votes and voted to fund Biden’s woke and weaponized federal government.

**Ultimately, Kevin McCarthy is responsible for his own removal from the Speakership. **

You can read our full statement [here](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=9412cd965c&e=17913c7d6d) 👇

---
| [ ](https://americanrestorationcenter.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=10a708d6740341bfdc2a52a46&id=e447628fa5&e=17913c7d6d)
---
| I'll leave you with this.

With the Speakership vacant, House Republicans must choose a Speaker willing and able to systemically confront the Biden Administration with every legislative tool available and to always govern in coalition with House conservatives instead of Hakeem Jeffries and the Democrats.

That’s what the American people want and that’s what we’ll keep fighting for.

clean_body: Let’s set the record straight on why McCarthy is no longer Speaker. | | | | | | | | | | Friends, I’m sure you heard the news. Kevin McCarthy is out as Speaker of the House. The D.C. cartel is already working overtime to spin the defeat and malign the 8 brave members of the house who held McCarthy accountable for breaking his promises. So let’s set the record straight on why McCarthy is no longer Speaker. In January, after 15 rounds of voting, Kevin McCarthy became Speaker after agreeing to a historic power-sharing agreement with conservatives in the House. At the heart of this new coalition government were promises made by McCarthy to pursue a bold conservative agenda, including: → Funding the government through individual appropriations bills. → Defunding woke and weaponized federal programs. → Using all available tools to restrain the Biden Administration. And to ensure McCarthy kept his promises to voters, House conservatives secured the power to raise a motion to vacate if McCarthy violated the terms of this new coalition government. He did that--twice--on the most vital leverage points that provided opportunities to check the Biden Administration. Instead of working with conservatives, he chose to go into a coalition with House Democrats on critical votes and voted to fund Biden’s woke and weaponized federal government. Ultimately, Kevin McCarthy is responsible for his own removal from the Speakership. You can read our full statement 👇 | | I'll leave you with this. With the Speakership vacant, House Republicans must choose a Speaker willing and able to systemically confront the Biden Administration with every legislative tool available and to always govern in coalition with House conservatives instead of Hakeem Jeffries and the Democrats. That’s what the American people want and that’s what we’ll keep fighting for. | Thanks for your , Russ Vought President, Citizens for Renewing America | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Citizens for Renewing America, All rights reserved. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bff8b7b25cab4768847200ab48c2b38c&_e=Pyyw8fV7TfwtM35WaZNLxZsyU_WjGdyorbUbw4AC-IjLjn96cUzrt2A-Oy1wGIyXntwazbq8f1fMVEuK_fenzsuQdZ-r9zGcOv4GCNPvrb0ThS7fJHkwxNaN3rh72-uA6FC3hE7NkVje93Z5ZjGwKN4yjgwt3J-4XVRlZt_xKbKyb_cX8MVgyhCUifYncoNAHqPsyI1xNOGS_5OQCBVIV4Fv8igZLDEJJr7W4_B5KentMGG7r0TwKj7BJF1jzouLOJVhhQmApMbD9iWjpOB4bAwxbcwWRU3z5lrwM5IYSMTQv-4zUhhh9zhXe2vW5sPJ74_zLrkUfJTc9aw_AE96t4MfdK6Ju9f6aWY2A2pUku1iAC_b_Gz0DXESrJhe8Jv6atYgLHWawhfzBfXPypjfUQ%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bff8b7b25cab4768847200ab48c2b38c&_e=Pyyw8fV7TfwtM35WaZNLxZsyU_WjGdyorbUbw4AC-IjLjn96cUzrt2A-Oy1wGIyXntwazbq8f1fMVEuK_fenzsuQdZ-r9zGcOv4GCNPvrb0ThS7fJHkwxNaN3rh72-uA6FC3hE7NkVje93Z5ZjGwKN4yjgwt3J-4XVRlZt_xKbKyb_cX8MVgyhCUifYncoNAHqPsyI1xNOGS_5OQCBVIV4Fv8igZLDEJJr7W4_B5KentMGG7r0TwKj7BJF1jzouL_T28DQ881VqLMRH9uI62wrxUrmzh4IGYZAWgjxXYp5VUDIJLLWlPzRognbJDHx-tUJX9SpCS1jMrD7gFFvZuvSXtaywKq8g0R2xWw9PbMiE0FpCqhv-YbnzdLMOjjzk1fFA_lPa4A40thQBT1qdCfg%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

We hope you'll let us know what you want to see! | | In Freedom, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Glenn Youngkin
subject: the Spirit of Virginia is strong

body:
Join The Winning Team

| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6db071ad01eb484796349fc0b7154f4b&_e=zdi0N7p6ltfu7qEh30kzICx1crx2m8Omzbrfk_-OKyYyKJ3-K1UvgtCwgRnyTYZ50WOaz1Ze-0ZlBgrO6kPepi_ZTH5pHdhr5UOicI7ZMdzHpopdd79eMufePBi8gLFEGIJcbczHQcRhOMpccgp176crVq0wNV9WlKe3DMnAQQRtvFvRoyr70opNextNsSXZivdPInPx8K8OK05YQ48H34xQpEW7HIgwRQGYRlLHVVclXu-dj6zsCbMCiCnYzyeTLitMXo9jjRp__8jsuTzarxxSlp_qN9oCVYzPSg6saIDwl01oxOaRiFEv4GgK9YomSXQHWcnxH7_4WWdia4KlwRO0rNn_fCHC38A6cZKX0ZzqFZLZ_Pn0sfvCTcw0XYgJ)
---
Friend,

**Two years ago, the Spirit of Virginia was asleep.**

Our great Commonwealth was falling behind under extreme, failed policies that made the cost of living unaffordable, kept parents out of their children's lives, and forced people to move away from Virginia.

But then something amazing happened. In 2021, the Spirit of Virginia woke back up. Virginians across the political divide made a decision to change direction and we haven't looked back since.

We went from the bottom of the country in job growth to near the top of the list. Virginians are keeping more of their hard-earned money, and we're lowering the cost of living. Parents are back in control of their children's education and upbringing.

Our teachers and law enforcement are getting the pay and support they deserve. We're transforming our behavioral health system to get Virginians the right help right now.

For the first time in nearly a decade, more people are moving to Virginia than moving away. We're proving that commonsense, conservative governance works.

_And now, the Spirit of Virginia is stronger than ever before._

But [we have a lot more work](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6db071ad01eb484796349fc0b7154f4b&_e=zdi0N7p6ltfu7qEh30kzICx1crx2m8Omzbrfk_-OKyYyKJ3-K1UvgtCwgRnyTYZ50WOaz1Ze-0ZlBgrO6kPepi_ZTH5pHdhr5UOicI7ZMdzHpopdd79eMufePBi8gLFEGIJcbczHQcRhOMpccgp176crVq0wNV9WlKe3DMnAQQRtvFvRoyr70opNextNsSXZivdPInPx8K8OK05YQ48H34xQpEW7HIgwRQGYRlLHVVdFlLIfqXjgHzdzb5NblZTLHT8ndjkmYwBNnNVshSggRw_Ud5J_J8e29A8ud0Thz3JRNDWaSCrlkNRkddRGr1q7YaAK9dj4CtjW355Nnz95hbDvlfIIjxnV1Euf8wojKCI2DpeNycgXP0wHbKGtydqJ) to do. Our entire General Assembly is on the ballot, and Virginians will start voting in this critical election starting this week. I truly believe this is the most important election happening in America.

[I need your help](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6db071ad01eb484796349fc0b7154f4b&_e=zdi0N7p6ltfu7qEh30kzICx1crx2m8Omzbrfk_-OKyYyKJ3-K1UvgtCwgRnyTYZ50WOaz1Ze-0ZlBgrO6kPepi_ZTH5pHdhr5UOicI7ZMdzHpopdd79eMufePBi8gLFEGIJcbczHQcRhOMpccgp176crVq0wNV9WlKe3DMnAQQRtvFvRoyr70opNextNsSXZivdPInPx8K8OK05YQ48H34xQpEW7HIgwRQGYRlLHVVeA0-4SaVPvAqhpILN58LvOzVQVW_LMAJpy1ivZ3OOmVPClkL6lIcLZSj10Q0CWgimSBrVCynuXB9aNkFQDlp06oiiZtJ56XQ68rFCG_Sv0N7uYSiJdxjVmTvU9PIevihTMKeRwU0meBbRFM_hVcQ1k) to keep Virginia on a path to prosperity. We have millions of dollars pouring into these elections from those who want to take our Commonwealth backward.

So, if you can, [please consider contributing](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6db071ad01eb484796349fc0b7154f4b&_e=zdi0N7p6ltfu7qEh30kzICx1crx2m8Omzbrfk_-OKyYyKJ3-K1UvgtCwgRnyTYZ50WOaz1Ze-0ZlBgrO6kPepi_ZTH5pHdhr5UOicI7ZMdzHpopdd79eMufePBi8gLFEGIJcbczHQcRhOMpccgp176crVq0wNV9WlKe3DMnAQQRtvFvRoyr70opNextNsSXZivdPInPx8K8OK05YQ48H34xQpEW7HIgwRQGYRlLHVVfEaD3-ruuZhG-fZWIEJmiIGSWOxCm7IEETVm6kH13FJRCX6Q7l-KBS8yA8yfEedNVpRcGyna8epwUWJjQfMoKv3W-7lZzD0oU8-y47TlQqcmbMfEQfRC8DQ-8868ZiwX7sA0u204XI6PV6pZRO-2Uk) even just a small amount. Every dollar you generously donate will be put to immediate use, electing leaders to the General Assembly who will work with me to move Virginia forward.

**[You can donate at this link: HELP TEAM YOUNGKIN HERE!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6db071ad01eb484796349fc0b7154f4b&_e=zdi0N7p6ltfu7qEh30kzICx1crx2m8Omzbrfk_-OKyYyKJ3-K1UvgtCwgRnyTYZ50WOaz1Ze-0ZlBgrO6kPepi_ZTH5pHdhr5UOicI7ZMdzHpopdd79eMufePBi8gLFEGIJcbczHQcRhOMpccgp176crVq0wNV9WlKe3DMnAQQRtvFvRoyr70opNextNsSXZivdPInPx8K8OK05YQ48H34xQpEW7HIgwRQGYRlLHVVdAkdkJBg5AGlA6mpHrG57qmkFYGm0P4wFz1l4KwmSFseLJBMf2KeFp07agYX4Ciy-7QGaI08PNqIrx2EQVGqZehrcqDhGXxjTU91vdZ4tA4LBlT59muCYj-xoQ7jyetejKubTnsPdFGfaFhmR2suYi)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: I want you to know the truth
body:
Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21aa221eeb4d4263be99cd0d5b67cae8&_e=AM6pJSvquZGTvE-bAn2vAqeIn1yqN1eExFl6JgYWe8p-f1PKuGtiXJISF-_bMO9LQSoW1zDsxeQD9yjq1_DjlI1usBoZsUQ1QF55nrNOBRcbaB_4-bNQidpT_REHDCYa0uTIfjOIdb6F8Ie-FwZsVyFS4W-1Tl-DYwyRl7ilMZ0kYETmT9txg8ZvZ1LiCcbTtw8hNo_ELl3W8kiocQ8RDtJaCbp8Zelw_TLfi79XVJyJhLelTPfX2MTTavRVuH6m1mE71QID_K8tiTKtF6RcA6VZcWNKXPrOKpbafIOgkX4KE0lW9kmRf3jSpw_hDxIjch2XoWTLVFzcuq9XzoEn2Rig9oxiq0D4ZxrzInqYsbG_MkXSkA4OsJkIxOIhP1_e_e6LiPIKd4Cs4V7BT16gY0utKO9n5dpN2gk7YO5yCY0B8oAMZNKHi5RlyY5PPmE78uBp-FPa2xQIDlgh-FKJN-3zvNHWwmld8VqLx9fDmu995pEuR56PuhO9WR_qVJsh50-9UcpsR_FfyFCreoRAIECqKMKRjVEvdeLv2OZECIvwlm_74vqIGcivzes1uDbfusKgy_nMqWsLH0oYSW8frhW7EJCeR4_6dM4_jSEo6Lsj4H9qgp7pE-QzklgSKrgnxd6IicolAW-QKcmvc4Mpnw%3D%3D)
---

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21aa221eeb4d4263be99cd0d5b67cae8&_e=AM6pJSvquZGTvE-bAn2vAqeIn1yqN1eExFl6JgYWe8p-f1PKuGtiXJISF-_bMO9LO_8m3ipppnMbX5QKSOVwLzGb3DX88OLT2ACapX4N0q0Ox8fJh4c9p0bLORzAVqW4vXQrvwVdEUMJyQLBNf3OnxDL1Bm4gr3HoxrjZEzWr0Ri-rs9PnmJgeO8WvbrN5rLGTCQ_lIrCR2_pLTzBisg5QUPX_G80td-H7dVWDrUR1ck-D1hR4fJWIeQaZhLArx7PVn5xuKpXZ-1z8QNaK11pdmtozTmjGZ7HeETxkhppyNKh7SQqigJGnKngAu7A70UQDQqf83yNbfMyMMX3dyq4SgWqyT2vgCE-GF53dPBRJWQBLWqOSLBP4OYqjAZcjbludVXANSeR31vKvS-V1zkXfvshO8j_zdvI_5X-RcidybgaeQRx6LbB9LVderS-aIYm81NQR2X5ICc7GFQJM3BZKzpHfi-lOTNKW6GDBJHhhPlmASIwoJlgELzQdy0q-27s8SPTxzjd1YQtYUuW6vybzbaraRZPIUNs3I3VIgbc7MWgplOCYi1qPNcE97oePOxnRrEweBJXxnLJvw6pTGHRtSr3MuHcSNCPq2uHz8pxe79ri1xuAXd1QL7BVgOlNdpFVrtGqh6UvgLYSh2MLsKUQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**
