clean_body: Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492 Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: Make VOTER ID a Reality in MA !
body:
We Need Your Help !
| | | |
---
| | [OUR NEW WEBSITE !](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hN1zWq49Qbww9W_e_LJgXkl3iic4qsrwFqMDagXPx8JAx9JPySGtGfofCnenbid3IYTc0yn4-MVM-VmiI6I0kAkSvxbLeI0sYDJythGwThfcZoOJxUAuGKW2l0ZrCJtviQ6xI8gCoVUz3hU7N4EZ6hiD25chtcQPmtT7ksBpsiu8QTwudKGheXKhhoOvYBdp6XdQ2R3bYz0=&c=5TS__Oahn24WxnsJsG0MnczgVZSMPZ-xLrOOEw66-Mrti8WQ6PwSgQ==&ch=m2e-9REd4r0b4MYaWbaX5hEC1JULw7Zav-29z_C-jCvBEkUtXLJkug==)
---
GET ON OUR EMAIL LIST - SIGN UP ON OUR WEBSITE - CLICK THE ABOVE LINK
---

Friends and fellow patriots,
Will you help us make voter ID a reality in Massachusetts? If we collect 90,000 signatures by November 22nd and 74,516 of those signatures are certified, then the voters will be able to decide whether or not a voter must show an ID to vote in Massachusetts.
This is where you can make a difference. We desperately need volunteers to collect signatures and to hand out petition sheets to friends and neighbors.
We are providing you our new website link [ma4voterid.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hN1zWq49Qbww9W_e_LJgXkl3iic4qsrwFqMDagXPx8JAx9JPySGtGfofCnenbid3mL4itXmn5GvMnkWmQ7kKzBxT1KxxaI4cpVKO6EO39xASE5pFOtEFcTS-cbraWcb_0ii7xxaZ1aCi3SD4xT1pgC8e48kBFcTVHfLVGw1F--ncogNGs3mcCM0NhXkAnfmgKI62o9v4bPY=&c=5TS__Oahn24WxnsJsG0MnczgVZSMPZ-xLrOOEw66-Mrti8WQ6PwSgQ==&ch=m2e-9REd4r0b4MYaWbaX5hEC1JULw7Zav-29z_C-jCvBEkUtXLJkug==) This is a self service, one stop shopping for everything you need to help and understand our goals, including reading the actual petition itself.
You can read, locate and view the downloadable PDF, the actual petition for voter ID. However, we can't emphasize enough that you must carefully follow the instructions. If the ballot is printed improperly, or if it's crooked, or if there is any issue at all, they will throw out your signatures. Please read the instructions and please follow the printing directions. Once signed you can mail back the petitions to the PO Box listed on the front of the petition. If you can get your signatures certified before mailing them back to us, by taking the sheets to your local city of town clerk, that would streamline our signature collection efforts. We thank you in advance !
If you are unable to print a petition to sign and prefer to have a petition delivered to you we are will gladly get petitions to your address. Please use this email (click on the email) [MA4voterID@gmail.com](mailto:MA4voterID@gmail.com) to populate a request form. Please specify how many sheets you need. Lastly, please place in the subject line (send me petitions).
Every town or city must be on its own separate, individual sheet. You cannot commingle different cities and towns on the same sheet. Please see specific instructions on the webpage.
We are a team of grassroots activists trying to make a difference in our state by adding this critical check and balance to our Election system . We show an ID for everything nowadays, and we should show one when we vote in our elections.

Thank You, To Victory, Caroline Colarusso LIKE OUR FACEBOOK PAGE !
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hN1zWq49Qbww9W_e_LJgXkl3iic4qsrwFqMDagXPx8JAx9JPySGtGfofCnenbid3HmVvtONc1EV5mFQIK16jQY88oJjy93NeHpcmg7sJ15vNhXzX2G9P8R2RUSbvj2vBdGKUIKlJ0FgsFkOwSctF9HAGO5Z40g6_1sTc0UiW_Gc=&c=5TS__Oahn24WxnsJsG0MnczgVZSMPZ-xLrOOEw66-Mrti8WQ6PwSgQ==&ch=m2e-9REd4r0b4MYaWbaX5hEC1JULw7Zav-29z_C-jCvBEkUtXLJkug==)
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

| **" Mike, it is so hard to see what this nation has come to. I don't know what this next cycle will look like, but I do know I wish you would consider running for the presidency. You would have my vote - no question."** **Keith from Austin, TX** **" I wish you would just run for POTUS!!!!! The work you and Trump did was the BEST that I have seen since Reagan. I miss having a true leader in the White House and I seriously hope you'll reconsider your candidacy. Praying!!!"****Linda from Fresno, CA**

---

Friend, I have been touched by everyone's heartfelt messages asking me to run for President, and I am truly humbled and honored to have so many Pipehitters consider my skill set for this position.

But I have another critical mission for 2024... and I hope that you will continue to stand with me as you always have.

name: Border Crisis Update
subject: WIDE OPEN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

Our border crisis is worse than it’s ever been.

**In August alone, over 180,000 illegal migrants were reported at our Southern Border.**

We don’t know who is coming into our country through our southern border or what they’re coming for. But based on what we’ve seen so far, we know they come with an increase in crimes like human trafficking and drug smuggling.

We must focus our attention on keeping American citizens safe.

Just a week ago in New York, senior citizens in a nursing home got KICKED OUT so they could open up space to house illegal immigrants. How is that fair? It seems Joe Biden is putting Americans LAST.

**That’s why we need to FIRE him in 2024.**

**[Will you pitch in now to help us elect Republicans who will SECURE our border once and for all?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1cb012ef1b5e4af783d914876288973c&_e=Sn48Vq-ClpbR5JsLegQF03BtYmqVNGw3EApWQDYj0hoGNl9OeuE1hbf131bMvBaVpJdxU8ndNw3ycHd4ws85PXKlbx11d9MPhQBKb31g45EjSD-awVgc5pxw4ouC0qvecN6ZaPbTURR4CHVWOzwJHYIMTp8IntVw-992D-RUd1egmOm0oQpBbBm1SW482gmooU4ItgHNcM8I9z7NtTSwh7cuE2_VTBqdIFvIY1LLu5BN0JRi3UuHR8Yf7Q5PYHofCHn3ptXLJQDRrDTUoNn4cS_Ix86P6bGOcfFiVUHwtW2b7uUlmAa7xC9Og9hR5BXqrnE2axRHO3GMhuhYpXhiOdgPlN-M1p-A1VovUiHjatpAhYCGJrVQ_B9wpEEAPNsm)**

subject: Say NO to Trump as Speaker of the House
body:
| | | | |

| | |
# [Say NO to Trump as Speaker of the House](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0da1853b-9864-4399-b2eb-2abfd34203cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d83c7fa-a8b0-497e-a85c-c14b75de0d87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Within minutes of Kevin McCarthy's ouster, right-wing pundits and lawmakers began pushing a frightening idea for his replacement—Donald Trump. [For real](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2af24cf6-0033-40fe-9f68-cb29f655ddb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Multiple members have already said they will back him. And the idea is gaining momentum. [**Add your name, and join us in saying "HELL NO" to Trump as Speaker!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T920158a4-5e96-4b48-9649-0ff12321e170/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Think this sounds far-fetched, or crazy? Consider the following: \- the Constitution does not appear to require that the speaker be a member of the House \- 90% of Republican House members are in districts that Trump won in 2020. Their voters would support this. \- There are reports that Trump is interested, viewing this role as a way to get nonstop media coverage, say whatever he wants to from the House floor, and increase his odds of winning back the presidency. And the vast majority of House Republicans have consistently caved to Trump on everything he wanted. **We need to stop this momentum NOW.** We need to show there is strong opposition to this terrible idea, and we need to let the vulnerable Republicans members in districts Biden won that we will work especially hard to defeat them if they help make this happen. [**Add your name, and join us in saying "HELL NO" to Trump as Speaker!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57a475ce-a941-4b8c-a12a-d704f416c329/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Within minutes of Kevin McCarthy's ouster, right-wing pundits and lawmakers began pushing a frightening idea for his replacement—Donald Trump. . Multiple members have already said they will back him. And the idea is gaining momentum. Think this sounds far-fetched, or crazy? Consider the following: \- the Constitution does not appear to require that the speaker be a member of the House \- 90% of Republican House members are in districts that Trump won in 2020. Their voters would support this. \- There are reports that Trump is interested, viewing this role as a way to get nonstop media coverage, say whatever he wants to from the House floor, and increase his odds of winning back the presidency. And the vast majority of House Republicans have consistently caved to Trump on everything he wanted. We need to stop this momentum NOW. We need to show there is strong opposition to this terrible idea, and we need to let the vulnerable Republicans members in districts Biden won that we will work especially hard to defeat them if they help make this happen. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. Right now, our country is witnessing a historic low.

Our justice system is corrupt, wages are stagnant while prices skyrocket, and our border is wide open to criminals, drugs, and human trafficking.

I’ve spent my term in the Senate doing everything I can to try to get our country back on track, but I’m not going to lie, if we’re not in the majority, we’re _extremely_ limited in what we can do.

**There’s only one way to win this fight for America’s future: hold onto every incumbent seat, flip key states, and get to work IMMEDIATELY.**

I know this campaign is hard, but I will NEVER give up defending our values from Joe Biden’s Left.

**[Missouri’s Senate race could be one of the closest in the country, and we can’t win this alone. Please, pitch in NOW to help us catch up to our opponents’ numbers and WIN in 2024!](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=e326014d3cdd423da41e683d05779a5a&_e=je1HJ7kJSuaLAZtaMhqawKV5_MvUEW_IlkS1RboJ5-tET4OkLnncNXqKvR4JxZIL2ajIuhtEtNNHcW4cVcaQ9qxYela8eRTGV3wo4J1WMbKqe6v1alg5uTkDLUpjsgiAkbE_XV6qtFcTc_ymgpctX7pSCxMS6JvJ-AflnoXazDLII2-4HpO-A4oCHWs6oQWAUBkREJgkayTJS_O9VqbRYCmU6GGIjW1d3IGSh3n_SgXx9DkyT7WfhhMKH7GtpZDkmxfT_5y4zZCK8WA-KhgynmopKoxNmhjIhOAMAYPDSF8cYUUgKaMz0M34jCzAAu3merahSgZyxUuWBvtipaNVlEgqiarPgvWepHT2PTrxnbEMpEXr2qcOx8E46xj0Rdg8gOlgHW6L_6L2kIAwCKrdFQ%3D%3D)**

What's happening isn't governance. It's political theatre and the GOP is preventing Congress from working for the American people.

CONTRIBUTE $10 [actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CONTRIBUTE $25 [actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE MORE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Twenty-four people inside Trump's inner circle have turned on him [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/rep-bergman-needs-to-denounce-trumpism] . Republicans who haven't, such as Rep. Jack Bergman, don't get a free pass for trying to save McCarthy. Trump has his hands all over the chaos in Washington caused by MAGA extremists, and my opponent is still aligning himself with the disgraced former president.
Make no mistake. If it were true that "politics in Washington is broken," we would have seen this destruction when Democrats were in charge. The GOP alone is broken, their civil war is wreaking havoc on our Nation, and Jack Bergman's actions and extremist affiliations fuel this dumpster fire.
If our Representative was genuinely focused on serving the American people, he would denounce Trumpism, rise above the division, and get to work for the American people.
Instead, he's standing by his man. "A person that has no idea what America stands for and has no idea what America is all about" , according to John Kelly, Trump's longest-serving White House Chief of Staff.
Can Bergman align with Trump, work with extremists, and still get things done? No. This year, a mere 16 bills have been signed into law, and it's unclear which ones could benefit our district. As for Bergman's actions, he has consistently voted against us [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/bergman-s-record-shows-constant-abandonment-of-northern-michigan-u-p-priorities] .
In this congressional session, he has sponsored 18 bills, out of which only one has become law — the naming of a VA clinic. He has also cosponsored 135 bills, with only one becoming law — the Marine Corps commemorative coin act.
It's just not enough. Good legislation is about being proactive and productive and avoiding petty political squabbles that don't benefit the American people. Bergman is making no effort to distance himself from the source of all the chaos in Washington, and rural America deserves change.
Friend I need you with me in this fight. Thank you for your continued support.
V/R
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Democrat, MI01

# _I'm Running_
My Friends, I am excited to announce today my candidacy for State Representative in Ohio’s 17th District. You all know me as a fighter; A man who understands that it is time to elect leaders who are beholden only to our people, our Constitution and our God. I made a pledge that I will continue this battle for liberty as long as there is a breath in my body, and I intend on keeping that promise. _District 17 is comprised of Broadview Heights, North Royalton, Strongsville, Berea and Olmsted Falls. _ _In Columbus, I will fight to:_
* **Eliminate Ohio’s Income Tax**
* **Protect Children**
* **Empower Parents**
* **Ban CRT**
* **Get Men out of Women’s Sports and Changing Rooms**
* **Defend the Sanctity of Life**
* **Uphold Truth**

This is just the tip of the iceberg. We have so much work to do and no man or woman can do it alone. Join me as I work to put Liberty First. **_To Learn More About Jonah Schulz and JOIN THE FIGHT:_**

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here The Democrats will do whatever it takes to take power… I’ve seen the Democrat playbook over and over again. They will lie, deceive, and mislead voters all in an effort to win elections. When I won my race for Lieutenant Governor in Virginia back in 2021, the Democrats tried to drown us out with attacks and lies. But we pushed back aggressively with our own positive message about empowering parents, keeping our citizens safe, and growing the economy…and we WON! Now, I’m watching a critical House race in my home state of Virginia where the Democrat Machine is doing everything they can do to defeat my friend and Navy veteran Jen Kiggans. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=bdd9e9bea5b661e8aba5cc4726f479b79551874c89f22717393192fb9a57a550469baa7c5a46c114640e6099b9e53f7c51747db2efdc31ec Jen is one of the strongest leaders in Congress fighting for our veterans, to secure the border, and to hold the “woke” Left accountable for trying to tear our country apart. Jen isn’t a career politician, so she doesn’t play their silly political games. Instead, she is focused on delivering results and getting the job done! That’s why the Democrats are dead set on defeating Jen. They are already spending BIG on false attack ads, and it is critical that we rush emergency support to Jen’s campaign so they can push back on the Democrat lies! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=bdd9e9bea5b661e8aba5cc4726f479b79551874c89f22717393192fb9a57a550469baa7c5a46c114640e6099b9e53f7c51747db2efdc31ec RUSH YOUR SUPPORT We cannot sit back and let the Democrats smear Jen’s good name. # Campaign News and Views
From Bidenomics to immigration, Ryan speaks wisdom and hope to our nation's biggest challenges.

Ryan discusses Bidenomics with Mike Pache on LiveNOW from Fox. He also presents his plan for urban renewal. _[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=40fa1ffdbc&e=c1403f41d3)_

Ryan shares his vision for the country's future with WBAP News. He also explains his polling strategy in Iowa and New Hampshire. _[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=0086066639&e=c1403f41d3)_

### Pick Your Politics
Ryan talks with Dennis Silvers about why he entered politics, his business experience, and the ideological divide between parties. _[Watch here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=031a940245&e=c1403f41d3)_

---
### Scott Sands Podcast
Ryan meets with Scott Sands for a lively discussion on the government shutdown and social issues. Topics range from today's job economy to the impact of electric vehicles to immigration control along the southern border. _[Listen here](https://binkley2024.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5894b488eac5a196e1e5d6896&id=7cbb682742&e=c1403f41d3)_

### Healthcare Plan
Ryan has a special announcement on October 9th! Alongside Dr. Firouz Daneshgari, he will discuss plans for transforming American healthcare.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Thierry=20Tchenko?=
subject: The realities of campaign life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
We heard a pop. But that was just the beginning... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3f26e9ab0863/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12654633?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Peter,Recently, I was on the road traveling around Texas, talking to voters about A New Way Forward and how together, we’re going to defeat Ted Cruz and build a brighter future for everyday folks and working families.
After my – _I don’t know, it felt like my thousandth!_ – event of the day, my wife Gloria and I got in the car and started driving on to the next event.
We were talking about what a great event it was.
**You see – I know I’m not a household name in Texas, but when people meet me and give me a chance to spell out my vision for the future, they are excited!**
Which is why I’m putting thousands of miles on our car, driving around Texas and meeting as many folks as I can.
Gloria and I were talking about the great folks we had just met and feeling energized about yet another amazing event. _When suddenly, we heard a pop._
Flat tire.
Sigh.
All good. I can change a tire in my sleep.
I hopped out of the car – _immediately missing my AC in the sweltering Texas heat_ – and headed to the trunk to nab my spare.
Good news: the spare was there and ready to go.Bad news: my jack was broken.
How? No idea. But sometimes that’s just how it goes.
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=879a89a496&e=b8ba94fd9b)
While Ted Cruz or some of my “better-funded” opponents would probably have called in a special interest-funded private jet to come and get them, our grassroots campaign doesn’t have that option.
The story ended fine – we called an Uber to take us to AutoZone, we got a new jack, and I fixed the tire while Gloria was figuring out what we were going to eat for dinner.
**It’s easy to see Ted Cruz and other politicians making the rounds of the Sunday shows and think that’s what campaigning is all about.**
_**But let me tell you – it ain’t!**_
Campaigning is about driving around the state, in your car, listening to some music or a podcast, and sharing your vision of the future with anyone and everyone who wants to hear it.
Well, that’s my idea of campaigning anyway.
[**If you want a Democratic U.S. Senator willing to do the work, to put in the miles, and to talk to anyone and everyone, regardless of where they live, what they’re worth or what color their skin is, kick in $10 or more today.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=57b271a35a&e=b8ba94fd9b)
The first couple of bucks we raise will probably go to a spare jack. **But every dollar after that is going directly into keeping me on the road and my message resonating on social media.**
Because the more people hear from us, the more people are joining us.
[**You are the power behind this campaign. Kick in what you can today, and let’s build A New Way Forward together.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=a09a3c0c10&e=b8ba94fd9b)

| [$10 >>](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=77a42aeb3b&e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
| [$20.24 >>](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=72f0dfe527&e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
| [$50 >>](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=a29882d310&e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
| [$100 >>](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=75300ae8f5&e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
| [$250 >>](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=c6b5ffe251&e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
| [Other >>](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=98b5232295&e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Thank you,Thierry
|

name: Karen Meredith, VoteVets.org
subject: My son was not a “loser” for not coming home from Iraq
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
This week has not been easy.
#
Derek,
This week has not been easy.
For two years, I’ve cringed every time I hear the reporting about Trump calling members of our military "suckers" and those who died in battle "losers."
To have it confirmed by his former Chief of Staff on Monday was difficult to read.
**My name is Karen Meredith, and I’m a Gold Star mother.**
My only child, Ken Ballard, joined the Army after graduating high school in 1995. As an Army granddaughter, Army daughter, Army sister, and Army mom, I couldn't be more proud of his decision.
My son deployed to Iraq in May of 2003, and 384 days later he was killed while fighting an Iranian-backed militia in Najaf. He had been scheduled to return home eight days earlier, but his tour was extended.
Ken, like those in his family, were not "suckers" for making the decision to serve their country. He was not a "loser" either.
Ken, and those who put on the uniform, are the best this country has to offer.
Sometimes it's hard to know how to respond in these moments. For me, I have been active in the Gold Star and Veteran's communities as an advocate for Military families. I feel as if my work resisting Trump is an extension of that work.
And I am thankful to have a mechanism to do that through VoteVets.
I know that in 2024 - just like 2020 - VoteVets will have a critical role to play in keeping Trump out of the White House. And anything I can do to help, I am in. So today, I am asking for your help in that cause:
**[Can you please make a contribution, $5 or whatever you can afford, directly to VoteVets? They will put every dollar they raise right to work helping to defeat Trump in the next election.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231004-1-30&t=1&akid=17397%2E3013755%2EsESN1l)**

Karen Meredith

And I am thankful to have a mechanism to do that through VoteVets. I know that in 2024 - just like 2020 - VoteVets will have a critical role to play in keeping Trump out of the White House. And anything I can do to help, I am in. So today, I am asking for your help in that cause: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** If Republicans won't keep Trump out of office, then we must. Thank you, Karen Meredith Gold Star Families Liaison VoteVets.org PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Conservatives Remove McCarthy as Speaker, Stunning GOP Establishment
body:
For the first time in US history, a conservative-led effort to remove a Speaker of the House was successful, as Kevin McCarthy was ousted late Tuesday

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/2a98ba794ffc/breaking-conservatives-remove-mccarthy-as-speaker-stunning-gop-establishment?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: Conservatives Force Historic Vote and Remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, Leaving GOP Establishment Stunned, Angry (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/breaking-conservatives-force-historic-vote-and-remove-kevin-mccarthy-as-speaker-of-the-house-leaving-gop-establishment-stunned-angry.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/10/breaking-conservatives-force-historic-vote-and-remove-kevin-mccarthy-as-speaker-of-the-house-leaving-gop-establishment-stunned-angry.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
US President Joe Biden (right) meets with US House Speaker Kevin McCarthy about the debt ceiling, in the Oval Office of the White House in Washington, DC, on May 22, 2023. US President Joe Biden and Republican legislators have reached an agreement in principle to raise the US debt ceiling and thereby avoid catastrophic default, US media reported. (Image Credit: AFP)
For the first time in U.S. history, a conservative-led effort to remove a Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives was successful, as the House voted late Tuesday to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker by a vote of 216-210.

Eight Republicans voted against McCarthy, who could only afford to lose five votes in order to keep his leadership position.

Florida Congressman Matt Gaetz, who led the conservative effort to remove McCarthy as Speaker of the House didn’t mince words on the floor of the House, when responding to McCarthy ally, Rep. Tom Cole, R-OK, who said that Gaetz’ actions to remove the Speaker would create chaos.

“I don’t think voting against @SpeakerMcCarthy is chaos. I think $33 Trillion in debt is chaos. I think not passing single-subject spending bills is chaos. I think being governed by continuing resolutions and omnibus bills is chaos. Chaos is somebody we cannot trust with their word. That’s why I’ve moved to vacate the chair.”
https://twitter.com/RepMattGaetz/status/1709286103612613115?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

During his remarks in the House Chamber, Gaetz also took aim at the GOP-establishment – who backed McCarthy’s bid to save his speakership.

“I take no lecture from those who would grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who own our leadership, hollow out this town, and borrow against the future of our future generations.”
https://twitter.com/RepMattGaetz/status/1709299984321880242?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
In June, McCarthy negotiated a debt ceiling bill with the Biden White House, and after it was passed, the Democrats celebrated (https://thefederalist.com/2023/06/01/democrats-victory-lap-over-mccarthys-debt-ceiling-surrender-tells-you-all-you-need-to-know-about-the-compromise/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Conservatives argued that the bill that McCarthy negotiated didn’t cut spending as the Speaker alleged, but rather, increased spending very slowly and added another $4 trillion in debt by 2025.

On X, conservative Texas congressman Chip Roy, who opposed the debt ceiling bill, wrote,

“Why I will oppose the #DebtCeiling “deal.” It’s not a good deal. Some $4 Trillion in debt for – at best – a two year spending freeze and no serious substantive policy reforms. #NoDeal”
https://twitter.com/chiproytx/status/1663256164618981376?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

McCarthy also took heat from conservatives as the country faced a potential government shutdown, as he proposed a continuing resolution that needed Democratic support and included funding for Ukraine.

But after conservatives, including Gaetz objected, McCarthy was forced to remove funding for Ukraine from the CR.

The CR is for
45 days (https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/government-shutdown-saturday-rcna118201?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and as the country goes into the holiday season – the House will need to negotiate another deal to avoid a government shutdown at a time when families will be spending money and preparing for the holidays.

In Illinois, Speaker McCarthy remains close allies with Illinois Republican national committeeman Richard Porter and IL GOP chair Don Tracy – and on June 2nd, McCarthy was the keynote speaker at the Lake County Republican Federation annual Spring Gala.

Porter, a staunch supporter of Ron DeSantis’ campaign for president, has been active on his Facebook page defending McCarthy and blasting Gaetz, who he referred to as “Biden’s favorite Republican.”
(Facebook/Richard Porter)
In another Facebook post on September 20th, Porter referred to McCarthy as an “exemplary leader.”
(Facebook/Richard Porter)

Last Winter, this publication reported that Porter’s law firm, Kirkland & Ellis (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-national-committeemans-law-firm-donated-to-biden-harris.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , where he is a senior partner (https://www.kirkland.com/lawyers/p/porter-richard-w-pc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , donated to Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020, during the height of the pandemic and lockdowns.

Kirkland & Ellis also represents Pritzker family interests, including
Pritzker Private Capital (https://www.kirkland.com/news/press-release/2021/09/kirkland-advises-pritzker-on-nai-group?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
Tom DeVore, left, and Richard Porter, right, during a hunting trip this past weekend. (Facebook/Thomas DeVore)
On December 1, Illinois Review revealed in an article (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-chair-don-tracys-family-owned-business-donated-to-biden-never-trumpers.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that IL GOP chairman Don Tracy, a friend and ally of Porter – that his family-owned business, Dot Foods, where he is an owner, donated to Biden (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and ‘Never Trumpers’ in 2020 and 2022.

During the Republican Primary, Porter served as advisor and co-chairman of the Richard Irvin for governor campaign. In 2014, 2016 and 2020, Irvin pulled
Democratic Primary ballots (https://twitter.com/markmaxwelltv/status/1471589397552320517?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ; and in 2020, he spoke at a Black Lives Matter rally shouting, “I can’t breathe!”

Irvin would lose the primary to a grassroots conservative candidate by 42 points.

The House Republican Conference is meeting today to decide next steps.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=a6ab586238-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_04_02_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-a6ab586238-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

============================================================

body:
please respond before midnight:
| | |
---
**NEW YORK TIMES:
_"Democrats Try a Novel Tactic to Revive the Equal Rights Amendment"_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70924031/430736890/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4481-su-nd&refcode=jtk4481-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjkxYjgzMS1jMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_Rr6G5ZuHeeDDCL-VL3cyQsW3N8B_No4y0WIQBh4V0=&emci=7d1411fc-e65e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=db91b831-c362-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is boldly leading the fight to finally enshrine equal rights in our Constitution and END gender-based discrimination. **But she needs to know whether you support this fight — _[_please respond before midnight:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70924033/430736891/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4481-su-nd&refcode=jtk4481-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjkxYjgzMS1jMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_Rr6G5ZuHeeDDCL-VL3cyQsW3N8B_No4y0WIQBh4V0=&emci=7d1411fc-e65e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=db91b831-c362-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)_**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70924035/430736893/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4481-su-nd&refcode=jtk4481-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjkxYjgzMS1jMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_Rr6G5ZuHeeDDCL-VL3cyQsW3N8B_No4y0WIQBh4V0=&emci=7d1411fc-e65e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=db91b831-c362-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
Friend, Kirsten has been on the front lines of the toughest fights in Washington since DAY ONE. She's been a fierce leader for gender equality, a tireless advocate for survivors of sexual harassment and a relentless fighter for family rights.
Now Kirsten is leading the fight for progress yet again: **She's announced a bold new strategy to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment after 100 years of tireless advocacy from some monumental female leaders!**
Right now, a single arbitrary deadline is the ONLY THING stopping the Equal Rights Amendment from being added to our Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent that deadline. And once the ERA is certified, it gives us a constitutional basis to accomplish so much of what we've spent decades fighting for:_ ending the __gender __pay gap, protecting marriage equality and even restoring reproductive rights nationwide._
**Like Kirsten said, we need the Equal Rights Amendment now more than ever. But Republicans are already scheming to block her resolution!** As Kirsten takes on this hugely important fight, she needs to know if grassroots people like you will have her back. **Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show Kirsten where YOU stand?**
**Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70924037/430736895/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4481-su-nd&refcode=jtk4481-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjkxYjgzMS1jMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_Rr6G5ZuHeeDDCL-VL3cyQsW3N8B_No4y0WIQBh4V0=&emci=7d1411fc-e65e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=db91b831-c362-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70924039/430736897/1608909574?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4481-su-nd&refcode=jtk4481-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjkxYjgzMS1jMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_Rr6G5ZuHeeDDCL-VL3cyQsW3N8B_No4y0WIQBh4V0=&emci=7d1411fc-e65e-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=db91b831-c362-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70924040/430736899/1575385346?code=jtk4481-su-nd&refcode=jtk4481-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjkxYjgzMS1jMzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b_Rr6G5ZuHeeDDCL-VL3cyQsW3N8B_No4y0WIQBh4V0=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: please respond before midnight: | | | NEW YORK TIMES: "Democrats Try a Novel Tactic to Revive the Equal Rights Amendment" Friend, Kirsten Gillibrand is boldly leading the fight to finally enshrine equal rights in our Constitution and END gender-based discrimination. But she needs to know whether you support this fight — Friend, Kirsten has been on the front lines of the toughest fights in Washington since DAY ONE. She's been a fierce leader for gender equality, a tireless advocate for survivors of sexual harassment and a relentless fighter for family rights. Now Kirsten is leading the fight for progress yet again: She's announced a bold new strategy to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment after 100 years of tireless advocacy from some monumental female leaders! Right now, a single arbitrary deadline is the ONLY THING stopping the Equal Rights Amendment from being added to our Constitution. Kirsten's resolution would allow us to circumvent that deadline. And once the ERA is certified, it gives us a constitutional basis to accomplish so much of what we've spent decades fighting for: ending the gender pay gap, protecting marriage equality and even restoring reproductive rights nationwide. Like Kirsten said, we need the Equal Rights Amendment now more than ever. But Republicans are already scheming to block her resolution! As Kirsten takes on this hugely important fight, she needs to know if grassroots people like you will have her back. Please, will you respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to show Kirsten where YOU stand? Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| Team,

As we enter October, we are nearing the ONE MONTH COUNTDOWN until Election Day. That means voters will soon decide the makeup of our State Supreme Court, local ballot measures across the state, school boards, and more.

**Many people don’t think voting in _off-year_ elections is essential. At NPP, we’re actively working to change that and let voters know how IMPORTANT these elections are.** [**Help us mobilize voters by donating $20 or more right now →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70924659/430739102/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231003month_N_TN_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY4MzM2MjliLWM0NjItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PHpHqCM1j-_GPyCWeJj4_CZ30GKCQxYtuLxr_HBexNE=)

clean_body: November is just around the corner. = | Team, As we enter October, we are nearing the ONE MONTH COUNTDOWN until Election Day. That means voters will soon decide the makeup of our State Supreme Court, local ballot measures across the state, school boards, and more. Many people don’t think voting in off-year elections is essential. At NPP, we’re actively working to change that and let voters know how IMPORTANT these elections are. = Off-year elections decide what happens in voters' everyday lives: taxes, schools, traffic controls, health and safety, and more. This election is especially important because our courts are on the ballot, which means issues like reproductive rights, voting protections, and more will be impacted. The makeup of our courts could change with just one vote. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. **= = = = Let’s do this, Team NPP | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. **=** ****PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023**** Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 **** ** || || || ** New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Shift WA
subject: Would you hire this man?
body:
With your assistance, we can bridge this information gap and provide voters the information they need on Jay Inslee's performance in office - particularly, his expensive and inefficient environmental policies. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62326039:sU-XjQiNj:m:1:2610672541:D3D047A9ECCCAA4AF5D751AC95F39F76:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, Unfortunately, as summer turned to fall, we fell short of our fundraising goal here at Shift last month! That shortfall has a direct impact on our ability to effectively inform readers like you about the truth regarding our outgoing Governor Jay Inslee and his record of failed leadership. As a grassroots-driven organization, we rely on the generous support of individuals like you to fuel our mission. [**Your contributions are vital in ensuring that voters across our state are informed about the consequences of the failed policies championed by Jay Inslee and his Democrat Party.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62326040:sU-XjQiNj:m:1:2610672541:D3D047A9ECCCAA4AF5D751AC95F39F76:r) Let's be real - mainstream media outlets are all-too-often aligned with the Left to actually keep watch on them. Sometimes, to provide cover for Democrats, media outlets will omit key facts or simply ignore negative stories altogether. With your assistance, we can bridge this information gap and provide voters the information they need on Jay Inslee's performance in office - particularly, his expensive and inefficient environmental policies. **_[Your contribution of $100, $50, or even $25 will go a long way in helping us shed light on Inslee's record!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62326040:sU-XjQiNj:m:1:2610672541:D3D047A9ECCCAA4AF5D751AC95F39F76:r)_** There is still time to shed light on Inslee's failed record by helping us distribute his resume. With your help, we can ensure that voters get the information that mainstream media outlets won't tell them. **_[Please take a moment to contribute today! Every dollar you donate brings us closer to our goal and closer to informing our fellow citizens about the truth.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62326040:sU-XjQiNj:m:1:2610672541:D3D047A9ECCCAA4AF5D751AC95F39F76:r)_** Thank you, The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62326041:sU-XjQiNj:m:1:2610672541:D3D047A9ECCCAA4AF5D751AC95F39F76:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14309719&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osU-XjQiNj).
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dawn=20Liphardt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: Truth In Taxation Roundtable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🚨Save the Date: Tuesday, November 7th | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ne.gop/n41kepo7ku-12654633?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4dc84d8b63&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | Peter,
---
| _“We must care for each other more, and tax each other less.”_ \- Bill Archer

We believe it is vital to bring every voice to the table as we support our elected officials to achieve more solutions for Nebraskans.

This last year in legislation, we made strides for transparency of our taxation process with plans for continued property tax reform. However, the conversation on the Truth in Taxation must include our sales, income, & property tax. We must discuss the ‘Needs versus Wants’ budgetary process at the local levels.
**Our next Roundtable event is dedicated to the topic: Truth in Taxation. We encourage you to save the date and purchase a ticket! **
---
| [PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=56a0671d5d&e=25844e23a8 "PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »")

---
| **_Ticket Pricing_ :**
**Sponsorship opportunities:** $1500, $1000, and $500
**Single admission:** $25
**Student tickets:** $10

| [PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=711222202c&e=25844e23a8 "PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »")
---
| We hope you plan to join us on Nov. 7th!

Warm regards,

[Dawn Liphardt](mailto:admin@ne.gop)
Executive Director
Republican Party of Nebraska

name: CADEM
subject: October Newsletter: Forever Organizing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state.
From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/72374C4E544D55334F7642576D577362737148414E486E555849674C78675761376C72445651494C53355450614D366567676D2F5844545A4F6274593759526F/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%2810%29.png]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/42367A4C7039795141796139794A4D3036367A634152626A556834316B2B5A586C6934674E71797273586D715753567178554E4148356A67726A735A494E4177/editor_images/Untitled%20design.png]
Nadia Abrica
North Los Angeles County Organizer
Team CADEM is proud to introduce Nadia Abrica, Organizer for North Los Angeles County!
Nadia first joined CADEM in May of 2023, bringing with her a proud history of organizing and community outreach. Nadia was born and raised in Los Angeles, but frequently traveled to Mexico with her family, experiencing life in both countries. As a young adult, Nadia accepted an opportunity to study at the University of Mexico. After graduating, she returned to the United States. However, upon realizing that her degree was not valid in America, she continued to pursue higher-education, earning an AA in Psychology and Child Development at the Los Angeles Mission College, and eventually transferring to California State University of Northridge to study Political Science.
Nadia is always learning and educating herself. Through her 10 plus year tenure with Ground Works Campaigns, Nadia proudly gained extensive knowledge of working with diverse communities. Prior to becoming an organizer, Nadia was an activist, following the footsteps of her mother. Today, she wakes up each morning remembering the legacy of her family members and their activism.
Nadia is also Vice President of Latinos en Diseno, as organization focused on empowering women in her community.
Nadia's passions include growing her knowledge in organizing, empowering labor unions, providing equal opportunities for all, and protecting women's rights.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Fiestas Patrias
¡Feliz Mes de la Herencia Latina! Team Forever Organizing was thrilled to participate in the annual Fiestas Patrias Parade in Fresno California, along with the Madera Democratic Club, Clovis Democratic Club, Fresno Democratic Club, Delano Guardians, and CADEM's youth vote inters, reaching Central Valley folks and registering new voters at the festival to celebrate Latino Heritage Month.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4669495264595A3467766834576857507044312B5462463438723263306B3672696E762F426732624C716E366D546F6F5065516B564A79476B6C566175626F70/editor_images/VOLUNTEER%20WITH%20CADEM.png]
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
The Path to the House Majority Runs Through California: Day of Action
Team Forever Organizing led a powerful Day of Action targeting five vulnerable House Republicans in California by mobilizing and energizing Democratic voters.
We were thrilled to be joined by CADEM Chair Rusty Hicks, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, and over 100 activists across the state.
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Campus Activation cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
In September, CADEM's Organizing team continued the charge registering and educating new voters on College campuses.
In Northern California, Organizing team member Sue is breaking the ice with young voters, helping them find their voice and sharing why voting is important to them and others.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4669495264595A3467766834576857507044312B5462463438723263306B3672696E762F426732624C716E366D546F6F5065516B564A79476B6C566175626F70/editor_images/Untitled%20design-10.png] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Anti-Mike Garcia Pro-Choice Rally in Valencia!
Democrats in Southern California are fired up and ready to oust MAGA Mike Garcia!
CADEM Organizer Nadia led the charge in Valencia, bringing protesters out in droves to hold Mike Garcia accountable for his far-right and extreme policies.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4A65434836323337472F487A5A3676364E716E5A50456D5731486552376C38566270656874564B4733372B4376362F52794A305751634D79744534575A566434/editor_images/IMG_3502.jpg] [https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4A65434836323337472F487A5A3676364E716E5A50456D5731486552376C38566270656874564B4733372B4376362F52794A305751634D79744534575A566434/editor_images/IMG_3476.jpg]
Canvassing in Santa Clarita!
Democrats in Santa Clarita are also pounding the pavement, reaching neighborhoods of voters in battleground precincts.
In a single day, over 240 households were reached, activating first time voters where it counts the most.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/4A65434836323337472F487A5A3676364E716E5A50456D5731486552376C38566270656874564B4733372B4376362F52794A305751634D79744534575A566434/editor_images/IMG_3510%20%281%29.jpg]
Voter Registration at the Tulare County Fair!
CADEM Organizer Dave and the incredible Tulare County Democrats are pushing back in a former Republican stronghold, reaching first time voters and making sure their voices are heard in rural California.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/3747746D54757749374D714D5853574434495364654F4B6B7A452F65326553674E504551694D415143586F724E7251416F5747774D796A666F526653322F4A38/editor_images/8_1.png] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%288%29.png]
The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/42367A4C7039795141796139794A4D3036367A634152626A556834316B2B5A586C6934674E71797273586D715753567178554E4148356A67726A735A494E4177/editor_images/IMG_4678.jpg]
Robin Fernandez
Kern County Democratic Central Committee/Democratic Women of Kern
I was born in California, but raised in the small city of Morris in the state of Minnesota. We moved to Florida when I was in the 5th grade for a few years, eventually coming back to Lancaster, California. I now live in Bakersfield with my husband Jerry who is also my DWK partner in activism.
I grew up in a working family where my father worked hard to provide and was a regular voter. That's where I realized the value and need for healthcare. I registered as a Democrat and became an avid voter as well.
When Trump was elected, I realized I had to do more than just vote. I became empowered by the Women's March, I joined the Democratic Women of Kern and have been actively supporting civic engagement in my community.
I agree with the Democratic & social values, and I believe politics affects all people. I believe in the programs that help and uplift our communities.
I've stayed civically active and engaged with the Democratic Women of Kern and Central Committee. We've built power in the party, we're present at community events to register voters, and we GOTV by phone banking, texting and canvassing. One thing I always remember to do is asking young people if they are registered to vote.
I am committed to doing my part to win back the House in 2024!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%287%29.png]
Looking for a way to get involved in mobilizing or registering voters in your community? We want you on Team Forever Organizing.
Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on College campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you.
Can we count on you to join us for an organizing action this month? Your efforts could mean the difference between winning and losing battleground Congressional districts this year.
Statewide Organizing Actions → [cadem.org/takeaction]

We were thrilled to be joined by CADEM Chair Rusty Hicks, California Attorney General Rob Bonta, and over 100 activists across the state. cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Campus Activation cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] In September, CADEM's Organizing team continued the charge registering and educating new voters on College campuses. In Northern California, Organizing team member Sue is breaking the ice with young voters, helping them find their voice and sharing why voting is important to them and others. [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] Anti-Mike Garcia Pro-Choice Rally in Valencia! Democrats in Southern California are fired up and ready to oust MAGA Mike Garcia! CADEM Organizer Nadia led the charge in Valencia, bringing protesters out in droves to hold Mike Garcia accountable for his far-right and extreme policies. [] [] Canvassing in Santa Clarita! Democrats in Santa Clarita are also pounding the pavement, reaching neighborhoods of voters in battleground precincts. In a single day, over 240 households were reached, activating first time voters where it counts the most. [] Voter Registration at the Tulare County Fair! CADEM Organizer Dave and the incredible Tulare County Democrats are pushing back in a former Republican stronghold, reaching first time voters and making sure their voices are heard in rural California. [] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction] [] The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work. [] Robin Fernandez Kern County Democratic Central Committee/Democratic Women of Kern I was born in California, but raised in the small city of Morris in the state of Minnesota. We moved to Florida when I was in the 5th grade for a few years, eventually coming back to Lancaster, California. I now live in Bakersfield with my husband Jerry who is also my DWK partner in activism. I grew up in a working family where my father worked hard to provide and was a regular voter. That's where I realized the value and need for healthcare. I registered as a Democrat and became an avid voter as well. When Trump was elected, I realized I had to do more than just vote. I became empowered by the Women's March, I joined the Democratic Women of Kern and have been actively supporting civic engagement in my community. I agree with the Democratic & social values, and I believe politics affects all people. I believe in the programs that help and uplift our communities. I've stayed civically active and engaged with the Democratic Women of Kern and Central Committee. We've built power in the party, we're present at community events to register voters, and we GOTV by phone banking, texting and canvassing. One thing I always remember to do is asking young people if they are registered to vote. I am committed to doing my part to win back the House in 2024! [] Looking for a way to get involved in mobilizing or registering voters in your community? We want you on Team Forever Organizing. Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on College campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you. Can we count on you to join us for an organizing action this month? Your efforts could mean the difference between winning and losing battleground Congressional districts this year. Statewide Organizing Actions → [cadem.org/takeaction] [] Convention Organizing Actions → [] cadem.org/cafecitos [cadem.org/cafecitos] Cafecito Vota RSVP → [cadem.org/cafecitos] Campus Voter Registration → [cadem.org/registervoters] [] Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
I have written a book, Why America Matters. Intended for young readers

|
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1b00261717ghbopa3civnvlvbiqe8d8rn5np858_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5gm6pj0cth2bs) | |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvgcneufs9c3dk7osgtq6nek9ufmrnrt134s5h40_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5gm6pj0cth2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo8s78bofh9odqsd1m1o95ppoiaemrs135npp6po_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5gm6pj0cth2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs5gclkjn510ql396qno0agcsqlms5nkuut610f0_rp22sh2s8i66p73c5gm6pj0cth2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

| | Friend,

It's Matt Gaetz, and I need your immediate attention.
**I was just _ATTACKED_ and _BOOED_ by RINOs for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight.**
I will _**NOT**_ be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend the knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations.

These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for [_$10, $20, and $30 at a time_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6761ed665e624570a107d9549d4b31aa&_e=BEETG1c4y11qqxm2u-RnJuMdRv8EMy7AJbGDCyEx_j-HK2PxOscMMKa_APMK7vp8S9Xn_EptX1jsBG8ZVZY7tjVt06aIAkBW3lT5cAHP-O6lK4zSOhe7UXYm9r5gxPywk-6c8hsVc5idxksm4-Ba9f4dkIRGbdFLjEk2XDOICAlGxOGiNFdWka50bXzDVz4drulLyEu8MXaHUv447GTiSNIgdVcmVleMkq5b4WYNM9p20xh9DRdeLnYJqLyQTNJvQHR9AD3dDgbRY-RZEzC8CA%3D%3D).

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: It’s time to pitch in what you can
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Every supporter has a role to play in this campaign, and we need your support now more than ever. | | |
---
Peter, **** $25. That’s what we’re asking you to pitch in. This team is built by everyday Americans like you -- when you give our campaign grows stronger and more resilient. **** ****When you support our campaign, you’ll join the over 300,000 donors whose dollars have****gone towards ensuring we can continue the progress that Joe and Kamala have made. At the heart of this movement is the belief that any American can live safely in their community, access quality health care when they need it, and be empowered by this country to reach their fullest potential. This is going to be a challenging campaign cycle, and we’re going to need a big grassroots team to deliver the win we need in 2024 to send Joe and Kamala to finish the job. [**That’s why we’re asking you to make your first donation, and become a monthly sustainer to help us reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris. You are the backbone of this campaign, which is why we have to ask: Can we count on you to pitch in?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZKkB-dJvjox711_pTff-zRP1OXuVLQ6kJxcUfFshEOjaW36pibeYQCJcsWlSs8btGQLsNgnJPn6aAWtZff76WGXNPQ7I4l_lMoHvsOLE4xh6x-luvWexQaeLAeLALy5DPfl5kbUv12GV2hoCctJ-QCI9PA1lsbCur8O_UCmyjf2pkKpb6tA4cko-gEdRBh8uhtex9QBjuEJBVy5B-VuTpmDcug47P3NF2twd8zzsYs1IncFI9iJw7tCi9hOiwQeDSuQkS6Vz1v3zOKqKh1EOkj55lQQ4JOCmScA6IbCF9R4zvS7V02HphruxzFM2X9-sBZcrB8JJCyHN4P6NlxdbCpWIk3F_JLNgkRn_UzI_oQSH84wo3vdsJk6vVh7KHc5JR76Tdz6tIRbGtAct3gv299_LjmThqtfx8s22r67y8NtHwMq0rGbJCsmH442IOMxzEDyuxbtz0dLdTIhku4cdlkVA3ALrwBJjEj80EjODs1MObvlGlueEghyjOH-LTeNsoUWIWnvgAEqBqv1foo4Ps2IrX-3SvGlrVfChVcgVohNLuPxCoxLeoN06Lv2KyA2CdjRx8yDUq4vCeXJEH6wbIHw/405/0dMggircQkGBzfr23lRPTg/h0/swaIZm3TcigKlYbpc0F0h3CoeiT8osS6BOuMoidd9qs) Now is the time to give --****we need your support now more than ever.**** Our Republican opponents are already spending millions of dollars attacking Joe and Kamala while touting their extreme out-of-touch policies. And we know it’s going to take a massive effort from folks all across the country to reelect them so they can finish the job. Thank you for your ongoing support. \-- Team Biden-Harris
