clean_body: Every supporter has a role to play in this campaign, and we need your support now more than ever. | | | Peter, ** $25. That’s what we’re asking you to pitch in. This team is built by everyday Americans like you -- when you give our campaign grows stronger and more resilient. When you support our campaign, you’ll join the over 300,000 donors whose dollars havegone towards ensuring we can continue the progress that Joe and Kamala have made. At the heart of this movement is the belief that any American can live safely in their community, access quality health care when they need it, and be empowered by this country to reach their fullest potential. This is going to be a challenging campaign cycle, and we’re going to need a big grassroots team to deliver the win we need in 2024 to send Joe and Kamala to finish the job. Now is the time to give --we need your support now more than ever. Our Republican opponents are already spending millions of dollars attacking Joe and Kamala while touting their extreme out-of-touch policies. And we know it’s going to take a massive effort from folks all across the country to reelect them so they can finish the job. Thank you for your ongoing support. \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: Adam Frisch
subject: Fox News & Boebert attacked my family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam for Colorado
body:
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70928376/430751679/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODRjOTIyNy1jOTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bXOU1KfhGN-5L9gBTHTR2a9rWoVp43griOEXHj-cBA=&emci=14f2b559-c862-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=f84c9227-c962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70928377/430751680/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODRjOTIyNy1jOTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bXOU1KfhGN-5L9gBTHTR2a9rWoVp43griOEXHj-cBA=&emci=14f2b559-c862-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=f84c9227-c962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If Lauren Boebert wants to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how she supports big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how Boebert supports a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how Lauren Boebert is so extreme, she even wants to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about Lauren Boebert’s fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**Lauren Boebert is scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating her and ending her political career once and for all. I’m ready to finish the job in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to hold Boebert accountable and win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70928378/430751681/1610638071?refcode=em20231004pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=f84c9227-c962-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODRjOTIyNy1jOTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_bXOU1KfhGN-5L9gBTHTR2a9rWoVp43griOEXHj-cBA=)

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Check out our newest Halloween collection >> Ghosts, goblins, and soaring gas prices —****there’s NOTHING spookier than Bidenomics,Friend! | | Don’t wait too long to place your order! We’ve set the prices as low as we can, but thanks to Bidenomics, everything’s getting more and more expensive these days... | – Team Cassidy (Campaign Shop) | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | shop@billcassidy.com PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \- =

clean_body: *ON OCTOBER 16, MY FREEDOM OF SPEECH COULD END| | | | | Patriot, We’re barely into the new month – and the Deep State Democrats are already coming after me with everything they’ve got. A sham trial in New York was not enough to satisfy these tyrants’ thirst for power. Now, the Biden Department of Justice is once again requesting a GAG ORDER against me. A hearing has officially been scheduled for October 16 to decide whether or not the Department of Justice can get away with CENSORING me. In other words, in just a few short weeks, Crooked Joe’s weaponized DOJ may very well get away with stripping Biden’s leading opponent (ME) of his First Amendment right to freedom of speech in the 2024 presidential election. We are watching the ruling regime commit Election Interference in BROAD DAYLIGHT. But no matter the outcome of the October 16th Gag Order Hearing, the Deep State can NEVER GAG the American people! No matter how much we’re attacked, the Silent Majority will NEVER SURRENDER our mission to Make America Great Again! (If you’re doing poorly right now due to the very sinister people running our country into the ground, then please do not contribute! Don’t even hesitate!) | | Thank you, Donald J. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: The Truth about Green Energy - Lunch Discussion
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571193?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

America is being forced to accept a green energy agenda. Wind and solar, we keep being told, will have to replace oil and gas. Cars, they say, will soon all have to be electric.

**Now one of the world’s leading energy experts, Mark P. Mills is coming to Jackson to talk about the consequences of this headlong rush to renewables.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=197026592d&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click on the image above to reserve your place_
| A former White House adviser, Mark Mills is a senior fellow at the Manhattan Institute. The author of several books, he will be talking about some of the consequences of the green energy agenda – and what it could mean for Mississippi.

Jointly hosted by the Mississippi Center for Public Policy and Bigger Pie Forum, places at this lunch time event are limited, so please be sure to book your place right away.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=74a988a514&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

name: Team Tuberville
subject: deeply concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
We can’t keep this up forever. Learn more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a0a93195f250b44e3947229f28c3afba/f536a42f2fd938a7c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Coach is deeply concerned about the never-ending funding of Ukraine. **While we all want Ukraine to be able to defend itself against Putin’s evil regime, our NATO partners aren’t bearing their fair share of the load. And with a $33 trillion deficit, we simply don’t have the means to write Ukraine a blank check. **
---
[**LEARN MORE **](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a0a93195f250b44e3947229f28c3afba/7dd89165e0481e11c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Thankfully, the continuing resolution that the U.S. Senate and House passed on Saturday night did not include the $6 billion of Ukraine funding that had been initially planned. _But this isn’t over – not by a long shot. There will almost certainly be a renewed push for more Ukraine funding as we approach the next government shutdown deadline in November. _ Coach will continue to support ending the war in Ukraine as soon as possible to avoid further bloodshed and the depletion of the resources we need to keep America safe. **[Please take a moment to read this article to learn more about Coach’s views on this vital foreign policy issue.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a0a93195f250b44e3947229f28c3afba/c132871e2535f593c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** -Team Tuberville
---

| Yesterday, I voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as speaker.

Peter, this is unprecedented. Not once in US history has a speaker been ousted.

Earlier this year, this same party elected its speaker after a historic five days and 15 votes later. **Their track record since then has been nothing short of a failure for the American people.**

This proves what Democrats have been saying all along. _The Republican party is not fit to govern._ Their failures to lead have propped up hateful and discriminatory legislation and done little to aid American workers and families.

**The path forward has never been clearer:** we need to take back the House majority, restore the integrity of the House, and get Congress back to making progress for American families. body:
Peter, we need real leadership in the House now more than ever. Biden’s rogue regime continues to claim victories while empty political rhetoric.. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8126625?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e39dafba1b&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e23ddfde95&e=0426928d91)
**🚨URGENT🚨
J.R. MAJEWSKI RE-ENTERS CONGRESSIONAL RACE AS FRONT RUNNER FOR REPUBLICAN PRIMARY**
Peter,
Last cycle the left put forward an all out attack, lying about me and smearing my military service. They did so because they were scared of losing a seat that they have held for the past 40 years.
I’ve always stood for the truth, and I have always been a fighter. Now that my name has been cleared I plan on finishing what we started.

The hardworking people of Ohio aren’t interested in funding Biden’s radical WOKE agenda. We’re tired of paying high prices at the grocery stores and being overcharged for a gallon of gas just to get to work.

We need solutions, not leaders who buckle under pressure.
**Join Team Majewski in our fight to make our voices heard in Congress by selecting an option below and making a generous grassroots donation today!

**[**Donate $20.23 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY amount today >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=b5fa564372&e=0426928d91)
Biden and the radical Democrats are winning, Peter, and I need your help putting and end to their America-Last agenda.

Join me this Friday and let’s talk about the best route forward for America’s future.

I look forward to seeing your there.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=3f3432611a&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09

name: Blue Florida 2024
subject: Rick Scott is vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas
body:
You’re receiving this message because of your past support of Democratic candidates and causes. Roland Gutierrez is running to defeat Ted Cruz for Senate. We need your support to elect Roland, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ifYYiIyK0UCnX-4gLHfqiQ2?unsubscribedata=5l4iOxtDMYSxnk6P7G%2FlviicjEZCXTNxn%2Fqm%2BnwZUXgTzIpmxvQ6Fy5zoZlKb9%2FXRZIbwe3FOXOa2zAL%2F5YVPDVS0bV6XukpNb4y%2Fdt6pmxSKsHp9VeVBFLoVUaEDkvqOE6KUNOtRzKTugKOs8kZ8wDBc7BQk25fnuz1ZXCN2XxdZTdozVEcBU8s1xfiREMjlx8NyjArBdOG8gkerS9pnt7%2FWk36ev%2F474HDrgotX2iUtm6GtkzAbKbqCT1o0qU63Kjx5ziIjNLpOxBBqMqQ970NYH%2FiDbtM4DkAtssYbaITrkvdMyBCrYLM6VKu78yTn2wdG2P5ps6MuOsb%2BlDceBKW9Y6bPhIHde%2FimTKdrvyaDwsdd7EnioQ2R5MnKliViqbTEwiOzl0fo6JZ7TNVt%2BhTrkVCPfg7ZDVLFpUDJ0cTR5sFV7nMlISlOTPVKy1p .
Peter, have you heard the news out of Florida?
Former Congresswoman Debbie Mucarsel-Powell just launched her campaign to DEFEAT extremist Republican Sen. Rick Scott! This is one of our best — and only — chances to expand our Senate majority in 2024.
Experts are already saying that Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection — and early polling puts Debbie ONE POINT AHEAD in this neck-and-neck race. But last time around, Scott spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune to buy this seat.
Debbie is counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors like you to build a war chest capable of taking on Rick Scott’s money machine in this critical battleground race. Please, will you split $10 or more between Debbie and Roland Gutierrez before midnight to become a Founding Donor in our fight to flip Florida blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em-dmp]
Rick Scott is one of the worst Republicans in Washington. His radical policies are even too extreme for Mitch McConnell! If he had things his way, he’d end Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on working families, and ban abortions nationwide.
But here’s the good news: As Scott has grown more radical and unpopular, his favorability ratings and chances of winning reelection have PLUMMETED. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Maher?=
subject: Kevin McCarthy - my view is
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12769815?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=7b5b4b611e&e=1722d05e10)
---
| | There is no question that having a Speaker of the House of Representatives from the Central Valley was good for everyone in our area, regardless of partisanship. With Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House, we had the most powerful member of Congress who truly understands what life is like in the Valley -- the needs of our agriculture and farms, water, housing, and jobs, and how historically we have been a neglected part of California.

**_Unfortunately, career Congressman Jim Costa voted to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker and chose partisanship and chaos over the people he represents. Jim Costa cast a horrible vote for our Central Valley._**

**Now it's time to REMOVE Jim Costa.**

Join me -- a Navy veteran, former law enforcement Special Agent, and lifelong Valley businessman -- in my campaign to BEAT Jim Costa for Congress.
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=a74c87d1a5&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE NOW")
---
| I will put the Central Valley ahead of blind partisanship and the chaos overtaking Washington D.C. Just [$25, $50, $100, or $250](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=4d18581cc7&e=1722d05e10) will make a huge difference in defeating Costa.
---

---
| [$50](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=6e237e857e&e=1722d05e10 "$50")
---
| [$25](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=561d2f6d1e&e=1722d05e10 "$25")
---
| Join Congressman Tom McClintock, former Central Valley Congresswoman Connie Conway, and State Senator Shannon Grove in supporting my campaign for Congress.

You can make a difference as we fight for the Central Valley and send politicians like Jim Costa packing for good.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. body:
| | _**BREAKING:**_
McCarthy Won't Run Again for Speaker After Historic Oust
---
Kevin McCarthy is the shortest serving Speaker since the 1800s. Republicans are in shambles!

_We’re beaming, but we know McCarthy is FURIOUS._ Due to this stunning turn of events, we’re conducting an urgent poll for top Democrats:

[Who do you think should become Speaker of the House?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20231004_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=10889%2E878179%2E1JiGp6)

---
[DONALD TRUMP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20231004_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=10889%2E878179%2E1JiGp6)

**Republicans spent all day yesterday fighting amongst themselves... _and some of them are even trying to elect DONALD TRUMP as the new Speaker! WHAT?!_**

This is one of the _most important_ votes our divided Congress will cast.

**_IF_** Republicans stay divided, Hakeem Jeffries could overcome the MAGA caucus and win!

**_BUT IF_** Republicans get their act together, we could get Donald Trump... _or worse!_
[So NAME, we need to know now: Who do you think should become Speaker of the House?](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/speaker-poll/?source=VPP_20231004_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=10889%2E878179%2E1JiGp6)

My friend, I recently appeared on CNN's "The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer" to discuss the ongoing dysfunction Washington is facing with the impeachment inquiry, as well as the impending government shutdown.
**[You can check out the full video here!](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=7000a6df854a4891b88f473fddf00e2a&_e=zxrSqFPQh0Q14_SGShn2nM1ut8BTiyZMX26JUNb4S3G1Baq0Ff0o8gTLutccL5a82poMNgPG9plxbO5W7azjtNb6eGLhGMUFhqC4vc7rPMXIBjqm4ruP3XIGzH4bEoQVlgRQfsRCwmh0th1BBGn-XIdu2E_EmQLY8peyVmaj07rp3nWnrVOKoanhEzH1DQvgnlb8FQ_M8E6nVVxB1GlEpVujWHdTA8dcHmsMJycsyQE%3D) —**

| | As I mentioned on CNN, it's a disaster that too many politicians are more interested in performative politics, social media, and getting attention than actually solving problems.

_**We need more than performative politics. There's so much more at stake.**_ That’s why I’m working with _**An America United**_ to build a coalition of leaders who will sit down and solve problems rather than capitalize on them for personal gain. **[Donate $10 today to join _An America United_ in this critical mission to build a coalition of common sense Americans.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=7000a6df854a4891b88f473fddf00e2a&_e=zxrSqFPQh0Q14_SGShn2nHUa-f2KQ7IONP8vdP3XN71TdP1OYSp4IfNednpJrOr-BKbsYREIMi43Pm7SBulHzzbR6AZQCIeiL7cbyteoDvjA29I-v_iPzQHkn2tWgsQd0a-5LMR6IHBvdUfs--tl9TQoB-L9Bo4JdeQGRcNI7vACtahdA0LSOrAqb0tPsTMiQn-UM_rUB9YQfxeYQm6OZbL6xN6M3hcK0y6XjW9R9_2x1CBc2XjQkcPFH34DnFplfJLzIorzhPlqiyynwXSNJg%3D%3D)**

name: Team Slotkin
subject: New GOP candidate in our race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=727%2E135344%2EL1JfpA)

Friend --
As you may have seen from the email we sent yesterday (or elsewhere in the news) James Craig -- the former Detroit Police Chief who claims the mantle as the most Trump-aligned Republican -- officially jumped into the race for U.S. Senate in Michigan.
This is another big inflection point in our campaign, and here’s why:
**There is no doubt that this announcement will kick off a bitter and expensive Republican primary as all of the candidates vie for the approval of Donald Trump and the hearts of the GOP base** -- both of whom will play a big hand in determining who the ultimate GOP candidate in this race is.
And while James Craig and former Congressman Mike Rogers, who announced last month, fight each other, we have a chance to define Elissa to Michigan voters before Republicans spend significant money on negative attack ads against us.
That means telling our own positive, affirmative story on TV, digital outlets, and kicking off a robust ground-game. If we have the resources to do it, it could be the very difference in this race.
**But Elissa has never accepted corporate PAC money, which means we rely on the contributions of people chipping in what they can, when they can, to power this campaign and elect a public servant to the Senate.**
Many of those donations come in response to emails like this one. And this new development presents a critical opportunity. So, we are asking:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford directly to her campaign? We are looking for a lot of donations today -- especially today -- in response to this race-altering news.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/925?c0=ebs-em-oct23.0NJIJF&refcode=em231004-1-30&t=2&akid=727%2E135344%2EL1JfpA)**

clean_body: Join the flight to save the Senate and help Jon Tester win his highly competitive election. | | | | If we've learned anything from the past few weeks, it's that Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans are more interested in picking partisan fights than governing for the American people. That's why we must do everything in our power to save the Senate from a MAGA takeover in 2024, and Senator Jon Tester's race in Montana is critical to that effort. = = I've known Jon for years and seen firsthand that he's the right leader for Montana because he always puts Montanans above himself and never fails to deliver results. Now, he's up for re-election in what could be the most competitive race in the country, and we need to have his back. Democrats have what it takes to defeat Mitch McConnell and his MAGA cronies, but with national Republicans already pouring millions of dollars into attack ads against Jon, we can't slow down.Not even for a minute. Jon's campaign is powered by a grassroots movement made up of folks like you and me — not the special interests or super PACs — and he's won three times in a state that's picked a Republican for President seven times in a row. Our whole team was so proud of what we put together, and the response from the public was _incredible._

It’s been a little bit since we released that ad, but the message is still as salient to us today as it was on release day: **freedom isn’t free.**

I know you get a lot of emails and see a lot of ads, so it’s important that we all take a moment to remember what we’re fighting for.

**We can’t take the liberties we have in America for granted, and Hung knows that better than most.**

His family escaped communist tyranny in Vietnam, so when he sees today’s Democrats trying to exert the same kind of control over the American people, he’s not going to take it sitting down.

**Hung didn’t sit on the sidelines for America when he served for 25-years in the U.S. Navy, and he’s not about to now -_and we’re calling you to stand by his side._**

**[Our freedom is too precious to take for granted. clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I remember the day Team Cao released our first ad. Our whole team was so proud of what we put together, and the response from the public was incredible. It’s been a little bit since we released that ad, but the message is still as salient to us today as it was on release day: freedom isn’t free. I know you get a lot of emails and see a lot of ads, so it’s important that we all take a moment to remember what we’re fighting for. We can’t take the liberties we have in America for granted, and Hung knows that better than most. His family escaped communist tyranny in Vietnam, so when he sees today’s Democrats trying to exert the same kind of control over the American people, he’s not going to take it sitting down. Hung didn’t sit on the sidelines for America when he served for 25-years in the U.S. Navy, and he’s not about to now -and we’re calling you to stand by his side. Hung is not the kind to back down from a fight, no matter how tough it may be. He’s given his all for our country before, and that’s not about to change anytime soon. But just like during his time in the Navy, he can’t finish this mission alone. With you by our side, I know we can win this race and take back our country from the radical Left. Thank you, Morgan Digital Director Hung Cao For Virginia | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. Now, he’s running for Senate to defend it from the next generation. Hung Cao came to America with little besides the clothes on his back, and after his 25-year career in the Navy, he’s not done fighting for our future. If you’re on board for our fight for Virginia, Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: Can I tell you a story?

body:
As the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. |
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70934253/430772328/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231004_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE2OGZjOS1kNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-p5mG5XLTSznG7QDqAfCC1I8hmTEPoKcbtfZLhmaa0w=) Hi there, this is Senator Jacky Rosen. Tina asked me to reach out. Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics? While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism is at the very core of my work in the Senate today.** **In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.** Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.** **Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me _2 points down_ in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:** **[If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you — if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love — will you chip in $10 or more today to split between my campaign and Tina Smith’s to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70934255/430772330/-1273059122?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231004_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE2OGZjOS1kNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-p5mG5XLTSznG7QDqAfCC1I8hmTEPoKcbtfZLhmaa0w=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and Tina Smith will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70934257/430772333/-1273059122?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC30_20231004_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGE2OGZjOS1kNTYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-p5mG5XLTSznG7QDqAfCC1I8hmTEPoKcbtfZLhmaa0w=)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)| |
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country.[](http://trk.libertyledger._w6Dmdmd30y3h7og)
__But, in order to keep this curriculum**free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://trk.libertyledger.). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://trk.libertyledger.)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Nick Melvoin
subject: Enough is enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289
body:
Let’s talk about what the House GOP just did.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70934671/430773823/2045957508?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDExMDIzNWItZDY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nz24i1Z4SD3k8jgN4PuD9goQ8aobbRhpK7v8fS_PlvQ=&emci=681aa477-4662-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=d110235b-d662-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10481059)
---

| | Peter, Yesterday, Republican dysfunction resulted in the removal of their own Speaker of the House — a first in our nation's history. For the time being, this move has stopped the House of Representatives from moving forward on any business, leaving Congress unable to address the urgent needs of millions of Americans. This unprecedented move is just the latest in a series of dysfunction and chaos that has defined the current GOP House majority. From the tumultuous Speaker election in January to the debt ceiling standoff in May, all the way to last week's eleventh-hour scramble to keep our government funded and operating — it has been clear for months now that this Republican majority is more focused on their own internal feuds than delivering anything of substance for the American people. As I've talked with voters across CA-30, it's been clear that voters _want_ to count on Congress to lower everyday living costs, enact real plans to combat climate change and work together, regardless of party, to build a better future for our children. Yet Republicans in the House, time and time again, have refused to listen. [**Enough is enough. We all deserve a government that works, and leaders who are interested in leading. I'm running to help restore common-sense leadership to Washington. Can I count on you to donate $10 to help get me there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70934672/430773831/1183499175?refcode=2023-10-04-dysfunction&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d110235b-d662-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDExMDIzNWItZDY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nz24i1Z4SD3k8jgN4PuD9goQ8aobbRhpK7v8fS_PlvQ=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70934673/430773838/1183499175?refcode=2023-10-04-dysfunction&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d110235b-d662-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDExMDIzNWItZDY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nz24i1Z4SD3k8jgN4PuD9goQ8aobbRhpK7v8fS_PlvQ=) We should be better than this. Our district — and this nation — deserve better than this. As a member of Congress, I will always put the needs of my constituents first, never be afraid of taking hard votes, and always approach the job with the seriousness it requires. clean_body: Let’s talk about what the House GOP just did. | | | | Peter, Yesterday, Republican dysfunction resulted in the removal of their own Speaker of the House — a first in our nation's history. For the time being, this move has stopped the House of Representatives from moving forward on any business, leaving Congress unable to address the urgent needs of millions of Americans. This unprecedented move is just the latest in a series of dysfunction and chaos that has defined the current GOP House majority. From the tumultuous Speaker election in January to the debt ceiling standoff in May, all the way to last week's eleventh-hour scramble to keep our government funded and operating — it has been clear for months now that this Republican majority is more focused on their own internal feuds than delivering anything of substance for the American people. As I've talked with voters across CA-30, it's been clear that voters want to count on Congress to lower everyday living costs, enact real plans to combat climate change and work together, regardless of party, to build a better future for our children. Yet Republicans in the House, time and time again, have refused to listen. = = We should be better than this. Our district — and this nation — deserve better than this. As a member of Congress, I will always put the needs of my constituents first, never be afraid of taking hard votes, and always approach the job with the seriousness it requires. That's my commitment to you, and why I'm committed to winning this race and getting to work for CA-30. More soon, Nick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

subject: Poll: The Truth About “Bidenomics”

body:
I want to hear your thoughts on the current state of the economy.
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtzVoH2zdQbBlxah-qt1yjIBAGEmVWCOL0eBxXmcLaQ8uMgxnxB3-Gsl9gvUsD7DE4NDjdHLyesTGr67DQqSFWWE8lJe7zDVH0oYBBGZ9QndUR4wA_OoXYJZuOcv60aOlw4eECHc4960sIk3bHLzQdAxw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Joe Biden and the Democrats’ plan to keep the White House and win back the House majority hinges on them touting the so-called accomplishments and success of their economic policies – dubbed “Bidenomics.”
---
**They are telling Americans “Don’t believe your lying eyes” and that Bidenomics is working, inflation isn’t at record high, and the cost of basic goods isn’t higher.**
---
_In the same breath, they are accusing “extreme MAGA Republicans” like me of being the ones who will ruin the economy._
---
_But a recent CNN poll shows that Americans aren’t falling for these lies and they believe that Bidenomics is destroying our economy:_
---
[](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtzTStaTYareenZPh6cy3yEZWHNMcRu3BF5HScvVmcbH5FWwNE6FadKa-v1FJYHymtQeN4-q33mME87Gw6TWO92ZO-VyNqytL7D_tVtyCy07eEnnkFxxs8ahnxVTrB9-9vwF6LkQ9OazbYSHQKWzRCZ0A%3D%3D)
---
That’s why House Republicans have been working hard to END Bidenomics and this administration's reckless spending.
---
_As we continue fighting against “Bidenomics” I had my team commission this poll so I can hear directly from America First patriots like you to show my Democrat colleagues and the public the**TRUTH**._
---
[**Please take our Official Bidenomics Flash Poll to tell us if “Bidenomics” has worsened or improved the economy and your personal finances.**](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtzFFOy7kaONjsnA50rSIwHfL0jYeY0C2v_CdaEQAxfUdgRAs6Pylyn7ikkuNOHT-vq08C6PS7VE9PhoUD7IiMyVWPHBGc3OxXvwkqFR1LW9cj7qaBJZVcnMrYxTYUXMTE7SINeNypBFC64Q3cRqGcI_w%3D%3D)
---

[WORSENED - WE ARE WORSE OFF WITH “BIDENOMICS” THAN EVER BEFORE](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtzPszjF7ISVcHe7aPUgq2JtUwdDvSVVkVuFTS40LXg3AdEaJuy_16zJZCd5ZW4hP-u4nkLq8dBZDwYbs-UBCjx69ccUjlgKStpT2xS9C-wwUj6Ww0DL4nZow6JSBuz4IU74GbTqsjUQIjh8Yu8x6c_Dg%3D%3D)
---

[IMPROVED - WE ARE DOING BETTER UNDER “BIDENOMICS” THAN EVER BEFORE](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtzXuQ5ip-fVPnCtH0iscY620EfbS5oYuBMrYjcwU8v-roHHmKJkXVaNyudON_fK_48TTV4na4qJVD5oBYgtMK9OBcISIuEdRHHPm098oDw-ME4HwCkkS-YPMgHXc1_IfbMt7z0mqbYqYgaovmGB2fYRA%3D%3D)
---

Polls show that the economy continues to be the most important issue concerning Americans.
---
But rather than address the economic concerns plaguing Americans daily, Biden tells you “Bidenomics is working.”
---
**Newsflash Mr. Biden, your policies, reckless spending, and open borders have led us to an economic cliff –** _“Bidenomics” is not working._****
---
By completing our flash poll, you can help expose the truth about “Bidenomics” to ensure Biden’s plans for re-election and to take back the House majority fail.
---
[**So please, take our Official Bidenomics Flash Poll to tell us if “Bidenomics” has helped or hurt you over the last few years.**](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtz4QAqW32K44-7rtbqEl7oabiwaUEVUW7sF5e371kvUomOKG5dhAhUclsg6SnqmqvTQbihKQRfieY8aFXfOQ_ZLlwvg6crBr8MtoFLL-kkVWBZT9-pWJNVCYMuBEgDnem4XjwrrPtId0p9NVoJ7jqKXQ%3D%3D)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=cb9c59713a3f4c78932c139438d9cd49&_e=leY5F4ILShEQ5U6MvAsW_P12XuwcHy2AT-YjDKITGWGKOpMIaaZcniDkQqldOn8T3GJxyAAAilTn1wfogklbA6Ok7tpjZHk-lIoK2xV5VclIHd032kuAWhz6yHFKn-kT1aK-1Eoprb7Hk30UcEkCbO8Kxdp2zbcvnW0PfbeynAvrnIpcY7kR3AbWwV6O544SzEVSfV8_p8qbU4Fb8VzJ327RNbF6F_Adtzy-gUu3vLcABhQV5l-cMRUZdynRxbSRlKIqsrwfx1s0rjrwhh9a8bcJCbb-KTtJWrjd540tJvj-_UzkHzoEcMKPjRfzgBtzzTLVStfp7CrZqqdC7IUG3O4Rn5bSGAt-NqG4aSs-Gby9Sz85DGT8_FavZKz-fqPWkqwlkpVgu-Bv4Rzjlaz0RCNa1D13nlXuzZZRULPALmuzrFvoUU7WGvVYsrkbdiOdd982I-e0MtVWg_3Xz4ZG9Q%3D%3D)

subject: Issues with King County Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
WAGOP Chairman Jim Walsh urges Sec. of State Steve Hobbs to take action in response to a troubling election computer swap by King County Elections...

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

Communications Director

Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: What issues should Katie and her whiteboard tackle next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)
[**Derek, what industry or person do you think Katie and her whiteboard should oversee or hold accountable next?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-oversight-petition/?source=EMAM04_1_OVR_20231004_V1_F&t=2&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)
[Submit your idea ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-oversight-petition/?source=EMAM04_1_OVR_20231004_V1_F&t=3&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)
Whether it’s a Wall Street executive or gun lobbyist, Katie is willing to call out BS when we see it. She wrote to you yesterday about her passion for good government oversight and how it makes a difference in people’s lives. You can check out that message below.
* * *
When I first ran for Congress in 2018, some political consultants asked me “what I was running on.” They listed a standard set of issues in which I was supposed to choose from—healthcare, LGBTQ+ issues, abortion rights—you get the idea.
**_I’m going to run on good oversight and consumer protection,_ I told them.**
Oversight is often about the gap between what politicians say at a press conference and what actually happens. That means **overseeing the Pentagon** and holding the defense industry accountable when it wastes taxpayer dollars. It means **overseeing my colleagues** when they trade stocks based on what we learn in private briefings. It means **overseeing Big Pharma companies** when they price gouge and mislead patients.
I didn’t think ‘running on oversight’ was a crazy idea. Oversight is a powerful tool, and even before I got to Congress I had seen that firsthand. In 2012, I was appointed by then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris to be California’s Independent Monitor over the Big Banks. She had secured an $18 billion settlement from the banks whose predatory lending practices had caused the 2008 mortgage crisis. **It was my job to oversee and hold the banks’ feet to the fire to make sure California families actually got the money they were owed.**
I’m proud to have made effective oversight one of my priorities in Congress. I even stuck it on my minivan license plate!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231004-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM04_1_OVR_20231004_V1_F&refcode2=30897_3422442_wkOZOU&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)
**Now, I’m taking our fight to the U.S. Senate so I can hold powerful corporations and leaders of both parties to account. But I can’t do this alone.**[**Can you chip in $5 today to help power our campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231004-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM04_1_OVR_20231004_V1_F&refcode2=30897_3422442_wkOZOU&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)
[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231004-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAM04_1_OVR_20231004_V1_F&refcode2=30897_3422442_wkOZOU&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)
Thanks a ton!
KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM04_1_OVR_20231004_V1_F&t=4&refcode2=30897_3422442_wkOZOU&akid=30897%2E3422442%2EwkOZOU)**

body:
Yesterday, I voted with House Democrats to oust Speaker Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70938176/430783676/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmFkNzA5Yy1kYjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11Ts2PycAqWiuzqrv1projm0KBLzH64YlWWhM1vPm9M=)

| Peter,

Yesterday, I voted with House Democrats to oust Speaker Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House.

After Democrats stepped up and worked with Republicans to avert a government shutdown, _**which, by the way, passed thanks to Democrats,**_ Kevin McCarthy went on TV to bash Democrats and then expected us to bail him out and vote for him _**– unbelievable.**_

**This much is clear:** Republicans aren’t united and can’t even agree on keeping the government funded.

**If they can’t keep our country running, they don’t deserve to be in power.**

Republicans are too focused on their infighting and political charades when they should be focused on delivering for the American people, which is why we need to take back the House next year.

[_**This starts with protecting vulnerable seats like mine in PA-07. Can I count on you to contribute anything to fuel my re-election campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70938177/430783677/-1389333689?refcode=BLU-SWC-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmFkNzA5Yy1kYjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11Ts2PycAqWiuzqrv1projm0KBLzH64YlWWhM1vPm9M=)

clean_body: Yesterday, I voted with House Democrats to oust Speaker Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. | = | Peter, Yesterday, I voted with House Democrats to oust Speaker Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House. After Democrats stepped up and worked with Republicans to avert a government shutdown, which, by the way, passed thanks to Democrats, Kevin McCarthy went on TV to bash Democrats and then expected us to bail him out and vote for him – unbelievable. This much is clear: Republicans aren’t united and can’t even agree on keeping the government funded. If they can’t keep our country running, they don’t deserve to be in power. Republicans are too focused on their infighting and political charades when they should be focused on delivering for the American people, which is why we need to take back the House next year. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The entire GOP — from Kevin McCarthy to Matt Gaetz to Donald Trump — has thrown our government into chaos, and the American people are sick of playing their game.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=586%2E791427%2EUOCxk5)
Friends,
Yesterday afternoon, I proudly voted YES to remove Kevin McCarthy as Speaker of the House.
Throughout his short tenure as Speaker, Rep. McCarthy made it his mission to dismantle women’s right to choose, covered up a criminal conspiracy to help Donald Trump, put a halt to any and all progress on combating the climate crisis, and was a threat to our very democracy itself.
He voted to overturn the 2020 election. He voted to overthrow President Biden. And he stood idly by while members of his Party threatened physical violence against other members of Congress.
From the very beginning when he threw me off the House Foreign Affairs Committee and sanctioned racist, bigoted attacks against me, he has been a weak and cowardly politician, one who has routinely put his own self-interest above those of his district, my district, and every other district in the country.
The American people deserve a government that works for them, not right-wing special interest groups and corporate lobbyists. They deserve a functioning House of Representatives, one that is responsive to their needs. And they deserve leaders who put the needs of working people above their own.
Put simply, the entire GOP — from Kevin McCarthy to Matt Gaetz to Donald Trump — has thrown our government into chaos, and the American people are sick of playing their game.
They must be defeated in 2024. Doing so starts with making sure we have the resources required to do so. That’s why I am asking, especially today:
**[Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to support our re-election campaign? The clown show that is the Republican Party must be defeated in 2024, and the only way we can do that is together.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231004-1-t4&t=2&akid=586%2E791427%2EUOCxk5)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

---
****
As always, I remain ready to fight for working people across Minnesota and the entire country, and will work with anyone who does the same.
Kevin McCarthy never showed any interest in doing that.
Thank you for being a part of a movement that does.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | I want to give you the latest. Extreme MAGA Republicans have barreled the People’s House into chaos, crisis and confusion. Who knows how long it will take for them to get their act together. On the other side of the aisle, House Democrats are united and ready to get to work. Peter, I’m humbled by the outpouring of support you’ve shown me today. Now, we have a chance to make a powerful statement. I need your help to prove that Democrats are united and ready to deliver For The People. If just 2 more donors from Cresco split a gift between me and The Collective PAC before midnight, we can build a foundation for victory to reclaim the House. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Hakeem Jeffries and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Keep the faith, Hakeem The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: the promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I’m running to be Florida’s next U.S. Senator — and I hope you’ll give me a moment to share why.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
I was born in Ecuador, and when I was 14, my mother brought my sisters and me to America in search of a better life.
We made a new home in a small, one room apartment in America. My mother worked double shifts as a home health care provider and at night, she took classes to learn English. When I was 15, I started picking up shifts at the local doughnut shop to help us make ends meet.
My mother’s hard work, incredible sacrifices, and relentlessly fierce hope made it possible for me to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress. She taught me that a better education, a better home, and a better future is always possible if we never give up. This is the promise of America.
And that’s why I’m running for Senate. Because Florida deserves better, and we’ve got to fight for it.
Right now, our state is being pushed backward by far-right extremists like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott. He’s targeting the most vulnerable amongst us, dividing our communities, and threatening the American dream. It’s no wonder why a mere 40% of Floridians view him favorably.
With experts saying Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection in 2024, I know that we can defeat him and restore the promise of America — but not without all hands on deck.
So please, will you join the fight for a better future by splitting a donation of $15 between Serve America and my campaign? If we win in Florida, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend our Senate majority. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Thank you for joining me in this fight. I’m so grateful to have you by my side.
Debbie
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Last night’s tragedy at Morgan State University
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Last night, students at Morgan State University in Baltimore, MD gathered to enjoy one of the school’s homecoming traditions—the coronation of Miss and Mr. Morgan State.
This should’ve been a fun night for students to gather and celebrate. Instead, the night ended in tragedy when four students and one other person—all young people aged 18 to 22 years old—were shot. Afterwards, countless college students had guns pointed at them in their dorm rooms by police officers searching for the shooter.
My heart aches for the Morgan State University community. Now, yet even more students in our nation will live with the trauma of experiencing a mass shooting in the place where they live and learn. This is something far too many students in our nation have already experienced.
Young people deserve so much better than this. That’s why I will not rest until our federal leaders take every action necessary to keep guns out of the wrong hands and protect our nation from preventable gun violence.
Please, keep standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231004-1-30&t=1&akid=6682%2E3935704%2E-pihD5)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=6682%2E3935704%2E-pihD5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

subject: better wages, better future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for AG
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70942964/430789903/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI3OGRkNS1kZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3p80LV6ayC5BZo9yZgbKGo7nMROgafMnAI_b1HJ8bAM=&emci=9ebbbc96-c762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=62b78dd5-df62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=10203249) Team, With strikes all over the country, I want to make it clear, as your Attorney General, I will defend unions and hold corporations accountable. Strikes don’t come from nowhere. We need to rebuild the middle class. [_**If you’re with me, chip in $5 or $10 to my campaign for Attorney General here in Pennsylvania →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70942968/430789907/-396087986?refcode=email_100423_Unions&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI3OGRkNS1kZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3p80LV6ayC5BZo9yZgbKGo7nMROgafMnAI_b1HJ8bAM=) I’ve stood with striking workers on picket lines in Pennsylvania before, and I’ll continue to support them for as long as it takes for workers to finally receive their fair share. Because here’s the truth: **PA union workers deserve _a lot_ more than what they’ve been given.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70942972/430789938/-396087986?refcode=email_100423_Unions&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI3OGRkNS1kZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3p80LV6ayC5BZo9yZgbKGo7nMROgafMnAI_b1HJ8bAM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70942974/430789969/-396087986?refcode=email_100423_Unions&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI3OGRkNS1kZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3p80LV6ayC5BZo9yZgbKGo7nMROgafMnAI_b1HJ8bAM=) From the highly visible UAW strike to the unionization efforts we’ve seen at Starbucks stores across the country, hard-working folks are raising their voices to take on corporate greed and demand a real middle-class wage. _And I’m proud to fight with those workers right here in our Commonwealth._ As Pennsylvania’s Attorney General, I’ll roll up my sleeves to take on corporate greed — and I’ll defend the rights of workers to organize their workplace and strike for their fair share. I believe every worker has the right to advocate for better wages, better health care, better conditions, and a better future — and as Attorney General, I’ll always defend the right for workers to organize for what they deserve. That’s exactly why I need your support in this race. **This race is a turning point for labor in our Commonwealth** — so it’s more important than ever to have pro-union advocates in office that aren’t afraid to stand up for Pennsylvania workers. [_**We can’t afford a far-right, anti-labor Attorney General that puts the desires of big businesses over the needs of Pennsylvania workers. Please, chip in today to help me win this race and defend workers in every corner of PA →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70942975/430789997/-396087986?refcode=email_100423_Unions&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI3OGRkNS1kZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3p80LV6ayC5BZo9yZgbKGo7nMROgafMnAI_b1HJ8bAM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70942976/430789999/-396087986?refcode=email_100423_Unions&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI3OGRkNS1kZjYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3p80LV6ayC5BZo9yZgbKGo7nMROgafMnAI_b1HJ8bAM=)

Fellow Conservative,

The same shady anti-Trump Super PAC that spent millions attacking President Trump now has its full attention focused on me.

The _Club for Growth_ just announced they’re **spending an additional $350,000** on malicious attack ads against me. In total, this anti-Trump slush fund has spent over $670,000 attacking my Conservative record.

This is a flashing warning sign that could cost us the Senate Majority if we don’t unite right NOW to counter these lies.

These ads are running right now. Every hour we hesitate is another victory for anti-Trump radicals who want to derail our America First movement.

[**Join the front line of defense by making a critical contribution to our emergency response fund so we have the resources to aggressively push back and go on the offensive.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a819920af4e1697e6376545b4d29e&_e=hDZRdDcRC_-KCCcgXPfS5MQbUZyESM-7FHl9gmfx1XmCUVopDqH0XNIPgl1xAGshHo8NRxNdZcJwX0Kdd4El-Mpt2fth1tV-jqxCll3bhnTOsYLtC3YxRXu8JxK06mCbkUznbhmerVuexNv3cb57rikr2Xi5khtCdK3Ej3TZvrfxIo2A5b1F4B6T6eiojjphLjJ9vvTm374RzYL79FmFxu4vPRkfCdm-rcROf2AT_TvoRWj1HF9YcwO0rXwiOd1-YVLT8eHC3JNLq_ivtaGQ5HoZOkoWyVTySAGH6gN6iIOezzSJuK_CMpc9vVoJtIprRt6E0LauLnKQOvg7_j1_bzeEvP3HujjbHdiyhKTdodYc03FMPeiomb3vN_Qtd9955G8oARVKGFIuKDFfk_ksT4PoJkNg_bZLEesu7uU31dQ%3D)

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

| | _**Pray for the Romeike Family**_ By Sean Feucht
---
| | One of the under-publicized stories unfolding in America right now is the plight of the Romeike family. For those unaware, the Romeike’s are a family of German refugees who for the last 15 years have lived in Tennessee legally under asylum status. The family wanted to give their children a Christian education but were unable to because homeschooling is against German law. They fled Germany to escape persecution. Despite their asylum status being initially accepted, the Biden administration is seeking to have this family deported. The Bible tells us, "Train up a child in the way he should go: and when he is old, he will not depart from it." The Romeikes could not train up their children the way they saw fit in Germany, so they came to America, a country built on religious liberty. If they had come here illegally and espoused anti-American rhetoric, they would be more welcome than they are today. But by seeking to teach their children with a Christian underpinning, and away from the tentacles of the government, the Romeikes are bringing the full force of Joe Biden's Justice Department on themselves. **[FINISH READING ON SUBSTACK → https://seanfeucht.substack.com/p/pray-for-the-romeike-family](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=51f57711841c486581a86c6688fc9f04&_e=9e4st8Apf6LSCDaYfRH6Dgab2RZIx-ybLyjZxPwpKx068a5QfvJnNJFVI-LvVNt1id-zzLcM8O2UttcRyyiBqCRwPPcoh-EwrMkqYzjFDdYxTR1wcgnsR6XSKNvehl_j1C1BAcvBAzntH9vks0se0J03-gSPz7CsZYS8fGy-NrZDw8EwMDkYfgqAAneXVADidBqoerTufSWrK-p4op5-HCJ4RSN1g-RiufGHIN6hLD51NXuhrxjbHw31jZ0c5xTzNhaVlj_0-N4wo_nnQDm-aB8s5ili9ik_lNFrJvpn4pq8HhXdHJ7u-W35D0xw7Mxte9znZDRoQ4PSnlfVoFFKOQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | | | | Pray for the Romeike Family By Sean Feucht | | One of the under-publicized stories unfolding in America right now is the plight of the Romeike family. For those unaware, the Romeike’s are a family of German refugees who for the last 15 years have lived in Tennessee legally under asylum status. The family wanted to give their children a Christian education but were unable to because homeschooling is against German law. They fled Germany to escape persecution. Despite their asylum status being initially accepted, the Biden administration is seeking to have this family deported. The Bible tells us, "Train up a child in the way he should go: and when he is old, he will not depart from it." The Romeikes could not train up their children the way they saw fit in Germany, so they came to America, a country built on religious liberty. If they had come here illegally and espoused anti-American rhetoric, they would be more welcome than they are today. But by seeking to teach their children with a Christian underpinning, and away from the tentacles of the government, the Romeikes are bringing the full force of Joe Biden's Justice Department on themselves. | | | | | International Donors— donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NE Washington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hold The Line. Click to unsubscribe.

name: Jim Marchant
subject: U.S. Taxpayer Dollars: Americans Before Ukrainians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
Stop the grift
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QNgMckv2J0KeSVFnaQRmgHJY7CRgfOCGiAFRchdLA90DIyEE0vf5k2W_bZVMd5G-HbudKeXvzcecVmQzE4vZFmxSSTWP6KN9NbneYl0SIHD0s2SRI7NBtQDnAzVXxO2Co1rVnfnu12-LHVcvF2suSw==&c=0NcvPAVU5STz2qG8Mhace8rF6Xfg3OweT-Th7jXscODp0dCaczroSw==&ch=IKsf9k98P5tCx2WG9Lmjm0bAH0m-_ZM0z3GzBiCxqIaY5PN1cvB5Ew==)
---
| Peter,
---
Senator Lindsey Graham says BORDER SECURITY is dependent upon sending MORE money to Ukraine.
Congress is practically in gridlock over the growing opposition of adding millions more to the billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars funding a forever war in Ukraine.
With good reason! There's an invasion at our southern border, we have 33 trillion in national debt and our military is struggling over equipping service members with uniforms!
Meanwhile, we're learning from genuine reporters that former Democrat elected officials and never-Trump bureaucrats are being paid millions to 'consult' with the Ukrainian government on how to spend U.S. Foreign Aid.

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QNgMckv2J0KeSVFnaQRmgHJY7CRgfOCGiAFRchdLA90DIyEE0vf5kzPhzCfE4JUHXhMsmIhHapReOfcNSEFuqetj-P_7SjeLr6gbJ2BgEsRTAFft4T47w1vKwCxeZOGkhxOwQGoe9oAW45TTZ1gt5G5sbm-KPMqiwuil3VQt2QFWmKewTq8rNjE9SGRgScBcrty4qmbObsGgkK9HzcDOIJARNPu1C-0OuvRqyLvO6Ji7IyIyKnm9HAwZA6F6eEU6wP-snvkQ3OU=&c=0NcvPAVU5STz2qG8Mhace8rF6Xfg3OweT-Th7jXscODp0dCaczroSw==&ch=IKsf9k98P5tCx2WG9Lmjm0bAH0m-_ZM0z3GzBiCxqIaY5PN1cvB5Ew==)
---
Nevadans just saw the highest foreclosure rate in the nation in August, and my incumbent opponent has spent her time repeatedly banging the warmonger drum of Ukraine propaganda to ensure that more of our taxpayer dollars go to a foreign conflict on the other side of the planet!
This is just a mere snapshot of Jacky Rosen's fervor for sending U.S. dollars to Ukraine:
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QNgMckv2J0KeSVFnaQRmgHJY7CRgfOCGiAFRchdLA90DIyEE0vf5kzPhzCfE4JUHRAM8fQICN0Dtq295qnEqyF3kcwuJfELsAHpVCMCRodAtBuTEm8NO47YuLSnzrKReuCQYnwSczyq7JR7IBpG2lRZ7Hpp4IfnMl84lXNWsitalO8EXY-t6acvjjCB4KoKtU8fAzhncZppjDu2PG-RLOrQMV5-utBzY&c=0NcvPAVU5STz2qG8Mhace8rF6Xfg3OweT-Th7jXscODp0dCaczroSw==&ch=IKsf9k98P5tCx2WG9Lmjm0bAH0m-_ZM0z3GzBiCxqIaY5PN1cvB5Ew==)
---
With so many concerns in OUR homeland, one can't help but wonder what a U.S. Senator who repeatedly backs the endless funding for a foreign country gets out of it!
Peter, since my incumbent opponent is so obsessed with Ukraine, let's empower her to become a Senator there and I'll step up to serve YOU.
[Join me in the fight of turning D.C. into a haven of public servants that work for this nation's citizens by backing my campaign with a contribution of any amount today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QNgMckv2J0KeSVFnaQRmgHJY7CRgfOCGiAFRchdLA90DIyEE0vf5kzPhzCfE4JUHRAM8fQICN0Dtq295qnEqyF3kcwuJfELsAHpVCMCRodAtBuTEm8NO47YuLSnzrKReuCQYnwSczyq7JR7IBpG2lRZ7Hpp4IfnMl84lXNWsitalO8EXY-t6acvjjCB4KoKtU8fAzhncZppjDu2PG-RLOrQMV5-utBzY&c=0NcvPAVU5STz2qG8Mhace8rF6Xfg3OweT-Th7jXscODp0dCaczroSw==&ch=IKsf9k98P5tCx2WG9Lmjm0bAH0m-_ZM0z3GzBiCxqIaY5PN1cvB5Ew==)
---

This is just a mere snapshot of Jacky Rosen's fervor for sending U.S. dollars to Ukraine: == With so many concerns in OUR homeland, one can't help but wonder what a U.S. Senator who repeatedly backs the endless funding for a foreign country gets out of it! Peter, since my incumbent opponent is so obsessed with Ukraine, let's empower her to become a Senator there and I'll step up to serve YOU. == | == | == In Liberty, Jim Marchant Candidate for U.S. Senate == | == == == | | Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate | | | | | | | Jim Marchant for US Senate | 848 N Rainbow BLVD #464, Las Vegas, NV 89107 | | Sent by mailto:jim@jimmarchant.com powered by
