name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I just left the courthouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX-NuYHsscFw4NDUTQ5Ie217ihx7kswKGwomaP995SjZ6_eeRu_T2DCPdP3qmT4wgDv5lQEw-YMBDOrw56MZfg-mhH-HrjRNrfacwk8GkL5m_K6-rlQYLI2ZalP4HlwLzhXYi6ZrlJJc1MW9F1rUyksU15a3FuuulRptKxwquHTiUlAPHKTgXIlWcF5XV2i086r2gqsLF5IpvlOs_BTt6D_TsoW5clMoxv6e0rw-Jx0ZHFd024LVTnFBnxuZ2QeWNuBCzpafE8VUXrfoF0srxVvpphAoJUQGx-hG74DX2omG8xYUZ_K4pXAO6GkLTJqXbpPhOm2LQyaNo7N9MWfDbOkWmTRvpXcyxYQxMWkEVzLTcxzJM2nkcDrh4zR8_H3C50ek-dXpx1102hZL7-edxpHWRjPFb3lCdvsfAAD__6vOiys)
---
Friend,
I just left the courthouse for the day for my unjust trial in New York.
The lawsuit was incited by an Attorney General who actively campaigned on a PROMISE to sue me.
Or, as she put it in her own kind and gentle words... _**“we’re gonna definitely sue him. We’re gonna be a real pain in the...” (you know what... I’m not going to say it!)**_
**_Does that sound like someone who’s going to treat me fairly, honorably, and with no bias at all? I don’t think so!_**
Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me – and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man.
_And why do they want to stop me so bad?_
Because they know that I’m on the verge of winning the 2024 election in a landslide and upon taking office, will take away their power and return it to YOU, the American people.
Over the years, these Marxists have tried everything they can to try and take me down. They’ve examined my entire life under a microscope and have found ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to pin me down for, so they’re inventing crimes out of thin air and launching never-ending witch hunts to try and break me.
So, let me say for the millionth time that _NOTHING_ can break me.
**Because I know that I have the backing of millions and millions of American patriots like YOU who refuse to surrender our country to tyranny.**

clean_body: \- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - | | | Friend, I just left the courthouse for the day for my unjust trial in New York. The lawsuit was incited by an Attorney General who actively campaigned on a PROMISE to sue me. Or, as she put it in her own kind and gentle words... “we’re gonna definitely sue him. We’re gonna be a real pain in the...” (you know what... I’m not going to say it!) Does that sound like someone who’s going to treat me fairly, honorably, and with no bias at all? I don’t think so! Politicians, drunk with power, are weaponizing the legal system to try and completely destroy me – and, ultimately, imprison me for the rest of my life as an innocent man. And why do they want to stop me so bad? Because they know that I’m on the verge of winning the 2024 election in a landslide and upon taking office, will take away their power and return it to YOU, the American people. Over the years, these Marxists have tried everything they can to try and take me down. They’ve examined my entire life under a microscope and have found ABSOLUTELY NOTHING to pin me down for, so they’re inventing crimes out of thin air and launching never-ending witch hunts to try and break me. So, let me say for the millionth time that NOTHING can break me. Because I know that I have the backing of millions and millions of American patriots like YOU who refuse to surrender our country to tyranny. | Thank you, | Donald J. subject: The dysfunction is a feature, not a bug

body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84a892f68045/party-12746149?e=a6aa651d40)

---
| |
**Dear Friend** ,
Let’s be clear: right now, the Republican House of Representatives is currently an extremist, leaderless mess. Nick Lalota’s preferred Speaker, Kevin McCarthy, was someone who made excuses for the January 6th attacks and who refused to work with Democrats in any kind of bipartisan way.

Lalota has voted for spending bills that would shred housing subsidies for the poor, drastically cut medical research for cancer, and crush our ability to protect the environment and clean up toxic waste.

And McCarthy lost his leadership position because some lunatics thought he wasn’t going far enough!

We can - we must - do so much better than this. I will work to bring sober, effective representation of Long Island to Congress.

[Please send along a donation to show that we won’t stand for the dysfunction any longer.](https://gaughran2020.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=da1ef5330c259be898aff5d12&id=463811b168&e=a6aa651d40)

Thanks,
Jim

---

Thank you, Peter!

I couldn’t miss the opportunity to send you this quick note after you helped our campaign get across the goal line of our quarterly fundraising deadline over the weekend.

Patriots both in California and across the nation are ready to end the Congressional careers of corrupt far-left politicians like my opponents Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Laphonza Butler, and they’re ready to put Republicans back in charge in the Senate so we can repair our suffering nation.

I’m grateful for your support as we wage this fight.

With another hurdle behind us, we’re now turning our attention to the next one. With several polls that show us leading all Democrats in this race since we launched our campaign, we can’t afford to lose our momentum.

I hope you’ll stick with me and see this through until we’ve achieved victory.

Thanks again,

Eric Early
Republican for Senate

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY
---
Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. | | | Fellow American,

I’m hispanic. I’m a woman. I live in a big city. **According to the Democrats’ playbook, I should be one of them - but I would NEVER sacrifice my family’s values to fit the mainstream media and far Left’s narratives.** I’m proud to be a conservative Latina woman from Miami. In our city, we do things a little differently than in other parts of the country. We value our freedom. We respect our heritage. And we REFUSE to be put into the box Democrats want to shove us into. **I’m defying the odds and sticking to my conservative roots, but that puts a MAJOR target on my back.** The Left is determined to boot me from my seat and replace me with a socialist. _But I’m not about to let them._ **[Will you join me today to help me keep this critical Florida seat RED?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=7d6c72be963f41c88b08bd1169b27e22&_e=zMgZpuCGjFGIZ_Pz1QK8feCAl4-8mDuPOgV5yFefaf114Q_ANI7MrkMIScojbEgbqbVPz8kPOk29OfG3dPdD4kk3qFBEF_-Ai17kp9DIRq1AOvoQBEEgt54OQgVPHcqwmteZUzCYZdV7LJMRUWn95-uaclF9XNRafHSDliy3GEZDu9IvUmulwMfydfETn0Os2NKlUMW_hrDQREnOebHJhgahT7oZfp8y1AuzB79dFZHA10avzNIKLohOVyHex0DXapyvXqxIqo0XaFVkgbAXtpXVy-Eu_F0xAOnkR-abk7__Nexcdw236db-K1RNujl_Kvl4GXEpEcoZHwDdc7cgsYDLXphfm6kNg0UhT_R9uvA%3D)**

name: John Fetterman
subject: Extremism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I won’t let them slow down our fight for working people with this mess.
#
Derek, the last week has been *crazy* -- so let's take a minute to recap.
**First:** Extreme Republicans in the House nearly shut down the government, but Dems came to the rescue + made sure working folks wouldn't get screwed by the GOP's chaos.
**Then:** Those same Republicans pitched a fit and threw out Kevin McCarthy, ensuring that no business can get done until they get their sh*t together.
**Now:** The GOP is... blaming Democrats for their own Chaos Caucus?? 🙄
It's only been a few months and the fringe right has all but derailed our government. It's clear: **We can't trust this Republican Party to fight for working folks.**
**[We're going to keep fighting this BS, but I need you on the team. Can you chip in a donation of any amount today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231004-1?refcode=em20231004-1-8606&refcode2=8606_434096_8b_HU4&akid=8606%2E434096%2E8b_HU4)**

Let's hope that the clown car caucus over in the House GOP gets their act together so we can get back to work soon.
Thank you 🙏
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

clean_body: I won’t let them slow down our fight for working people with this mess. Derek, the last week has been crazy -- so let's take a minute to recap. First: Extreme Republicans in the House nearly shut down the government, but Dems came to the rescue + made sure working folks wouldn't get screwed by the GOP's chaos. Then: Those same Republicans pitched a fit and threw out Kevin McCarthy, ensuring that no business can get done until they get their sht together. Now: The GOP is... blaming Democrats for their own Chaos Caucus?? 🙄 It's only been a few months and the fringe right has all but derailed our government. It's clear: We can't trust this Republican Party to fight for working folks. Let's hope that the clown car caucus over in the House GOP gets their act together so we can get back to work soon. Thank you 🙏 ❤️ John John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

| | Patriot,

As the Radical Democrats are forcing me to stand trial as a completely innocent man, I’ve had to listen to New York’s Democrat Attorney General try and **DEVALUE** my beautiful home of Mar-a-Lago by **_99%_**.
---
_This is nothing more than the continuation of the greatest witch hunt our country has ever seen! _

---
But while the Democrats attempt to strip me of my rights and my properties of their value, I’d like YOU to come see my home for yourself at my next Mar-a-Lago reception to commemorate being nearly **1 YEAR OUT** from the most important election in the history of our country – _**_and I’ll let YOU be the judge of Mar-a-Lago’s value!_**___

---
One lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) will be flown out to attend this special reception at the end of the month – and to really make it special, we’ll even take a picture together and you’ll get a MAGA hat signed by me.

---
Your flight, your hotel, and your tickets to the reception will all be on me...

---
_...All I ask is that you make a contribution of any amount to WIN BACK the White House and SAVE our country in 2024 to be automatically entered to win._

subject: Historic!! Speaker of The House Ousted
body:
Historic!! Speaker of The House Ousted | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6c72c293b3c/conforti-for-congress-8231212?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

For the first time in over 100 years the Speaker of The House has been challenged and ousted from office. This makes Kevin McCarthy the shortest serving Speaker in history.

There is much speculation as to why Rep. Gaetz (R-FL) called for a vote to vacate. Regardless of his reasons, this puts the Republican party in a precarious position. The necessary work that needs to get done for the American people is being delayed.

The good news is we have candidates that are now stepping forward to fill the vacancy left by the recent 216-210 vote. Jim Jordan (R-OH) and Steve Scalise (R-LA) have thrown their hat into the ring for the position. Both are excellent options.

Republicans are getting sidetracked by infighting and are wasting precious time on getting appropriations assigned and bills passed. This party needs to realize who the opposition really is - it is not other Republicans.

When I am in Congress, I will work to bring our party together and get things done for the people of the 6th District, and for all Americans. Help me bring common sense back to Washington DC. Please consider making a contribution to my campaign. No amount is too small.

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=416249650b&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Stay strong!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

| PS: Follow my campaign on [Facebook](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=5bd94f02cc&e=25f4fa3311), [Twitter](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=e5096b9ebd&e=25f4fa3311), and [Instagram](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=77c300fac5&e=25f4fa3311)!

clean_body: Historic!! Speaker of The House Ousted | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, For the first time in over 100 years the Speaker of The House has been challenged and ousted from office. This makes Kevin McCarthy the shortest serving Speaker in history. There is much speculation as to why Rep. Gaetz (R-FL) called for a vote to vacate. Regardless of his reasons, this puts the Republican party in a precarious position. The necessary work that needs to get done for the American people is being delayed. The good news is we have candidates that are now stepping forward to fill the vacancy left by the recent 216-210 vote. Jim Jordan (R-OH) and Steve Scalise (R-LA) have thrown their hat into the ring for the position. Both are excellent options. Republicans are getting sidetracked by infighting and are wasting precious time on getting appropriations assigned and bills passed. This party needs to realize who the opposition really is - it is not other Republicans. When I am in Congress, I will work to bring our party together and get things done for the people of the 6th District, and for all Americans. Help me bring common sense back to Washington DC. Please consider making a contribution to my campaign. No amount is too small. Your support is greatly appreciated. Stay strong! | Thank you, Niki Conforti Candidate Illinois 6th Congressional District | PS: Follow my campaign on , , and ! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Conforti for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | Well, Derek, we successfully averted a government shutdown. There’s no state in the country that would have been hit harder than Virginia during a shutdown – _we have more than 140,000 federal employees working here_. 2,000 TSA agents and air traffic controllers in the state would have been forced to work without pay. Federal workers and servicemembers wouldn’t have received their paychecks. Cancer research would have halted. And the women and children that rely on nutrition assistance were almost left out to dry. We were just hours away from chaos, all because extreme House Republicans prioritize one thing and one thing only: Their own political gain. Meanwhile, State Senator Aaron Rouse, who is __[**running for election in the 22nd District**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70952606/430799948/-1838630480?refcode=mw_em_231004_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjZjNTJhNy1lNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNmG1HrjvxPR_YglwF6cal7wXexg5wlI6mDNRC9ypNI=)**,**__ carried a bill earlier this year that would have given a 30-day stay of eviction for residents who are furloughed by the federal government during a shutdown. Unfortunately, and no surprise here, the Republican controlled House of Delegates killed the bill on arrival. **Republicans aren’t looking out for Virginians. Democrats like Aaron Rouse are.** **__[**If we want Virginians to be protected from Republicans’ reckless and dangerous political games, we need to send Aaron back to the Virginia Senate. Can you chip in anything you can afford to support his campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70952607/430799949/-1838630480?refcode=mw_em_231004_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjZjNTJhNy1lNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNmG1HrjvxPR_YglwF6cal7wXexg5wlI6mDNRC9ypNI=)__** This isn’t the first time, nor the last time, that the GOP will try to force us into a painful, pointless shutdown. Shutdowns have a terrible human cost, one that they blissfully ignore. Aaron is all the proof that we need that Democrats always have the people of the Commonwealth in mind. We need him back in the General Assembly if we want proactive, effective leadership for Virginia. Thank you, Mark ** ** ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70952608/430799950/-1838630480?refcode=mw_em_231004_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjZjNTJhNy1lNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZNmG1HrjvxPR_YglwF6cal7wXexg5wlI6mDNRC9ypNI=)********

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

body:

**From:_[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/15899?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231004-SignTheCard-HillaryEmmyCongrats-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231004-SignTheCard-HillaryEmmyCongrats-ETG-sl1&akid=12172%2E9716520%2EurgmYz)_**

subject: Breaking: Speaker Jim Jordan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Not on our watch.
| Breaking news, team: **This morning, Jim Jordan – one of Donald Trump’s top allies and a leader of the GOP effort to impeach President Biden – announced a bid for Speaker of the House.** If there’s one thing this country cannot afford, it’s Speaker Jim Jordan. **[We’re launching a Stop Jim Jordan Fund to help support his eventual challenger – and we urgently need your help. Please, rush a donation to the Stop Jim Jordan Fund and the Ohio Democrats right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70958782/430808219/-1953624258?refcode=odp_em_231004_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzE1N2I5OS1lYzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFCIIlgm9drDRksQ--jAkDsNQX6SfEu0bkqUokC_8A8=)** We already know what a Jim Jordan Speakership would look like: rampant unnecessary investigations. Attacks on abortion and LGBTQ rights at the federal level. A blanket refusal to deal with disinformation. Attempts to cut social services that Americans rely on every day. **Jim Jordan is wrong for Ohio – and he’s wrong for Speaker.** Now let’s put his Democratic challenger in a position to win next year. ** ** **[Pitch in right now and split a donation between the Stop Jim Jordan Fund and Ohio Democrats, and help directly fund his Democratic challenger and Dems up and down the ballot in Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70958783/430808220/-1953624258?refcode=odp_em_231004_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzE1N2I5OS1lYzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFCIIlgm9drDRksQ--jAkDsNQX6SfEu0bkqUokC_8A8=)** Thank you, Ohio Democrats. | **A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. name: Team Kaiman
subject: Join us: Women for Kaiman Luncheon on October 11th
body:
jonkaiman.com [jonkaiman.com]
Women for Kaiman Fundraiser
Dear Peter,
You are cordially invited to join former Nassau County Executive Laura Curran and our great group of hosts for a fundraising luncheon in Great Neck on Wednesday, October 11th.
Please click here to register today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/womenforkaiman]
With women's rights under attack across the country, it's more important now than ever to gather, organize, and discuss how we can develop solutions from the local level. This event will be a celebration of Long Island's trailblazing women, as well as an enjoyable luncheon and lively political discussion.
We hope to see you there.
Regards,
Team Kaiman
Click here to join us [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/womenforkaiman]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/womenforkaiman [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/womenforkaiman]

clean_body: jonkaiman.com [jonkaiman.com] Women for Kaiman Fundraiser Dear Peter, You are cordially invited to join former Nassau County Executive Laura Curran and our great group of hosts for a fundraising luncheon in Great Neck on Wednesday, October 11th. Please click here to register today! [] With women's rights under attack across the country, it's more important now than ever to gather, organize, and discuss how we can develop solutions from the local level. This event will be a celebration of Long Island's trailblazing women, as well as an enjoyable luncheon and lively political discussion. We hope to see you there. name: Tyler, Team Hawley
subject: Here’s where your $$$ goes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=83db440db8664b5e870fb2437e968b9a&_e=oxxUflHjj-o7HHyuG68MsAwVuePj52TKD0981QB2UweMXfZurBUCIhAgVINq_uEMceNZVKV7TOM_DYJrKsdw8xmUEoh280vobvcDzhTdsRhZ_uAZBhfjSwyx7YmsvJFyQx9Rpw6XtedbsP1YvZmAy5srFZF3HmvX5T1Y9NvjYohG9bs-hZ0IFTrefcv10Reizp_G4_i3N0PpqyZvtoeIOQo0XBaxMj3DDQs3kPGBJg0tDmqv1lFI7c0qjGHxCxNxb4yJjUCaO8HV2AbWhszIRC4MNqrFpr9rbfTpUUhSnRNTwsPj0piruTIXneyR4BbOimST-ChbJDIAOfsxwUkce_omBwFT9ClOfRoS9CeoAxcGL6t-ZdkyAPsypLuSZiB8)
---
Peter, It’s Tyler from Team Josh Hawley.

I want to start out by thanking you for all your generosity. Your support is what will get us past our Democrat challengers to hold onto this seat. We wouldn’t be able to do _anything_ without you.

But I want to make sure you know _exactly_ where your contributions go.

Running a campaign isn’t easy. It takes long hours, manpower, and of course, money.

Your contributions help us get out the word about Josh and his incredible record through voter contact, advertisements, print materials, and more.

_And the more resources we can gain, the more voters we can reach out to to make sure they’re ready to vote for Josh in 2024!_

Now that you know just where your money is going, I hope you can feel confident that every dollar we raise goes directly to taking back the Senate.

**We’re just getting started, and we need your help to finish building our war chest. Please, will you pitch in today and help fuel our fight to send Josh back to the Senate?**
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=83db440db8664b5e870fb2437e968b9a&_e=oxxUflHjj-o7HHyuG68MsAwVuePj52TKD0981QB2UweMXfZurBUCIhAgVINq_uEMz5epmSYcuBhL9N47rRlne-FV7VzdVIHZuSLqeQai4Qg45IEq_BiRbsHq_h-ovARz5XzoANPh7ongXXILiOKAq9t-xEqq_zx0F1RXgju7ORzk5mKbO6g28vziuOHbYg90wa0qkplWudH3O2zmxjeKI1YOpug2N2uE-Ks0-w4Z0bYWpwrwxub-ves9WaWMuDIVjTq3BW6yPWyusYxcpurHLEmHQYrYLQFvY5o5MmJ9PHqQG8c0gOxkgoxzqi-QIx8uzGCl85jz9uKBC6-qo7GsBIeX8gz4Bn6ZMJPfuXeokcYB08eNRYMUODcj89tKkU5gr7at46sqWLL9e_yQTbWC8A%3D%3D)
---
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=83db440db8664b5e870fb2437e968b9a&_e=oxxUflHjj-o7HHyuG68MsAwVuePj52TKD0981QB2UweMXfZurBUCIhAgVINq_uEMceNZVKV7TOM_DYJrKsdw8xmUEoh280vobvcDzhTdsRhZ_uAZBhfjSwyx7YmsvJFyQx9Rpw6XtedbsP1YvZmAy5srFZF3HmvX5T1Y9NvjYohG9bs-hZ0IFTrefcv10Reizp_G4_i3N0PpqyZvtoeIORBMxYzZ1TTcDh5faBJR3bwEdfBiflyta-p3Jpu0RSk9J1cc3Bx5u0CTmPrgf6rDjXkbdusSW0vlwyA1U_QcyFQNI4qPIcyuXm3CC3quaj1XkNzuTnrmZBUi4jjge4CxbOYU305YA85-RH_o_pOJVHzXf4woMheGFpwx1_CsvyRH)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is The ANTICHRIST Among Us? | Tonight @Sheridan.Church
body:
Is The ANTICHRIST Here? So much is happening in our world today that it can be very alarming. A quick glance at current events, political alliances
| | |
---
## Is The ANTICHRIST Here?
---
So much is happening in our world today that it can be very _alarming_. A quick glance at **current events** , **political alliances** and **cultural movements** can make anyone ask the question: _"Are we about to experience the Apocalypse?"_ With the concern of the coming Apocalypse then comes the next question: **"Who is the Antichrist?"** The amazing thing about God is He does not leave us _uniformed_. Through the Scriptures we are given great detail about these things. Tonight, at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.793.1.aa1c74eca2b8afa4ef81583ab923e129) in Tulsa, OK, we will walk through these tough topics as we continue in our series over the **Book of Daniel**. Join me in-person or online at 7pm CT. **Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.794.1.a4b562fd00c152f0d9ea53cc02677cdf)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.795.1.c95ae134fc4f81093e85c58e08084d99)
---
---
## Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.796.1.fc5e78817a0116628b2fa7ddae2c342f)
---
We have a VERY special guest speaker coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.797.1.3ac9efa20d0fe02ec60742440f244f44) that I know will make a huge impact upon you and your family.
I have always been a _major_ sports fan.
One evening, I watched an ESPN 30 for 30 documentary on the great **New York Mets** baseball player **Darryl Strawberry**.
I knew of **Darryl Strawberry's** tremendous career and his unfortunate downfall to drugs later in his career.
What I did not know was how God restored him and called Darryl to the ministry.
Shortly after learning this, I began following **Darryl Strawberry** and his ministry and have been amazed at the preacher he is.
This is why I am excited to invite you to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.798.1.e5b300ecd3e135b32df7dc731e069e28) Tulsa on **Sunday, October 8** to hear **Darryl Strawberry** preach the Gospel!
Service Time: 10am CT
Location: 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.799.1.76b490508ab566993a6b94b98c75e303), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.800.1.ff19b84acdeb7a4fc37cad03ce97782b), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.801.1.bb51d4eec8d922bc5fa070c9b9f7bd8b), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.802.1.30f6d9b27c9b97a7f752e7ce60cc06f2), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.803.1.642c27555fd22b6169cad9496c48afd2), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.804.1.60a6945d84da64909852c2c7ff1bdc2a)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=2231961.805.1.d659143807413233cc4c31608405b653)

name: FROM: RNC Finance, Chairwoman McDaniel, (2) more
subject: Where have you been, Fellow American?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee

name: NRSC
subject: So close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
The numbers don’t lie. To be in the best possible position to take back the Senate, we cannot afford to miss our monthly goals... | Fellow American,

I’ve never been one to back down from a fight.

I’ve been called every name in the books, but that hasn’t tempered my drive to ensure we have fair and LEGAL elections.

Fellow American, I am ready to take on another fight– helping conservatives win back a Senate majority.

Under Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats our nation is falling into disrepair. We need to fight back.

Our conservative movement is building like a storm. With your support, we can show the far Left that we will not bend to their will. [**We will NEVER give up.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aa687e38c8c14e06b9ea8524771b402c&_e=Z6iAGJ0h9b2uK3UcBFDvIo-g3iS4sFq2pBSLvpVcIFL5OXBq9VWdhU4XkQt90ktR4qd-Zkjof-9hWDLCyzrNwQBxdxRTrvUceioRiTryu1FAEHuAQ_8xTNS3IqhwcTw8KcBVWxI41XP9DJEs27bHTOm7_LLzB4inFKYQM-LsB5lgyn5NW5mhKSdGbPhMlfQndljCmv0D3a-gxUlrJD-tozXjLwcFRIm9I97sRApx431O7Fh-nliAWkhS2jlI0d3rwWgiNu091_uPDuDJrlx9nTb1i4s4S6HMeklF9oSEdmIX3NTmshwSInKeD6Ek6i7ljzbOrAL71ne1Zj3ZvFJJWYpIQ7MNgevOXrxQSPNVPomvg4XzozF397vgf6Si603v78rzDsCIHcV1uUB51c6F6B6GaE6rus3ZpH0h6cLWkrhbMTBOSsohhX3QtWhgvZDO)

[**In the next 30 minutes, I am personally asking for your help. Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $24 to help us win back a Senate majority?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=aa687e38c8c14e06b9ea8524771b402c&_e=Z6iAGJ0h9b2uK3UcBFDvIo-g3iS4sFq2pBSLvpVcIFL5OXBq9VWdhU4XkQt90ktR4qd-Zkjof-9hWDLCyzrNwQBxdxRTrvUceioRiTryu1FAEHuAQ_8xTNS3IqhwcTw8KcBVWxI41XP9DJEs27bHTOm7_LLzB4inFKYQM-LsB5lgyn5NW5mhKSdGbPhMlfQndljCmv0D3a-gxUlrJD-tozXjLwcFRIm9I97sRApx431O7Fh-nliAWkhS2jlI0d3rwWgiNu091_uPDuDJrlx9nSPRFfM3NfMPeb8H3jJi5HVFAG1n2wXPER6njR1ji90JOknonMnKQLnYpe8z7V505azBfmZG8qnRTFt5e3o6eR1hBjzzOd5qyiknw6Vissp781xg7JAYiwRPVK15PW6BOCxs4FQ2zfFfTwbLcOTGnLb1tZaJ1NZXyYt8Qg7voykf)

The future of our great nation is in your hands.

Thanks to your support and thousands of grassroots supporters chipping in, we were able to raise hundreds of thousands of dollars online last quarter. But what’s most impressive about that number? On average folks were chipping in **just $20.** That’s huge. That means everyday people are pitching in what they can to support the candidates fighting for working families in every county. While the GOP relies on boatloads of cash from faceless and nameless dark money donors, we’re powered by the $25 David chipped in from Glendale, the $10 Della chipped in from Laveen, the $5 Tracy chipped in from Yuma, and the thousands of other grassroots contributions from supporters in all 50 states who are committed to protecting democracy in our battleground state. **Team, you deserve to know exactly where your contribution is going, so I wanted to share a few of the things we did last month:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70959711/430811665/1298180842?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_202301004_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQzNDBhMGYtZWY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zYrpNROoXZwn9c2ZucXnUT1I8fkvrvhwrMd8mxWujmw=) Your support helped us to connect with and register Latino voters at the El Grito Festival in Phoenix. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70959712/430811666/1298180842?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_202301004_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQzNDBhMGYtZWY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zYrpNROoXZwn9c2ZucXnUT1I8fkvrvhwrMd8mxWujmw=) Your support helped us support #SkoVoteDen in Salt River, registering Native voters and ensuring they have the tools necessary to get out and vote. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70959713/430811667/1298180842?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_202301004_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQzNDBhMGYtZWY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zYrpNROoXZwn9c2ZucXnUT1I8fkvrvhwrMd8mxWujmw=) Your support help us to connect with members of the labor movement in Pima. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70959714/430811668/1298180842?refcode=AU_AZD_CL_GEN_TYE_AC90_202301004_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDQzNDBhMGYtZWY2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zYrpNROoXZwn9c2ZucXnUT1I8fkvrvhwrMd8mxWujmw=) Your support helped us to connect with Arizona State students during welcome week, giving them everything they need to stay engaged and cast their ballot on campus next November. **This is how we’ll win, team — mobilizing voters of all backgrounds across Arizona to take action and giving them the tools and resources they need to make their voices heard at the voting booth.** We truly can’t do this work without your support — our entire team is grateful you’re in this with us. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis —

For more than a week, Matt Gaetz and Kevin McCarthy have been holding up the regular business of governing in Congress while American taxpayers are footing the bill for millions of dollars. And while we’re not mad to see McCarthy ousted as Speaker — who knows how long it will be before the House can elect a new one, and actually get back to work.

The US House of Representatives has devolved into a complete clown parade with the GOP at the helm — while millions of Americans are suffering. As long as the GOP is in control of the house, we will continue to face shutdowns, political stunts, and in-fighting.

We know what we have to do in 2024: take back control of the house by flipping five Congressional seats.

Click here to give to Our Revolution’s 2024 Progressive Power Fund to make sure that we have the resources we need to turn out key voting blocs next November! The GOP had a chance at leadership in the house and it isn’t working out. Next November, we need to oust the likes of George Santos, Lauren Boebert and Majorie Taylor Greene and elect progressives to help create a government that works for all of us.

Election Day may seem far away, but it takes a lot of work to win and we need to start now. Chip in here to help us hire organizers in key districts across the country ahead of 2024. body:
Peter, If you haven't heard the big news yet, let us break it for you. Trump ally J.R Majewski has officially entered the race for OH09 | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8299338?e=0426928d91)

[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=a39e609bbb&e=0426928d91)
**TRUMP ALLY MAJEWSKI LEADING IN EVERY POLL**
Peter,
If you haven't heard the big news yet, let us break it for you. **Trump ally J.R Majewski has officially entered the race for Ohio's 9th Congressional district**. Dubbed as "America's Most Important Battleground District," OH-09 had been a long time Democrat seat. Now, it's a Trump +4 district! [That means it's CRITICAL that we flip this seat!](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=1b45affecf&e=0426928d91)
Thankfully, the early polling shows JR Majewski is leading EVERY poll, but this race is going to be tight! We need every Republican on board to circle the wagons so we can oust the LONGEST serving Democrat member of Congress. [**Can we count on your support to help flip this seat?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=17e274ee88&e=0426928d91)[**
Donate $20.23 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY amount today >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e190ae2273&e=0426928d91)
The hardworking people of Ohio aren’t interested in funding Biden’s radical WOKE agenda. We’re tired of paying high prices at the grocery stores and being overcharged for a gallon of gas just to get to work. We need solutions, not leaders who buckle under pressure.

[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=042da0831e&e=0426928d91)

clean_body: Peter, If you haven't heard the big news yet, let us break it for you. Trump ally J.R Majewski has officially entered the race for OH09 | | | | | TRUMP ALLY MAJEWSKI LEADING IN EVERY POLL Peter, If you haven't heard the big news yet, let us break it for you. Trump ally J.R Majewski has officially entered the race for Ohio's 9th Congressional district. Dubbed as "America's Most Important Battleground District," OH-09 had been a long time Democrat seat. Now, it's a Trump +4 district! Thankfully, the early polling shows JR Majewski is leading EVERY poll, but this race is going to be tight! We need every Republican on board to circle the wagons so we can oust the LONGEST serving Democrat member of Congress. The hardworking people of Ohio aren’t interested in funding Biden’s radical WOKE agenda. We’re tired of paying high prices at the grocery stores and being overcharged for a gallon of gas just to get to work. We need solutions, not leaders who buckle under pressure. JR Majewski Candidate for Congress Ohio CD-09 | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2023 JR for Ohio. All rights reserved.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Thanks in advance for sharing your thoughts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Our campaign is centered around the needs and concerns of the people.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1277%2E35263%2EgsaJDl)
Hi Peter, Meeting folks all across Wisconsin and hearing about their hopes for the future is my favorite part of the job — and it’s one of the most important parts, too. Personally connecting with folks and hearing about the obstacles they experience helps me put faces to the issues I fight for in the Senate, and I carry these stories with me every day. That’s why I’m reaching out today — I wish we could sit down together over a cup of coffee and talk about the issues that matter most to your family. But I figured sending you a quick email to ask for your input would be the next best thing. **[I want to hear from you, Peter: Can you please take our quick October Priorities Survey today? Our campaign is centered around the needs and concerns of the people, so your input is critical.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Oct_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231004_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1277%2E35263%2EgsaJDl)** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Oct_Priorities_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20231004_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1277%2E35263%2EgsaJDl)
---
I can’t thank you enough for being a part of this grassroots team. We’ve got a long road ahead of us to defend Wisconsin and the Senate for Democrats, but with you by my side, I know there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Thanks in advance for sharing your thoughts with me. I’m looking forward to reviewing your response with my team in the coming days!
Onward,
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

Fellow American,

**There's a new daddy in town.**

The U.S. military has one job: _to protect American citizens on our own soil._

It’s not just illegal migrants, human trafficking, and fentanyl pouring through our open border anymore. Now, we have armed cartel gunmen directly invading our homeland.

The cartels may be Mexican President Andrés Manuel López Obrador's sugar daddy now, but as President, I will call the President of Mexico in January 2025 to deliver a clear message that we will support you in decimating the cartels. Military force is both legally and morally justified. Time to end the crisis.

**[Fellow American, we have to use our own military to seal the Swiss cheese of a southern border._Do you agree?_](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9af2dbe3f42142b4b5f7568804e61d40&_e=uqKGUv8Hf68XJlG0iI7ks3Savk5fNuh5B853SYQ6xQ_Y1aUfwm5vpsDe-YAUqn-ww6jw-90WO0EaidsfARV1NnQ5uw22WtovKHiWCPiTvzpCU5BJV8_YEZJF2pFXfTCA19l-zovnZq1OOk2QxzHL4Wkipz4yci6CGzJCrPXAdn2fdHGMMGMEXWjr-4NnwINS64Nzmc7GYmH8g0s5dRzUhF9M1fshr3zcj1dug-ofHwI5L9WO2esNI2Xj-uTOMNYZRy8IpTAg3cvjbj-J8l_yg5td2xIxBH1yRJym6wHxy0OLu19kjJZhuWgKpj2WCsFclbUJVPyPT0ToTDBSCDimC15DMrriFlS_if3cqBodFAi6Zjf7xpQ3gsTNq7Wuifak2R4vJerlbRkcV075cTtQPJ2Chg_LEVwh-08cZ-miCNPQowLS3Gsf8DrzCYVYcoys)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The U.S. military has one job: to protect American citizens on our own soil. | | Fellow American, There's a new daddy in town. The U.S. military has one job: to protect American citizens on our own soil. It’s not just illegal migrants, human trafficking, and fentanyl pouring through our open border anymore. Now, we have armed cartel gunmen directly invading our homeland. The cartels may be Mexican President Andrés Manuel López Obrador's sugar daddy now, but as President, I will call the President of Mexico in January 2025 to deliver a clear message that we will support you in decimating the cartels. name: Michael Bennet
subject: A moment to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_100423_ThankYou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_100423_ThankYou_act]
Friend, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you.
This past weekend, my campaign had a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Because of the generosity of donors like you, we hit our goal.
I was in Washington over the weekend, working hard to avert a government shutdown led by far-right extremists and bad-faith politicians. These are people who are more interested in media attention than helping their constituents at home and supporting democratic allies abroad.
Coloradans don't shut their communities down because of a disagreement, and Congress shouldn't be allowed to do so either. I fought hard to make sure we kept the government open and provided money for our schools, farm programs, and the military.
I also stood my ground when it came to supporting our allies in Ukraine. House Republicans wrote a bill that left out funding for the people of Ukraine. That's unacceptable. What's happening in Ukraine isn’t just a fight for their country, it’s also a fight for democracy around the world.
So, thank you. I'm grateful for your support as we work to elect people who will fight for Colorado, our country, and our allies around the globe.
Together, we can create a better future.
Thank you for being a part of this people-powered campaign, friend.
Onwards,
Michael

clean_body: And Judge Strikes Down State’s Abortion Ballot Language For Being ‘Argumentative’ | | Democratic California Gov. Gavin Newsom signed a bill Monday that will ban school boards from removing books that teach racial or LGBTQ topics in the classroom. | A Missouri judge ruled Monday that Republican Secretary of State Jay Ashcroft’s language for a proposed abortion amendment was “argumentative” and needed to be revised before being placed on the ballot. NARAL Pro-Choice America (NARAL) announced Wednesday that it was changing its name to foster a “more inclusive” environment and reach a larger pool of voters. | You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | Prolife Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Ex-Speaker McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
Yesterday, far-right extremist Matt Gaetz and his allies forced a House vote to remove Kevin McCarthy from the Speakership. In an unprecedented step, all 208 House Democrats and 8 Republicans voted to remove Kevin McCarthy from his position.
This is a confusing time. While Democrats stand united, the GOP continues to stir chaos instead of working for their constituents.
But House Democrats made the right decision yesterday. They voted to remove a speaker who was hours away from causing a government shutdown, risking the benefits so many need to survive, leaving military families and federal employees without paychecks, and causing an economic crisis.
McCarthy proved that he was not fit to be Speaker. He prioritized his own interests and refused to stay true to his word. Now, we are not sure who will become the next speaker, and I won’t attempt to predict what the MAGA House Republicans will do. But what is crystal clear is that Republicans have proven they are irresponsible. They refuse to govern.
So, as we approach 2024, our goal is simple — to unseat every Republican we can and take back the House majority. The American people deserve a Speaker who will bring impactful legislation to the floor, govern with fairness, and not put politics over people.
We have already endorsed 3 House challengers — Will Rollins, Sarah Klee Hood, and Josh Riley. They are our best shot at picking up seats and will help us take back the House majority. But they are going to need our support, so I need to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our movement to elect changemaking Democrats to the House and take back the House majority?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-oct23.m0hNbE&refcode=em231004-1-t45&t=1&akid=4903%2E196590%2E_LUcox)
This fight is much bigger than a single candidate. It is a fight to give the American people the government we deserve.
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-oct23.m0hNbE&refcode=em231004-1-t45&t=2&akid=4903%2E196590%2E_LUcox)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4903%2E196590%2E_LUcox). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=4903%2E196590%2E_LUcox)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4903_196590__LUcox&akid=4903%2E196590%2E_LUcox)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4903%2E196590%2E_LUcox)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: I'm under attack
body:
They don't want you to be a part of the fight
| | [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a5369cccba5f4587a44c798e58ba779c&_e=DwX_26EjHQTGFpUzJhZ5qGD8fjBPXUeG6KOhvOm4iJzot48i8CSkc6ojkKa9qhSsMQOk0QN6ve0GLa_bIFZeABCgPXkkXTVDf9QmPM9R-lSmMweha6UiWYSwGumhqJ0C0qT3zfinzc8iWEzice7g3bg9baw51if3iUtyjFwbGH0FNhdpkhwWhyXP8N1OYio1aijA8pXqE3aPQwvcm7kk9A7K0codqZKPWiNt-de1aXRJZSKk10bxtmRwbrqdptnbLVuKFyYB65ZdK_RkVMhTzkehN2q-BXY9lqyvXAXK1FBHT6RErvNKuUlj2GR_t5VPaD8oC-w98_Gcl5gJZ7oUwQ%3D%3D)

Friend, I need your immediate attention. **I was ATTACKED and BOOED by RINOs** _****_**for asking you to weigh in and contribute to this fight** _**.**_ I will NOT be lectured by Republicans who grovel and bend knee for the lobbyists and special interests who have hollowed out this town and borrowed against the future of our future generations. These lobbyists and special interests own our leadership and HATE that I fund my political operation by asking Patriotic Americans for $10, $20, and $30 at a time. **We 're finally on the verge of ushering in REAL CHANGE to how Washington works, and** [**I 'm asking you to stand with me in this seminal moment.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a5369cccba5f4587a44c798e58ba779c&_e=DwX_26EjHQTGFpUzJhZ5qGD8fjBPXUeG6KOhvOm4iJzot48i8CSkc6ojkKa9qhSsMQOk0QN6ve0GLa_bIFZeABCgPXkkXTVDf9QmPM9R-lSmMweha6UiWYSwGumhqJ0C0qT3zfinzc8iWEzice7g3bg9baw51if3iUtyjFwbGH0FNhdpkhwWhyXP8N1OYio1w3hwSMqBuHR3exx3WJE8wHaE0WLlutCzOo4tQFXRyTfLqIRl1VA8uVF0RehweVI8zYomwifJAOjbDD3AmxPyb3sIlCSgSZ9roMK6BPJ3HbL28k4DgQ2TiDswWFI8f2BbFMSFYQ-uHnhCg8tZo9rJhg%3D%3D)

House Republicans spent the last few days in Washington causing nothing but headaches and chaos for the American people. Here's what they've been up to:
❌ Republicans kicked off their sham impeachment inquiry hearings into President Biden, even though there was zero evidence to support it (And their own key witnesses admitted there was nothing to back it up).
❌ A handful of MAGA extremists in the House tried to hold our government hostage and nearly hurled us into a shutdown by pushing for DRASTIC cuts to vital safety net programs.
❌ Instead of tackling real issues, Republicans wasted time pointing fingers, fighting like school children, and prioritizing Donald Trump’s demands over the American people.
But look, it's not all doom and gloom.
We have a real chance to flip a seat that is KEY to House Republicans’ majority in 2024. Kevin Thomas is running to flip NY-04, and experts are already calling it one of the most competitive House districts in the nation.
We still have a long road ahead, and we want to know where you stand TODAY.

But look, it's not all doom and gloom. We have a real chance to flip a seat that is KEY to House Republicans’ majority in 2024. Kevin Thomas is running to flip NY-04, and experts are already calling it one of the most competitive House districts in the nation. name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Say NO to Trump as Speaker of the House (UPDATE: Trump implies he would take job if offered)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Say NO to Trump as Speaker of the House](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8db0283-8be0-4126-9f19-214eb160a642/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T07c230ff-ca14-4cfc-9ddf-98c1c54ec420/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Within minutes of Kevin McCarthy's ouster, right-wing pundits and lawmakers began pushing a frightening idea for his replacement—Donald Trump. [For real](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td22eac02-2491-469a-a19a-2180876e8044/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Multiple members have already said they will back him. And the idea is gaining momentum. [**Add your name, and join us in saying "HELL NO" to Trump as Speaker!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T023210c5-7f1d-4452-a1b2-acff7c2b417a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Think this sounds far-fetched, or crazy? Consider the following: \- the Constitution does not appear to require that the speaker be a member of the House \- 90% of Republican House members are in districts that Trump won in 2020. Their voters would support this. \- There are reports that Trump is interested, viewing this role as a way to get nonstop media coverage, say whatever he wants to from the House floor, and increase his odds of winning back the presidency. And the vast majority of House Republicans have consistently caved to Trump on everything he wanted. (UPDATE: Trump [implies](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta7f2ddae-f702-4faf-bd87-55fe3347cdcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) he would take job if offered) **We need to stop this momentum NOW.** We need to show there is strong opposition to this terrible idea, and we need to let the vulnerable Republicans members in districts Biden won that we will work especially hard to defeat them if they help make this happen. [**Add your name, and join us in saying "HELL NO" to Trump as Speaker!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te131b8d3-eb24-4b1f-8022-c46d513dfc86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc66a5c28-91f7-4168-b310-64d84defc7e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---

* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9a11b47-88f1-40ec-83bc-0921a5945a82/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Here’s why I’m calling for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Committee:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Republicans are redistricting again.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70961892/430819300/823540626?refcode=ea.1f84fe23-f762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1f84fe23-f762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg0ZmUyMy1mNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HeCU90ZJyH-ZCAKZ9e_qZjv15b3DBs2LdiAbqCuVpTI=&emci=2bf3b078-ea62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1f84fe23-f762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**Peter, GOP leaders in Raleigh are about to start the redistricting process. If this feels like déjà vu to you, it’s because we’ve been here before time and time again.** Republicans have tried over and over to gerrymander our state’s legislative and congressional districts to give their party an unfair advantage. Up until now, the Courts have helped to shape better maps than they would have been. But with a far-right majority now on the state Supreme Court, we can’t predict what the outcome will be — or if the GOP will get their way. **[I’ve called for a Nonpartisan Redistricting Committee before, Peter because I believe that every North Carolina voter deserves to have their voice heard. Sign my petition today if you agree>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70961893/430819301/-310767572?refcode=ea.1f84fe23-f762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1f84fe23-f762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjg0ZmUyMy1mNzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HeCU90ZJyH-ZCAKZ9e_qZjv15b3DBs2LdiAbqCuVpTI=&emci=2bf3b078-ea62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1f84fe23-f762-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** **We all know that North Carolina is a 50-50 state. Under the current congressional maps drawn by the courts, we have seven Republican representatives to Congress, and seven Democrats.** **But under their own state legislative maps, Republicans drew themselves into a one-vote supermajority.** Peter, you deserve to have your vote count as much as any other. clean_body: Republicans are redistricting again. | Peter, GOP leaders in Raleigh are about to start the redistricting process. If this feels like déjà vu to you, it’s because we’ve been here before time and time again. Republicans have tried over and over to gerrymander our state’s legislative and congressional districts to give their party an unfair advantage. Up until now, the Courts have helped to shape better maps than they would have been. But with a far-right majority now on the state Supreme Court, we can’t predict what the outcome will be — or if the GOP will get their way. We all know that North Carolina is a 50-50 state. Under the current congressional maps drawn by the courts, we have seven Republican representatives to Congress, and seven Democrats. But under their own state legislative maps, Republicans drew themselves into a one-vote supermajority. Peter, you deserve to have your vote count as much as any other. Establishing a Nonpartisan Redistricting Commission would ensure that future legislative maps accurately reflect the political reality of our state and fairly represent all our people. | Thank you, Roy Cooper = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. body:
The numbers don’t lie. To be in the best possible position to take back the Senate, we cannot afford to miss our monthly goals... | We **_FAILED_** , Fellow American.

We know so many patriots like you stepped up in the last week to help us get so close to our goal, [**but will YOU help put us over the top and keep our plans in place to retake the Senate from the Biden/Schumer Democrats?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fe5b7d0f4bea4fb4923836cc6a695a1b&_e=gaSa5MOOYomZatHd9SkWI_hmNF26-iX6WpJCOvsLe_SVNMg4JdmlxRB66y0_up8ZOC-Hd9dCGZ1ZDWHAWab7pCMvayaKAe9C__dt0zUBYdm_WVa47xo8CdvJp-oEcORrxyuZz_mc3AjKyKfk1O_BnZrpXM9CCkDQql5A-FcycuwR9BTb5OHDdKKwKNRQr-xhIUvVxUWlin6qFmozZlAcPcFBM2_7z6UPeVXq-RpNvB-_jKWhUcv_abTTlm2ymbq8mj6OR692jZlzm9iY1ElPv2eR_RAUaYZSG8U9HfFnZLfS33xdeCbnphzfdZVR1gCBgWjl3GrIvtXLz1y1qL91j91bKYGQLSUgtW1CJdSOgX90GAzOtnFLkiLLo82usN7-mbzRqq3qyjJUId3ptm_yR7Y0BBAOpWSNCvt41dzFOuZ42tmSOUYSuQq-emFugP0D)

The Senate map is in our favor. Republicans are in the best possible position to take back the Senate, but only if we hit all our goals. There are **23 Democrats** up for reelection compared to **11 Republicans.** The fate of the Republican Party and the Senate shall not be dictated by indifference.

There are 23 Democrats up for reelection compared to 11 Republicans.** The fate of the Republican Party and the Senate shall not be dictated by indifference. We MUST reach our goal to have any chance at flipping the Senate next year, Fellow American Every seat will be a battle and we need to be prepared for the fight. Please let us know that you haven’t given up on winning back a conservative Senate majority. Thanks, Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. We said as soon as our opponents got in that any candidate who can’t definitely say they voted against Kansas’s anti-choice ballot measure was in favor of it—making them dangerously out of step with working Kansans and the majority of Kansas’ Third.

Now one of them has firmly confirmed it to be the case.

We need to keep battle-tested, pro-choice leaders like Sharice in Congress because so many National Republicans have made it clear they’d support a nationwide abortion ban if given the chance.

Anti-choice extremists will stop at nothing to strip us of our freedoms, which is why we’re asking for your help.

clean_body: | We need you to see this: One of our opponents attended a Kansans For Life Political Action Committee event and confirmed any doubts about which way they’d vote on abortion legislation if elected— they made it clear that they’re firmly in the anti-choice camp. | We said as soon as our opponents got in that any candidate who can’t definitely say they voted against Kansas’s anti-choice ballot measure was in favor of it—making them dangerously out of step with working Kansans and the majority of Kansas’ Third. Now one of them has firmly confirmed it to be the case. We need to keep battle-tested, pro-choice leaders like Sharice in Congress because so many National Republicans have made it clear they’d support a nationwide abortion ban if given the chance. Anti-choice extremists will stop at nothing to strip us of our freedoms, which is why we’re asking for your help. — Team Sharice * | = Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. Like you, I have been seeing her all over the news this week.

Unsurprising to anyone who followed my race, Nancy continues to prioritize cable news hits and theatrics over governing. And I care because this does NOTHING to help children in this country.

Nancy, like all of her GOP colleagues, made a lot of promises while she was running for office. And the truth is she’s failed to live up to any of them. Her governing is unserious, erratic and unprincipled. And again, I care about this because our kids are getting left behind while her party controls the House.

Even though I am not running against her anymore, I am doing what I promised when I launched my challenge to her: standing up for our kids in the halls of power.

That’s why I started Their Future PAC — so that our kids always have someone in their corner.

**We can’t win this fight for Their Future without defeating the MAGA wing in Congress who would rather use our kids for their politics than use politics to help our kids. That’s why I am working everyday to elect a Kids First Majority to the House in 2024. To do that, I need your help.

name: Rhena Hicks
subject: Can We Count On Your Support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/FVA-logo-05.png]
Hi Peter,
As we enter October we have another fundraising deadline. Our monthly goal is $1,000 in October. With your donation we will be able to continue our work on behalf of families in the Commonwealth.
Just $5 from you today will get us closer to our goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/freedom-va-general]
Our priorities are clear, we’re fighting to:
*
Lower
prescription
drug
costs
*
Make
housing
more
affordable
*
Create
a
tax
system
that
helps
everyone,
not
just
the
wealthy
*
Protect
public
education
*
Establish
paid
family
and
medical

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70962464/430821621/-1301578774?refcode=BLU-SAN-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDhjOTRmZS1mODYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pHiDjIP_AayqURadcIQCVvgxZAyavyJgv4Eh1a0A1mE=)

| Peter,

Yesterday, I voted to oust Kevin McCarthy as speaker.

His exit is a first in our nation’s history and a resounding affirmation of the Republican party’s dysfunction. Earlier this year, this same party elected McCarthy as Speaker of the House a historic five days and 15 votes later.

Since they retook the majority, they confirmed what Democrats have been saying all along: the Republican party is not fit to govern, and the American people are paying the price.

Our path forward has never been clearer. **We must take back the House majority and get Congress back to working for us. As the chair of BOLD PAC, I’m working to elect progressives across the country next year.** [_**Contributing even $5 to my campaign could help us retake the House and finally address the issues that matter most. name: Team Emerge
subject: Re: the Republican shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
here we go again, Peter 🙄
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70962586/430821873/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1322-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkOGM5NGZlLWY4NjItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EapuwW3N0PO75QsHKln20M5siUVd8gLVgDV7fdZdqZI=)
---
Peter, this is ridiculous.
Once again, Republicans in Congress have shown that they are 100 percent committed to sowing chaos and disarray. Instead of delivering for all Americans, they pushed our government **to the brink of another MAGA-led shutdown.** Now, the most extreme GOP faction has **removed McCarthy as speaker of the House – and set us all up for a replay of the circus we saw this January.**
Make no mistake, what we’re seeing right now is Republicans’ complete failure to lead. Meanwhile, the consequences of these failures continue to directly impact our communities and our most vulnerable neighbors. **We deserve better than this, Peter.**
It’s clearer than ever that we need a bold transformation in politics, not endless delay and distractions from the policies our communities demand. **That means we need Democratic women to lead the way – because Democratic women get things done.**
**That’s why Emerge is doubling down on our efforts to recruit, train, and empower Democratic women to run for office and win in every single state.** Our Emerge alums in Congress, now totaling EIGHT, include Rep. Lucy McBath, Rep. Abigail Spanberger, and Rep. Becca Balint. These champions have been working tirelessly to advance life-changing legislation for millions of Americans.
**From addressing the gun violence epidemic and the mental health crisis to championing reproductive rights and lifesaving health care for all, our Emerge alums know what it means to show up and get to work.**
Right now, Emerge is building a pipeline of bold Democratic women to replace MAGA extremists and the Republican officials who enable them. **We have more than 175 Emerge women on the ballot in November, and we are working to advance more Democratic women to Congress through our 2024 trainings and beyond.**
**Political transformation can’t wait, Peter. Emerge won’t let up our efforts for a minute, but we’re counting on you to be a part of our women-led movement for change.[If you’re able, please consider supporting our work to recruit, train, and empower more Democratic women to lead in 2024 and beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70962587/430821874/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1322-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkOGM5NGZlLWY4NjItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EapuwW3N0PO75QsHKln20M5siUVd8gLVgDV7fdZdqZI=)**
Thank you for being a part of this urgent movement,

Team Emerge

clean_body: here we go again, Peter 🙄 | | | = Peter, this is ridiculous. Once again, Republicans in Congress have shown that they are 100 percent committed to sowing chaos and disarray. Instead of delivering for all Americans, they pushed our government to the brink of another MAGA-led shutdown. Now, the most extreme GOP faction has removed McCarthy as speaker of the House – and set us all up for a replay of the circus we saw this January. Make no mistake, what we’re seeing right now is Republicans’ complete failure to lead. Meanwhile, the consequences of these failures continue to directly impact our communities and our most vulnerable neighbors. We deserve better than this, Peter. It’s clearer than ever that we need a bold transformation in politics, not endless delay and distractions from the policies our communities demand. That means we need Democratic women to lead the way – because Democratic women get things done. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: They want to silence me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Coming into this race as an outsider, I knew that I would be met with opposition and viewed as a threat. It's become clear to me, now more than ever, just how much they view our movement and ideas as a threat to the system.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_t=NEytnARHeyRwymorONpBhIgdZvu5dUhSnLwFZeL3WgAAqYV9IiK6VFs4AW0qR0KWvYuK8yMJBHmmQae64-QGuf-8e14F3a2XwYU4rt78ksk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_t=NEytnARHeyRwymorONpBhIgdZvu5dUhSnLwFZeL3WgAAqYV9IiK6VFs4AW0qR0KWvYuK8yMJBHmmQae64-QGuf-8e14F3a2XwYU4rt78ksk%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0BtcM1iuup-B-SGI-VdYUC9me-t417f2GVezcv6ot8J31yD_cocVdmH1y7y_w9ymMUbxx6TqsOr_qlNxIyALpnq2PBdbdnsonx3nlpqInDCGcvDE-M-ZfYUIHNi1TSXCmkAMtl8jMvcRiykrpT3ONjebbxR4mKP1ak-cJGmCHGn20%3D)
Fellow American,

Coming into this race as an outsider, I knew that I would be met with opposition and viewed as a threat. It's become clear to me, now more than ever, just how much they view our movement as a threat to the system. _This_ is what we are fighting against.

> _**First**_ , the Establishment spread hit pieces and lies about me and what I stand for. A Super PAC even went as far as to suggest their puppet take a “sledgehammer” to me during the debate.
>
> _**Then**_ , their puppets took their shots at me at the first and second debates. They can't stand that I am in this race **_and_** outperforming them.
>
> _**Now**_ , in the spirit of free speech and open debate, I was going to have a healthy sparring with candidate Chris Christie. However, I was threatened to be banned from future official debates if I went forward in simply having a discussion with him.

| [** FIGHT AGAINST THE CULTURE OF FEAR **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0B0o-PV0TPkoiMDLcpoV36eUX8bsA4teUPS-DimeUWjbPF5ztUXtitlgchJlQ5eJVKF0jYA6BW3-O_t14uB6uWMXNM1SD6iPd-mi9zVXUtyEHQ5_cAOfHhqPmIWHnvsG6zxEgvpTp0PitALJ3RwugqeUhodzFHCi3Fmr1KpD_SZxQ%3D)
---

The mega donor plan was to have just one pet candidate take on Trump and now they're losing their minds since that plot failed.

Instead of allowing open dialogue and the airing of ideas to give primary voters a real choice, the Establishment would rather cut backroom deals and offer up phony debates, including candidates with no viable path and questions that no voter would ever ask. The Establishment was hellbent on taking down Trump. Now they're hellbent on propping up their favored puppets.

**_Here's a novel idea_ : stop trying to beat Trump and start standing on your own two feet with a better platform for a more prosperous America. **

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0Br3VR8lm-Cw0IPPGSYDs9fr16kMryjbXVQ1fvv9h4O0u8DFlgqxTEeAQb3ZI8w80gAR28WvgLcIlTmtzqcahfOEl5piVioX2y-ycNE00fJeIFZ6JF03n0BSCMjVNAugfdOiXCLgXPgplTnE-TJ3TMXJ4Vc-BD69bZWAl_Aq2AVUE%3D)
[** Fellow American's Spot in the Revolution **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0BPeLbC0hBz4OzA-2qFJH1vqQRBY5UQe_0G2Z-lVGDckw9zlLLSzOri8dDRlci-7v_nDeOUcatImKvtB26Dcu10UBcDv929w-8yZeFEIydkBVrttgtwJzg8c1AHE_tsGDfzrOT2kb3aV7X7LmBcSMEPC9YMlN3lmWKa0fkjyns8e8%3D)
---

The Establishment operates under a culture of fear. That you won't know any better between what they tell you and what you actively see, an illusion of choice. We won't let them get away with it. **[Fellow American, our revolution will march on and show them we won't be a sponsor of their intimidation- stand with me today.](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0BPo4CExvot_ur8_bwnbghZNxrz7pBxdbsD1ge4gLY-rbqe-YtG9lExXt4aX67edqzeJKcUXvs-iB2IXkitYGR6mjTZbdGJoxJqGlEGUYZAiqkICFENhrR9YJKY4lFWq-pv_Au-ueRX_WVUBN9n-o4X_ynbwYelO4j-BIvkTidroQ%3D)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0BzWt6fhnYHwRFbgoHZsNrHqf-t4HnRUwj9ftXndrg9DidJ83YlCngu1bLHZV3HssitUi1LFap9ENk0FQE_eDAtVmjeh8CcR6_F6rOzGhPSrFs6ZewdT1Hb_DBM1EQEIElXFiszhFesyfmSkCrC50Zp1yYmehK9HysiRlDIYPIgWc%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHALLENGE THE ESTABLISHMENT -> **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=7d580f2488bb4aab836aa750455e6b3d&_e=cuVlzmTE7BDEOW4X_l7OQACPas0nx3v5ijCf1_t6MpoqaFqDjptOMdieaMMG1k-nSRTYbCem8Fb00Vj6UVkJAKV6kdoJs8WBohnP2zfBF5Asf2amw7bDfEq84Y_YQMjfeymbIOShQ14xv-C8D3PlLoGTqfjLy5HHY61BRESqV9L0VIvZsRRQS4leDJLSyDIMnNlbA24A-aYOpnJQ14Hkn3TIVKH2zjvazmiOgk5BnXUFWH94-XXEcOGDCZLtmK0BEEcUx3uy0dL48FTrG9s7VLsGqLiUPGJobrq160owLYk0DHEbUGN_IMbY6OkaitBdgFR31_gYj49nGim_-z4xKVeq8xHNe6IQU9MnklYIEL2Hlc6fhCdMOF64-1QArvN-DNFfiYgkIQduyGrnHifCjQpDNyROc_qh2dLTnJecM4E%3D)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.
