name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: Emailing for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Apologies for being so direct, but we need to pick up the pace.

| Peter — we’re asking you to make a $5 donation today to support Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan. Sometimes people ask me why we ask for the equivalent of a cup of fancy coffee. They question whether small donations actually matter.

They do. It takes a village to get this done, and it’s so important that we maintain a steady pace of support. My Republican opponents are getting a flood of support from National Republican groups who know that their path to control the Senate runs right through Michigan.

With public polling showing our race in a dead heat, we have to be prepared to match our Republican opponent dollar-for-dollar so we can defend this open seat and protect our slim Democratic Senate majority.

We know that $5 may not sound like a lot on its own, but trust us, it all adds up when there are hundreds of people chipping in and showing their support. It’s how we’ve won our past campaigns and it’s how we plan to keep up the momentum to win this race too.

[_**If you are able, will you make a $5 contribution to our campaign for Senate and Fight for Progress today? It’s not as much about how much you give, but how many people are coming together to show their support for Elissa and this campaign.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70963001/430823448/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231004-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMyN2EwOWNkLWY5NjItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=xHRTsiokqV4HTgF9H2OxJLttujXZ0Y8ifORvM4QwzgM=)

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: I want to personally thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter – Last weekend marked the end of another quarter for this campaign, and I want to personally thank you for your support.

I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support from across the 32nd District, throughout Texas, and across the country. Without you, we wouldn’t have gotten this far. Thanks to your generosity my campaign raised over **$350,000** last quarter!

Throughout my career on the frontlines of healthcare, I’ve seen firsthand the impact of bad policy on my patients. I’m running for Congress because I believe every Texan should have equal opportunity to thrive, regardless of race, ethnicity, immigration status, sexual orientation, or gender identity. Your support inspires me. It’s clear that Texans are ready for change.

With every fundraising deadline that passes, I am proud to stand with you. Together, we can make history by electing the first trauma surgeon to Congress. Thanks for your support, and I can’t wait to see where this grassroots team leads us.

Onward!

Dr. Brian Williams

P.S. You can help us get October off to a strong start **[by making a donation of $5 or more >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70963038/430823684/152918570?refcode=em23_231004_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231004_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=29624763-fa62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjk2MjQ3NjMtZmE2Mi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BM06IbStGaL2Q79ETOJ_43rvl0hOYM1LX6QVz0xpzzg=)**

name: Wesley Bell
subject: We cannot continue to let unfit Republican leaders run our country into the ground.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Last night, Kevin McCarthy became the first speaker of the House to be ousted from the role. Not even a year into the Republican House majority, and chaos has already been front and center.

Peter, make no mistake, if we don’t defeat Josh Hawley and expand the Democratic majority in the Senate, we could be looking at our future. **We cannot continue to let unfit Republican leaders run our country into the ground.**

The dysfunction of the Republican Party is exactly why I’m running for Senate. It’s not about us vs. them. It’s about taking action to make our country stronger and more united. It’s about addressing the gun violence epidemic raging our country. It’s about protecting our fundamental rights. And I’m ready to take on the fight ahead, if you’re with me.

[**Help me take on Josh Hawley and his extreme Republican allies who are all too willing to bring dysfunction and destruction to D.C. with a donation of $5 or more today clean_body: McCarthy made his bed, and now he has to lie in it. | | Peter, Throughout my ten months in Congress, I’ve watched Kevin McCarthy enable the extremists in his party. He said whatever he needed to say, cut side deals with extreme MAGA Republicans, and made promises he couldn’t keep just to become Speaker. McCarthy made his bed, and now he has to lie in it. The past few weeks have shown that House Republicans are not capable of governing. After bringing our country dangerously close to a government shutdown, Republicans are once again in shambles as they start the process of picking a new speaker. And meanwhile, all work in the House has been brought to a halt. Peter, the Republican Party is in complete and utter chaos. And the only way to get our country back on track is by electing a Democratic majority in the House of Representatives next year.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for everything, Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . name: Darien Davis, LCV
subject: [DEADLINE]: Demand Cleaner Cars Today
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/dmyWFAp2PRtE/TjdTNG1VQXlvbGN3TGVkdVhrZDhBV1ZuRjU5V0N3ZnlGYitpRlhhcUJoYkY4a2QxWkVCd2ZPaUQzdlZYRTJZQmV6TEQzZC9WbGpIYTJvajkrN2EycjlROW5ReldwMWtOWTY0Y2cyV3NwaG89S0/bWhVTUk2OVBlakkrWGdCTTAyUlpqYkh2T0ZUdGtWNWVyWG5UK2Z0cUJCN0c0M1NsZUZQR0l6WU5uVXFwMUZIVDdGeExGeVZSN0hYTUFkN2N3RWdpaEE9PQS2 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_Rc90Vy~JY/TjdTNG1VQXlvbGN3TGVkdVhrZDhBV1ZuRjU5V0N3ZnlGYitpRlhhcUJoYkY4a2QxWkVCd2ZPaUQzdlZYRTJZQmV6TEQzZC9WbGpIYTJvajkrN2EycjlROW5ReldwMWtOWTY0Y2cyV3NwaG89S0/bWhVTUk2OVBlakkrWGdCTTAyUlpqYkh2T0ZUdGtWNWVyWG5UK2Z0cUJCN0c0M1NsZUZQR0l6WU5uVXFwMUZIVDdGeExGeVZSN0hYTUFkN2N3RWdpaEE9PQS2

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZByRwYzSk/TjdTNG1VQXlvbGN3TGVkdVhrZDhBV1ZuRjU5V0N3ZnlGYitpRlhhcUJoYkY4a2QxWkVCd2ZPaUQzdlZYRTJZQmV6TEQzZC9WbGpIYTJvajkrN2EycjlROW5ReldwMWtOWTY0Y2cyV3NwaG89S0/bWhVTUk2OVBlakkrWGdCTTAyUlpqYkh2T0ZUdGtWNWVyWG5UK2Z0cUJCN0c0M1NsZUZQR0l6WU5uVXFwMUZIVDdGeExGeVZSN0hYTUFkN2N3RWdpaEE9PQS2

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10049367&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDEwNDg3NgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDEwNDg3NgS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10049367&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg0MDEwNDg3NgS2&spReportId=MTg0MDEwNDg3NgS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTwzrGxHg/TjdTNG1VQXlvbGN3TGVkdVhrZDhBV1ZuRjU5V0N3ZnlGYitpRlhhcUJoYkY4a2QxWkVCd2ZPaUQzdlZYRTJZQmV6TEQzZC9WbGpIYTJvajkrN2EycjlROW5ReldwMWtOWTY0Y2cyV3NwaG89S0/bWhVTUk2OVBlakkrWGdCTTAyUlpqYkh2T0ZUdGtWNWVyWG5UK2Z0cUJCN0c0M1NsZUZQR0l6WU5uVXFwMUZIVDdGeExGeVZSN0hYTUFkN2N3RWdpaEE9PQS2 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fe-6gKSG/TjdTNG1VQXlvbGN3TGVkdVhrZDhBV1ZuRjU5V0N3ZnlGYitpRlhhcUJoYkY4a2QxWkVCd2ZPaUQzdlZYRTJZQmV6TEQzZC9WbGpIYTJvajkrN2EycjlROW5ReldwMWtOWTY0Y2cyV3NwaG89S0/

name: Student Debt Alert (via NextGen America)
subject: 🚨 Breaking news for student loan borrowers 🚨
body:
| | This is HUGE, friend. **President Biden just announced an additional $9 billion in student loan relief for 125,000 borrowers!** That brings the number of student loan borrowers whose debt has been completely forgiven by the Biden-Harris Administration to nearly _3.6 million Americans_. And don’t get us wrong, this is amazing news! But we know that there’s so much more that can be done to make higher education accessible to everyone. [Higher education is meant to open doors, not swallow us in debt for the rest of our lives. Will you join us in calling on Congress to step up and help make college more accessible to everyday Americans?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70963311/430824655/-1583304048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjQ0MzI3YS1mYzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tmz8bkW4PQD1Ff4w7vzhjUsErNxGbP6aggGj3fCoLNw=&emci=c651520c-df62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=7b44327a-fc62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) | [Send a message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70963312/430824656/1810985860?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjQ0MzI3YS1mYzYyLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tmz8bkW4PQD1Ff4w7vzhjUsErNxGbP6aggGj3fCoLNw=&emci=c651520c-df62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=7b44327a-fc62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

The opportunities that higher education brings shouldn’t be limited to a select few. We won’t stop fighting until going to college is a future that _everyone_ can choose, no matter where we come from or what’s in our wallets.
Thanks for standing with us, friend,

Friend, After the hottest summer on record, millions of people just protested around the world calling for an end to fossil fuels. While Big Oil and Gas are fighting for more profits, we’re fighting for our lives. I was honored to join movement leaders at the March to End Fossil Fuels, where I highlighted the urgent action that President Biden must take to protect our communities from climate change. **Rep. Pramila Jayapal and I just led 31 of our colleagues in a letter to President Biden urging him to phase out federal fossil fuel production on federal lands and waters by 2030.** Almost a quarter of our country’s greenhouse gas emissions come from federal public lands, so Biden’s swift action on this issue would make a huge difference. **** [**Can you join our call and become a grassroots co-signer of our letter to Biden today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnYVvgpnd53pgmorh7IydO9xf8RRxggICIV3DDToh8IHR5FoOhENohEqFrRAItqjhoFD2aF47VWW1WDEsWnAbppx9x-OP1NrCHcf4ShWZx3y7PU2JbIqeEDIGZGPuppLLvb7U3_Nryj6pJcjSORvAaSees2aAN-bL79iAu3o8vrzEboQfqPbY2DnEVh7L05KyUP1dOxdQq6I_6Q10hT2lUDHxgAPKHhXv_NShI0QX34ipIGD1EDij6eNXiP49ou5_P_ydeNO4yzDjjeqqrV0t3IEnAQb-I0Sy-UsbE3ypN7mwtXYLiCR1omy5OsrXqGuFtk4Lur-sTqeoK7tXw0f7tzGduXasaQQFN8Vx8Mif8IBv0dioeIWllYw9GTjC0S3R08mbKLwdedP4f9Ziuc4WISM5aN_74g1_GpD5-_6ZvK2QLdJ9eaEcBTkFh6Is7YgRzP7s1ZlQ_4s4K3edhgofFpFmhGPxSaOe0Oc0k3CHqi_rskgzQRFOgdkRvjoPcJBnuysYIPjlmKC6KlzzMlDWYKiGFU2PYSqscDscV_k86etQ/405/7-mU3HKWSFqHJfm6SnYU7A/h1/-C7kCodz36ImkhMHB5ZVlaYKGSwGIpGJboH7BEJoKeM) | [SIGN ON TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnYVvgpnd53pgmorh7IydO9xf8RRxggICIV3DDToh8IHR5FoOhENohEqFrRAItqjhoFD2aF47VWW1WDEsWnAbppx9x-OP1NrCHcf4ShWZx3y7PU2JbIqeEDIGZGPuppLLvb7U3_Nryj6pJcjSORvAaSJGsppM_V84TyZl1RPy1r47z9Gsx_JUvscOSjvgCSCnCRQZoSX01Ag-4jCDTWKFzBk4Yd1lsESmfgSYgooo_5-i48EiwQXw4T8F_HtvtpgpUm8mW544-B-f9k3WSBxQXk4gf8gHZXt7cHq0et4J-Xar9_qcjkPbjSAwAg4WvJ7Ro9pJyIrppt393CTD5Bi2qULNcSTymsrjySBSlfsu-E9wKLrkRjp5Qg7u-AdN1ztLspKZNR4m0LbvZb_XigZr2fuOXUm8AOjxPMcfQHU29csARWRn5Xz0xBg6JqZwuyrd65TrB4j3Pk2rPe4jg_UQ_sU9f1qqQFn8x8In8Wphsg8SqfxOhF6BBH1U2PjcrPnzCvvHAFSuYUeoUYuAAlifnfuYOji3LWa8yPSIKPu06rCQ/405/7-mU3HKWSFqHJfm6SnYU7A/h2/mYpza6tPtF_vGvSLCQrCX_3p4zA6HsV5imP-HUjQhtU)

The climate crisis is here now and causing widespread death and destruction. Wildfires and smoke are poisoning our air and forcing people to evacuate. Stronger hurricanes and extreme weather are devastating communities.
The science is abundantly clear: it is time to stop fossil fuel expansion and begin phasing out fossil fuels.
As the world’s top producer of the oil and gas that are driving this crisis, the United States has a particular responsibility to act.
But President Biden has approved a disastrous onslaught of new fossil fuel projects.
[**Sign on today to join our urgent call to President Biden: Phase out federal fossil fuel production on federal lands and waters! We are at a critical moment in history, and we have no time to wait.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnYVvgpnd53pgmorh7IydO9xf8RRxggICIV3DDToh8IHR5FoOhENohEqFrRAItqjhoFD2aF47VWW1WDEsWnAbppx9x-OP1NrCHcf4ShWZx3y7PU2JbIqeEDIGZGPuppLLvb7U3_Nryj6pJcjSORvAaSG-VJF-3WbWfnClq3m444eIINcgrkM3komDbkxMFWuWnh0LArA_vLqb6_0ai-yXhSPxU9iLGCcPrZaifrD36UY7zugZNMJ0Xf_mjgfJmNQt_Ejyy9pyHfiXp0iPIPVUr3DDDv0vpZ7vZdK_dxGCU4vSdEN2kfwfyUo_avO9ggf1Vza4UBlG11M43xkvMlYQSJ6iG7ktKybgXdQTbztjIKNiZOliHlimzuKEwY5gAIkFhqpEtKp0EH_HySDcI5o8lsHAQnI-KwZHgzOiHUjK_eS4m5qgkHHZTKYHt1D22HPvvlH516-j-Lgjv5P3-VcGpS9ONTzchDjFTfkXL905kcabMMgLgSjU7qReSlBGWYhP-oyf3LW1yfjTZbsgtsaWMAwVTK1z8QbQT2_JJXpyy4YQ/405/7-mU3HKWSFqHJfm6SnYU7A/h3/LYGks9r-aCDZXkKJuTHhadpyeVce3zBdH3LdM_pCBcA)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Join Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. In Philadelphia on October 9th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Thank you for signing up to receive the details for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s major announcement on October 9 in Philadelphia, PA, the birthplace of our nation.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Thank you for signing up to receive the details for Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s major announcement on October 9 in Philadelphia, PA, the birthplace of our nation. We are proud to share the official invitation for the event. We hope you will join us. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=2) | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=3 "RSVP") [RSVP](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=3)
---
In his speech on Monday, Mr. Kennedy will lay out a path to the White House that involves a **major shift in American politics**. We invite you to witness history in the making, at the very spot where our founding fathers launched this nation in 1776 with the Declaration of Independence. On Monday, we come together again to reset the course of our nation.
This is an event you won’t want to miss. We hope you will join us. Please RSVP to be there in person.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=4 "RSVP") [RSVP](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=4)
---
If you can’t make the event in-person in Philadelphia, we will be livestreaming the event as well. If you would like to [register for the livestream event](https://www.kennedy24.com/philadelphia?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=5), you can register for that as well.
This is a free event. [Please consider making a donation of $5, $10, or $25 to support our efforts to put on this historic event](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=6).
Best,
Team Kennedy
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=7)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=8) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=9) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=10) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=join_rfk_jr_in_philadelphia_o3&n=11)

name: Michelle at United We Dream Action
subject: What do Texas, Colorado, Wisconsin, and Arizona have in common?
body:
Preparations are underway to head into the 2024 elections strong. | | | **** Peter, United We Dream Action is already gearing up for 2024 in a big way. We’ve been holding listening sessions with voters in Colorado, Texas, Wisconsin, and Arizona. Why? Because our movement is stronger when we take time to learn from each other. Some politicians chose to pit immigrant communities against each other. We want to make space for Black and brown youth to talk about the issues they’re concerned about, and more importantly, be heard. We believe youth should take the lead on creating the change our country desperately needs — and that starts with connecting with these essential voters ahead of the next elections. We’re starting our work early to head into 2024 strong — and that’s only possible with the help of this team. Listening sessions like the ones we’re hosting in Colorado, Texas, Wisconsin, and Arizona are supported by grassroots donations — the ones we get in response to emails just like this one. **So we’re asking, Peter: Can you step up today with a donation of any amount to support UWDA’s work in voter engagement and supporting immigrant communities?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP86DXh3gr-IiJ7vyl6tj2hEiJ9lLAmTKp_JCpch8g2CXUPfND3l1qoJv9OGop9HTaV15lpUB1CJOWt2KWszWgBy_DUDDQquyhkuQjGp8rqFe5-pDa9FFmNuWI8l8YbEjrnML6u_4JJs-F6Xs-_zvw7QwMI1xMR3gUi7qTqC8QKCw5qH_FhyeGbfIdkgdbRgk13GVn72lbcj--sqQEjeUTDwumvoZJ4_TRchrV2gavWP43aAHDQ-ZApEebL85OHwlsAAEYXheiIhv9Pvne4txJbrfG00_uSkJVJAUT6u3IOOA3AgAMusUHkCUJ8t4HZD5o0yg9_MboB9x3wcjxrc790LUmG-Ep3ZExOHECgxIlMkZScEtLqjB709zNub2qb8_a5uPGMlCKd0Uc0_SxB1mw5h391raAO5N_1rCK3YTkwIRbl6KSKr8ATeBLkMHJIdTByHYzTnGBqArOEQbjm5cNx13dzUAeDrueQ2zyqgR6NRw0/405/is_hUI-8T9GlOiQXrHpQeg/h0/N5GVHOqrR3KrjbQjr_pt99takEeXwewuVHSS41Q4YWA)

clean_body: Preparations are underway to head into the 2024 elections strong. | | | ** Peter, United We Dream Action is already gearing up for 2024 in a big way. We’ve been holding listening sessions with voters in Colorado, Texas, Wisconsin, and Arizona. Why? Because our movement is stronger when we take time to learn from each other. Some politicians chose to pit immigrant communities against each other. We want to make space for Black and brown youth to talk about the issues they’re concerned about, and more importantly, be heard. We believe youth should take the lead on creating the change our country desperately needs — and that starts with connecting with these essential voters ahead of the next elections. We’re starting our work early to head into 2024 strong — and that’s only possible with the help of this team. Listening sessions like the ones we’re hosting in Colorado, Texas, Wisconsin, and Arizona are supported by grassroots donations — the ones we get in response to emails just like this one. So we’re asking, Peter: Can you step up today with a donation of any amount to support UWDA’s work in voter engagement and supporting immigrant communities? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for standing with us, Michelle, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10893%2E878179%2ERE4DWN). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10893%2E878179%2ERE4DWN).**

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Fighting in Harrisburg. Fighting Here At Home.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie for Congress
body:
Every week our campaign continues to gain momentum - here's this week's big news! |
---
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6efe0e928dd744058bc3d6e093ccefe1&_e=enAlaWH2ga63CHoIFFzWurfOVtS9l_chUhPvlewFkaAROaC6YMOGfAYs1kG4ABvEBrXVMbFOeyFd7qyg6GiNUo4BqemdnjlMX48k7ZNKqwOMQCPKBWi-50fbXsdP_cRXp1_eC0-blEP3wRwumlNFVC4Iv6gR-7r8NwzdOcV8tckPpGDUJZZ-QsYr9gcQ711NIelG9fUJvoVIMaLoiNQKVRFBSP9XmjFe33w33iupMP-h621AuCJY6P2NnffmbcbHv1qeseW420nAgyekrITwJLGNhUilnmtkrwx2I5zrHuxiHaRxKZru4QQxby-eitZhW-RwwKAuIJmJUuIvfn4k1GBSYmhorSmsGvnO3_5g9YSiIJwxiWIafoyH1tTRqVyFho7W_AaLrq_W55HPuS1EDAPs9mlRyRYUiubFrR0syzp4CdyUCvwzv6tqFDXbYEuf)

_**The Mackenzie Minute**_

* * *
Fellow American,

Last week saw the state House called back into session. That means I was traveling back and forth to Harrisburg, where I continue to fight to bring our shared conservative values to state government, while still working hard on the campaign trail supporting our local candidates, meeting voters, and telling people about my Principles for America plan. Here are just a few things that happened on the campaign trail this week:

• Endorsed by Commissioner Antonio Pineda
• Local Candidate Night in Lehigh County
• Endorsed by Rochelle Pasquariello
• Diwali Bazaar Event

As always, if you need to get in contact with my campaign, please feel free to reach out at (484) 347-8777.

All the Best,
[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6efe0e928dd744058bc3d6e093ccefe1&_e=enAlaWH2ga63CHoIFFzWurfOVtS9l_chUhPvlewFkaAROaC6YMOGfAYs1kG4ABvEBrXVMbFOeyFd7qyg6GiNUo4BqemdnjlMX48k7ZNKqwOMQCPKBWi-50fbXsdP_cRXp1_eC0-blEP3wRwumlNFVC4Iv6gR-7r8NwzdOcV8tckPpGDUJZZ-QsYr9gcQ711NIelG9fUJvoVIMaLoiNQKVRFBSP9XmjFe33w33iupMP-h621AuCJY6P2NnffmbcbHv1qeseW420nAgyekrITwJO-hRRMozxR9YdKGMJXnd8ZvCMAP54gPEzkhSGiUW9hcYwHpb4YGn4e2d7Xt1RRO822Itz7IeiiPGiVpndjrjNDGL9f3BT9cwkZ2u_4yHdjSEtPULXHKyqoIe7rtQDRECDJ_r_mop0GjcbgZMWSqGa7-aZ3Pbf1jdWHJKj0HIAsX)

* * *
**NEWS**
* * *

**Lehigh County Commissioner Antonio Pineda Endorsement**
I am honored to have earned the endorsement of Lehigh County District 1 Commissioner Antonio Pineda who said, “I work hard every day to stand up for Lehigh County taxpayers by bringing our small-government, people-first values to county government. I know Ryan Mackenzie will do the same thing in Congress -- because that's exactly what he's done as State Representative. I know because I've worked side-by-side with him and seen him do it."

* * *
**Local Candidate Night**
It was once again my pleasure to be out in our community promoting our local Republican candidates for this November’s election. This week, I spoke at the Muslim Association of Lehigh Valley’s “Candidate Night” urging people to vote Republican to ensure fiscal discipline, safer streets, stronger schools, and parental rights at every level of government.

* * *
**Carbon County GOP State Committee Member Rochelle Pasquariello Endorsement**
Thank you to Carbon County Republican State Committee Member Rochelle Pasquariello for her endorsement! Rochelle, who has used her position on the State Committee to promote conservative candidates and policies, said simply, “Ryan is the right choice to send to Washington D.C.”

* * *
**Diwali Bazaar Event**
Over the weekend, I had the pleasure of joining one of our many volunteers, Monica Chibber, as we visited voters at the Hindu Temple Society. It was a great event and everyone enjoyed the great food and company.

* * *
Mail-in ballots are going out soon in almost every county! Please help our local candidates by volunteering with any of your local campaigns – to call the mail-in voters they ask you to and “chase” their votes for our Republican team! You can always join our campaign team by visiting [**ryanforpa.com/#volunteer**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6efe0e928dd744058bc3d6e093ccefe1&_e=enAlaWH2ga63CHoIFFzWukYgHTX-r1PeZ3oK2kekM5e8UxNhBg7S4zjPZ8DMOj3W1t2Kz091Tqzabcg6zgp93dPtwdeSZozbydLGQ3Yms4ntRB1dCD75r15YEW5YZL-KVU0qxCVhOMRx0FjgWFMPEE1ER7COSWZidKS2ZUVLdEF_GtLawxwz-Qj0LmvGjpKw7-CpDWR18kI4Eh_qc8hElySzoZZVsUvfIprzCjnGRJY%3D) or donate at [**give.ryanforpa.com.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6efe0e928dd744058bc3d6e093ccefe1&_e=enAlaWH2ga63CHoIFFzWurfOVtS9l_chUhPvlewFkaAROaC6YMOGfAYs1kG4ABvEBrXVMbFOeyFd7qyg6GiNUo4BqemdnjlMX48k7ZNKqwOMQCPKBWi-50fbXsdP_cRXp1_eC0-blEP3wRwumlNFVC4Iv6gR-7r8NwzdOcV8tckPpGDUJZZ-QsYr9gcQ711NIelG9fUJvoVIMaLoiNQKVRFBSP9XmjFe33w33iupMP-h621AuCJY6P2NnffmbcbHv1qeseW420nAgyekrITwJKCRrQr2uyFWmowNX7ZhtE49o_UMxgm_fpvFfx12SiqadBY35HHWBRswShYFIJXzxgKFJY90DQ_PVVN17e606RHSR06NJIsZd-NjpnNAkUL93miLVOmNK7gIWZtkLFIqPhIw7kF08RRyacZVF1YQ0TAXyjD_X3QbVblwhBYnWEsK)

[ **DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=6efe0e928dd744058bc3d6e093ccefe1&_e=enAlaWH2ga63CHoIFFzWurfOVtS9l_chUhPvlewFkaAROaC6YMOGfAYs1kG4ABvEBrXVMbFOeyFd7qyg6GiNUo4BqemdnjlMX48k7ZNKqwOMQCPKBWi-50fbXsdP_cRXp1_eC0-blEP3wRwumlNFVC4Iv6gR-7r8NwzdOcV8tckPpGDUJZZ-QsYr9gcQ711NIelG9fUJvoVIMaLoiNQKVRFBSP9XmjFe33w33iupMP-h621AuCJY6P2NnffmbcbHv1qeseW420nAgyekrITwJDLgcqZV165JY6h35BHvTGqAzd7hc-poDWwHZ3nGhvNL1LPnfimOaFmshAfU6sHmqIrtMJERdV_VHPwCFlaxKgY3tyi8TTJ6agGMm0wzL1SaEaRKYh04A4kWgcHxsChYyG1A6yCS6wPti2-OpYEXVSqvYQmPWdGIZZAx8GYQjXs3)

October 4th, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio **Happy Wednesday!**
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Republican leaders, supporters celebrate grand opening of Dolan For Ohio campaign headquarters in Central Ohio.

2. Matt Dolan slams Sherrod Brown for embracing prosecutor candidate who wants to defund Ohio police.

3. Matt Dolan discusses record of balancing budgets, reducing government spending with media in Muskingum County.

---
# Get up to speed...
---
|
---
Republican leaders, supporters celebrate grand opening of Dolan For Ohio campaign headquarters in Central Ohio.
* Matt Dolan joined supporters and GOP leaders from Delaware, Licking, Franklin and Union counties to celebrate the grand opening of his Central Ohio campaign headquarters.

* The new headquarters, located on Chatham Lane in Columbus, will provide a place where volunteers and supporters can organize before door-knocking, phone-banking and interacting with voters.

* So far, the campaign has knocked on nearly 20,000 doors and has earned more than 200 endorsements statewide, ranging from mayors, commissioners, sheriffs and state legislators.

* Yard signs are now available! If you’d like a yard sign or are looking for more information about where you can help, check out the [Dolan For Ohio website.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=698ce65f93ac4bc4b7e78b59ed265502&_e=grjEDkOX5PiE5l1PSAq5GcNX08aRQRAt9Zth_TpeGHTOPg-S4x8GtGYZGwoayVETBmoCiaKcL0yligbtJo3zptCao-yhrgNVhwloTHzDi5Ed-R-Nc7IgUx7mR_fhZYaeBUnwK1bFUrdkZHI9FjcTP7l6mjM0-L9Tb5h1s2870C_MPOEn0gvTzJDTUKlL8guHPjAXpo6ul1ZLwwD8iL-3tg%3D%3D)

**
Matt Dolan slams Sherrod Brown for embracing prosecutor candidate who wants to defund
Ohio police.
**
* Matt Dolan slammed Sherrod Brown over remarks he made in 2020 praising an Ohio prosecutor candidate who advocated for defunding the police.

* The Washington Free Beacon broke the story that revealed Brown’s remarks that were supportive of slashing funding for local law enforcement, pulling cops from schools and ending cash bail. Brown has also said that [police officers reinforce “institutionalized racism” in America.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=698ce65f93ac4bc4b7e78b59ed265502&_e=grjEDkOX5PiE5l1PSAq5GTKTxXltl8HEy-CzS6SCMvg3kk_qJdAnKW478RCWV8rJIXkZgrLAaMB9q2BjFiR85hBao6YnZMZPdyqes9gU_bUTKsE--uDLa1omn2dMuNW5pkt-EpR27JxndXW6LklAeDWEbIeP3XqQAGYLDmveahBWGPChgdoailqUMEVBW7zoBXWtxQKkryxXyhqzGsRVlin0XUpPpB9NFR3AhLjyadbnsGJg08fRxq5PnIFQxQ2t_bjeq369UE7a9qTodGX_b0t2Ayq34ZSp5uV-Bq0DxarL1qijcgOHN37evrYTAgLq_76ToALPNfTtn7b6Avava2BhjQzHG6LfFWZbtC4a5xw%3D)

* Matt Dolan denounced Brown for promoting shameful policies that will “place the safety and security of every Ohioan at risk.”

Matt Dolan discusses record of balancing budgets, reducing government spending with media in Muskingum County.
* Prior to speaking at the First Annual Muskingum County Republican Party Hog Roast, [Matt Dolan sat down with WHIZ in Zanesville](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=698ce65f93ac4bc4b7e78b59ed265502&_e=grjEDkOX5PiE5l1PSAq5GVYlGK0ChWkggW6ZXhqISwFJl89knKb28408J9hjhFsXcC7NgBdkVbhhjJ7nl252DlWgiJkOBryK1LbSX-O5vF8O73Tf1091ISmay2c2cHXHlIU8nJDLJGi2WieSw5KKjEPlIXT1hvhhbKVVpqtNvhScxfBRD2EWc_3H9BpKecifMRla7UXn6BKqnCqtIIo941En4enwJgyF4HuN_ZWZwgEYBumZtR76DNy_J8Z5tLrsUKOOD8xlMbWe8-mRC9is5g%3D%3D) to discuss his record of securing conservative policy results.

* He emphasized the need for the country to curb inflation in order to lighten the cost burdens on hardworking Ohio families. As chair of the Ohio Senate Finance Committee, Dolan authored what has been widely called “the most conservative budget in Ohio history.”

* He also discussed his recent trip to the southern border, where the migrant crisis is causing massive – even fatal – harm to Americans, especially here in Ohio. “There is a problem and we’re feeling it here in Ohio,” he said. “Overdose deaths are up and it’s from fentanyl coming from the southern border.”

clean_body: | | | October 4th, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio Happy Wednesday! | Three Things to Know This Week: 1. Republican leaders, supporters celebrate grand opening of Dolan For Ohio campaign headquarters in Central Ohio. 2. Matt Dolan slams Sherrod Brown for embracing prosecutor candidate who wants to defund Ohio police. 3. Matt Dolan discusses record of balancing budgets, reducing government spending with media in Muskingum County. Get up to speed... | Republican leaders, supporters celebrate grand opening of Dolan For Ohio campaign headquarters in Central Ohio. Matt Dolan joined supporters and GOP leaders from Delaware, Licking, Franklin and Union counties to celebrate the grand opening of his Central Ohio campaign headquarters. The new headquarters, located on Chatham Lane in Columbus, will provide a place where volunteers and supporters can organize before door-knocking, phone-banking and interacting with voters. So far, the campaign has knocked on nearly 20,000 doors and has earned more than 200 endorsements statewide, ranging from mayors, commissioners, sheriffs and state legislators. Yard signs are now available! If you’d like a yard sign or are looking for more information about where you can help, check out the | | | | | | | | | Matt Dolan slams Sherrod Brown for embracing prosecutor candidate who wants to defund Ohio police. Matt Dolan slammed Sherrod Brown over remarks he made in 2020 praising an Ohio prosecutor candidate who advocated for defunding the police. The Washington Free Beacon broke the story that revealed Brown’s remarks that were supportive of slashing funding for local law enforcement, pulling cops from schools and ending cash bail. Brown has also said that Matt Dolan denounced Brown for promoting shameful policies that will “place the safety and security of every Ohioan at risk.” | | | | | | | Matt Dolan discusses record of balancing budgets, reducing government spending with media in Muskingum County. Prior to speaking at the First Annual Muskingum County Republican Party Hog Roast, to discuss his record of securing conservative policy results. He emphasized the need for the country to curb inflation in order to lighten the cost burdens on hardworking Ohio families. As chair of the Ohio Senate Finance Committee, Dolan authored what has been widely called “the most conservative budget in Ohio history.” He also discussed his recent trip to the southern border, where the migrant crisis is causing massive – even fatal – harm to Americans, especially here in Ohio. “There is a problem and we’re feeling it here in Ohio,” he said. “Overdose deaths are up and it’s from fentanyl coming from the southern border.” | | | From the Trail | | | | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio! | | | Forward this email to a friend! Visit DolanforOhio.com for more information on Matt Dolan’s campaign. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70964032/430827211/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20231004_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjJlOWRlYWQtMDA2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ikFY1Yw6YYBMwxVKT1N44ryBnRWZ7vf_PFEp6tZWeLU=)
---
Peter, You probably heard by now that Speaker Kevin McCarthy was fired yesterday on a vote of 216-210, the first time that has happened in our country’s history. **Republicans are in disarray — they can’t control the far-right arm of their party, and it’s getting bigger every day. ** It’s terrifying that the extremists in the House are holding our government hostage, and now it’s not clear what’s going to happen next. The only thing that is clear is this: Republicans have proven they’re not fit to hold the majority. It’s time we kick them out. Peter, instead of doing their jobs to protect our democracy, House Republicans are using the Oversight Committee for political purposes—attacking Joe Biden to help reelect indicted former president Donald Trump.
But along with my Democratic colleagues, we’re calling out their games.
**That’s why I used my time during the first impeachment hearing to make a simple request:** please raise your hand if you believe both Hunter Biden AND Donald Trump should be held accountable if they’re found guilty by a jury of their peers.
**Unsurprisingly, every single Democrat raised their hands and ZERO Republicans raised theirs. That’s because for Republicans, this isn’t about accountability—it’s about politics.**

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

**Given the results of the midterm elections, we are curious to know what you think about the 2024 Presidential Election.** [**_What do you think - will our next president be a Republican?_**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=535885cfc5384a6b8f725bc251078443&_e=fG_Qi8EdjaTU6KBuB5jH80KMOF_t_nznBQ8tcGaeqCsF-1M17JQXnRQx990RCt6ozzlAfZvgBIXp7VXr0q_SsAOBlKwRrdIIl_cBv3ltAY54ni5IvHNtoFJJks33HS3lx7HpSNm4saPEWFat-0suOtzscIeSjyul0-G-9Nbd-94EE95qX8GJ5PyiIj9j2YyMTd_KMf2FZ0UgCGOWq9mcJg2g0Buwh1OfsG_nCcpsg-wM2xcUlizII94Fd-uoVDiP1_Cnutz-DsvfSommiaMie4fZWe3hGy8RolQNrfF95KDMNBg3WC8gUjTFx-DSj19szXhebDvJIfeUeC_GL5uxpBnpdGngq3hWwVP_HnCi7wVlCAy8432QSjOA4AsPaBoWAnmZaFsHV98rhVOY13b0tP65Fu36hLtgLHE0nU6TvtKK3x-SsKw17fR8eTfj9H6vCGuKIBwtRYpi7McXw-BdUrEE-WVaRjsHX-8nDhdYK5dkHrscE1puOkDP6HX68j8d) | [ **YES, WE WILL HAVE A REPUBLICAN PRESIDENT** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=535885cfc5384a6b8f725bc251078443&_e=fG_Qi8EdjaTU6KBuB5jH80KMOF_t_nznBQ8tcGaeqCsF-1M17JQXnRQx990RCt6ozzlAfZvgBIXp7VXr0q_SsAOBlKwRrdIIl_cBv3ltAY54ni5IvHNtoFJJks33HS3lx7HpSNm4saPEWFat-0suOtzscIeSjyul0-G-9Nbd-94EE95qX8GJ5PyiIj9j2YyMTd_KMf2FZ0UgCGOWq9mcJg2g0Buwh1OfsG_nCcpsg-wM2xcUlizII94Fd-uoVDiP1_Cnutz-DsvfSommiaMie4fZWe3hGy8RolQNrfF95KDMNBg3WC8gUjTFx-DSj19szXhebDvJIfeUeC_GL5uxpBnpdGngq3hWwVP_HnCi7wUgVAcNwb-XU45C-Rw-_myWQq4YMlJiz2oaBsdgzi0FXzY-aurgrS04y9yz0CINDppK_SuWCTN3Rj9fr_1T4PnF1ZTQRVXJQEndVNJTpNtNfajRfVEHqki6tGZdKitFKivAUMMYKBS5TM1EAzz_5ozH)

[ **NO, DEMOCRATS WILL STAY IN OFFICE** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=535885cfc5384a6b8f725bc251078443&_e=fG_Qi8EdjaTU6KBuB5jH80KMOF_t_nznBQ8tcGaeqCsF-1M17JQXnRQx990RCt6ozzlAfZvgBIXp7VXr0q_SsAOBlKwRrdIIl_cBv3ltAY54ni5IvHNtoFJJks33HS3lx7HpSNm4saPEWFat-0suOtzscIeSjyul0-G-9Nbd-94EE95qX8GJ5PyiIj9j2YyMTd_KMf2FZ0UgCGOWq9mcJg2g0Buwh1OfsG_nCcpsg-wM2xcUlizII94Fd-uoVDiP1_Cnutz-DsvfSommiaMie4fZWe3hGy8RolQNrfF95KDMNBg3WC8gUjTFx-DSj19szXhebDvJIfeUeC_GL5uxpBnpdGngq3hWwVP_HnCi7wX1oExa53suLbDFSzRALROWU85uSAsotHda94_Z9xxTmc_3U4SEjsDYHOCZtb8ii6YSQNaWBOk9UNfH339edvCxPVVjBPFBh-rZ31TLD3b5lXZL9ECNJrr2_5lhJws5e4-7Z5-1LNCy8Rt63x0lxwW0)

body:
77% of Americans, including 69% of Democrats, are questioning Joe Biden's ability. | | | | | [](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=62bdc4a5b5&e=9a598fbc14)

_Our mission is to spread love and enthusiasm for Joe Biden across America. But if you’d prefer not to hear from us, you can _[_**unsubscribe here**_](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=c3e7b65f9e&e=9a598fbc14&c=a74343996f) _._
Peter - An AP-NORC Poll paints a daunting picture: 77% of our fellow Americans, including a heartbreaking 69% of our Democratic family, are questioning Joe Biden's ability to steer us for another term due to his age.
But only 28% of Republicans cast doubt on Trump's capability. Let that sink in.
Envision this chilling scenario: A showdown—Biden versus Trump, once more. Trump's army, impassioned and relentless, while Democrats, paralyzed by doubt, remain silent.
This silence could thrust Trump back into power, shaping America from January 2025 to January 2029
We can't—no, we WON'T—let this potential reality happen.
[**Your immediate contribution is not just wanted; it's desperately needed. Please, Peter, can you make an urgent donation right now to create an wave of grassroots enthusiasm for Joe Biden?**](https://weloveyoujoe.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=848bb045aea47ef3366ff1c66&id=2d4ce6489b&e=9a598fbc14)

name: Mayra Flores
subject: I am praying for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
I am praying with you

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=7ff3ed2cc0564393ac5dde2a7a0eed43&_e=ua35EEQIcfzO2oTCH4kdeNo9pO_ksHBzmq2YkXI30SyfKTtDvi9AXMavl4kTNUQKwsLnmcCwYenXDttXIjSUJ1wUOIQn7MXb_LfpKbDho1W4N8oEPP4j06zGH6R79zP_AevVeOihiQ8PjgWKrqTsuEGgGdEbFVhWIM974-r04knsjQ_tMt38eDJW0DLB213JWbt8AYcgsh-48gLSujJzNKTxE7SnhN91VrO718RpxmEV3JXRo-OlIdFP3fo5WD00Hd3lkf_v0hFv7mUvx7PZSrUsJRjDvr69dYUKqplvorsYARYr76uW_te4T_i2r-wy6QNvk0GYzjyCItgH6g6x1bUivh9MbycqflJY36zUMA6Zf8Ih47ZS6Up_6A6qHUshOy576sih--ukH8qKfilklxdby7R0WULMCOuzaRv2judw8reTYoqitd7GJKk8FPC4)
---

**Friend, **

To get America back on its feet- we must first get down on our knees.

As a wife, a mother, and a Child of God- prayer is the centerpiece of my life.

Today I prayed for the health of my children & the safety of my husband who is a Border Patrol Agent.

I also prayed for the courage & strength to do something I struggle at- asking others for help.

So here goes nothing...

My name is Mayra Flores & I'm a Christian conservative running for Congress in one of the toughest races in America.

I believe that a nation that prays together, stays together & that creates huge problems for Democrats.

Their power & their party relies on dividing the nation & pinning God's Children against one another.

And now Joe Biden & the liberal elite are spending millions to shut me UP & shut my campaign DOWN.

After years of dividing our nation by the color of our skin, gender, and our economic status, they know they can't suffer another humiliating defeat by someone like me who uses God's guiding hand to bring people together & mend that divide.

They have endless resources & a grocery list of millionaires to put this race out of our reach.

name: Ruth A., Brandon Presley for Governor
subject: We’re knocking on door and calling voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
My team has talked to countless voters in every corner of the state. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70965174/430830899/17860314?refcode=ea.15b88320-0363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.15b88320-0363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTViODgzMjAtMDM2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iI-Wmy70-LsUI_CYZjqCmMS3dbkLsk5L0eFBr7V_Uxg=)
---
Hi Peter, My name is Ruth — and I’m writing to you today as a Brandon Presley for Governor field volunteer from Jackson County. Our team has knocked on thousands of doors and talked to countless voters ahead of Election Day in November. And our work is paying off: Recent polls show this race VIRTUALLY TIED, 48% to 47%. **But with just 34 days until voters cast their ballots, we can’t take any days off.** [Will you fund our work to speak with voters across Mississippi by chipping in right now? Any amount makes a major difference ahead of our final public deadline at the end of October.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70965176/430830901/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.15b88320-0363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.15b88320-0363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTViODgzMjAtMDM2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iI-Wmy70-LsUI_CYZjqCmMS3dbkLsk5L0eFBr7V_Uxg=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70965178/430830903/-935144756?amount=25&refcode=ea.15b88320-0363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.15b88320-0363-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTViODgzMjAtMDM2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iI-Wmy70-LsUI_CYZjqCmMS3dbkLsk5L0eFBr7V_Uxg=)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: Student loan repayments are beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Roughly 28 million borrowers owe roughly more that $1 trillion in student loans.
#
Peter,
After a three-year hiatus, student loan payments are set to resume this month.
Millions of working people of all ages are now thrust into the crushing decision of paying back these insurmountable debts or paying for their utilities, groceries, rent, and more.
Student loan debt should not exist, Peter. But as long as it does, we must continue to show up for the people and work to provide crucial student debt relief to those who need it most.
**[If you stand with our fight for true economic, social, gender, and racial justice, please add your name to our petition to call on Congress to prioritize fighting for student debt relief immediately.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20231004_we_need_student_debt_relief/?source=em20231004-3002&t=1&akid=3002%2E420207%2Eeg7hKL)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20231004_we_need_student_debt_relief/?source=em20231004-3002&t=2&akid=3002%2E420207%2Eeg7hKL)**
Roughly 28 million borrowers owe roughly more that $1 trillion in student loans, and this return of monthly payments is sure to hurt Americans who are already struggling to make ends meet.
In June, Pramila introduced the College for All Act to address the root cause of the student debt crisis by eliminating tuition and fees for most families at a four year college while making community colleges free. Pramila, and many progressive leaders recognize the necessity of higher education to pursue economic freedom, and our work cannot stop here.
Pramila is not backing down from the fight for true economic justice and student debt relief. **[If you’re on our side, please add your name to our petition and amplify our call for immediate student debt relief.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20231004_we_need_student_debt_relief/?source=em20231004-3002&t=3&akid=3002%2E420207%2Eeg7hKL)**
Together,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231004-3002-footer&t=4&refcode2=3002_420207_eg7hKL&akid=3002%2E420207%2Eeg7hKL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=3002%2E420207%2Eeg7hKL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3002%2E420207%2Eeg7hKL)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: Our wave of fair maps victories make one thing clear:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

**It’s clear, team: America is at a moment of reckoning for partisan gerrymandering.** ✅ Ahead of the 2022 election, our efforts helped secure the fairest congressional maps in a generation, according to the _New York Times_.

✅ Our work has helped elect fair maps leaders and defeat election deniers across the country in states like Arizona, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and others.

✅ In June, our movement won a major victory at the Supreme Court with a ruling that upheld the Voting Rights Act and ordered Alabama to redraw its racially discriminatory maps. [**_But these wins don’t mark the end of redistricting – instead, they mark the start of the next chapter in the fight for fair maps. Kansas City Star: KS Legislature gives platform to election misinformation
Friend,

Extremist Republicans in Kansas gave the Big Lie and conspiracy theories a public platform last week - _at the expense of taxpayers._

The Kansas State Legislature spent thousands of dollars last week on a committee meeting that falsely promoted misinformation and false claims of election fraud.

The committee invited so-called witnesses that looked more like conspiracy theorists - including Clint Curtis, who has claimed for decades that he was hired to rig the 2000 election in Florida. _How reliable._

**Missing from the committee’s witness list though? Election administrators.**

One KS Republican stood up for elections officials and summarized the committee’s work best:
| “We have a contingent that is not really tethered to facts”
_\- Rep. Pat Proctor, House Elections Committee Chair_
---

clean_body: | = Kansas City Star: KS Legislature gives platform to election misinformation Friend, Extremist Republicans in Kansas gave the Big Lie and conspiracy theories a public platform last week - at the expense of taxpayers. The Kansas State Legislature spent thousands of dollars last week on a committee meeting that falsely promoted misinformation and false claims of election fraud. The committee invited so-called witnesses that looked more like conspiracy theorists - including Clint Curtis, who has claimed for decades that he was hired to rig the 2000 election in Florida. How reliable. Missing from the committee’s witness list though? Election administrators. One KS Republican stood up for elections officials and summarized the committee’s work best: | “We have a contingent that is not really tethered to facts” \- Rep. Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, inflation is soaring, and the Biden administration seems to have no answers. It's clear that every Texan I know has been adversely affected by the alarming rise in prices since Joe Biden took office. The cost of living is skyrocketing, and hardworking Texans are feeling the pinch every time they fill up their gas tanks, buy groceries, or pay their monthly bills. WE’RE NOTSUPPOSED TO LIVE LIKE THIS IN THE WEALTHIEST COUNTRY ON EARTH We need leaders who will fight to protect the American economy, and that's why I'm reaching out to you today. | | We need to work together to save our majority and our economy. Stand with me in the fight against inflation, rein in government spending, and unleash the full potential of the American economy. Together, we can make a difference and ensure a brighter future for our families and the great state of Texas. Sincerely, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. CADDO ST. PMB #174 CLEBURNE, TX 76031 Stay connected with our campaign and be part of the movement. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger Williams 10 N. Caddo St, PMB #174, Cleburne, TX 76031

Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? subject: Personally asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
Peter,

We just had one of our biggest fundraising deadlines yet – but we’re not asking for donations this time – we’re asking for something even more important: your endorsement. If we've learned anything over the last 17 years of community organizing, it's this: the most important endorsement anyone could receive is the community’s. Will you add your name here?

https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ugb2kl06AEaqoJjtQp3ZMA2

All of the political gains we've made in recent years are the result of our community’s decades of hard work, grassroots organizing, and connecting with everyday voters. It's when we work as a community – as a family – that we win big.

And that's exactly what it's going to take to win this race. Think of it like a great big quinceañera: it will take our whole family pitching in, working together, and doing what we can – all the while we’re going to have fun doing it. And the party we throw will be to celebrate with a WIN on Election Day. But we can only do that with you on our team.
Today, I'm personally asking you to join our campaign as a Community Endorser. Will you add your name to endorse our campaign?

https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ugb2kl06AEaqoJjtQp3ZMA2

We know we've got a long campaign ahead of us, and to succeed, we’re going to need to continue to build a movement. And for that, we need your help.

We're counting on grassroots support from people like you to power our campaign. Become a community endorser today >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ugb2kl06AEaqoJjtQp3ZMA2

A ganar,
Raquel Terán

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_100423_endorser]

Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.

She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.

Now, she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_100423_endorser

Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311

clean_body: Peter, We just had one of our biggest fundraising deadlines yet – but we’re not asking for donations this time – we’re asking for something even more important: your endorsement. If we've learned anything over the last 17 years of community organizing, it's this: the most important endorsement anyone could receive is the community’s. Will you add your name here? All of the political gains we've made in recent years are the result of our community’s decades of hard work, grassroots organizing, and connecting with everyday voters. It's when we work as a community – as a family – that we win big. And that's exactly what it's going to take to win this race. Think of it like a great big quinceañera: it will take our whole family pitching in, working together, and doing what we can – all the while we’re going to have fun doing it. And the party we throw will be to celebrate with a WIN on Election Day. But we can only do that with you on our team. Today, I'm personally asking you to join our campaign as a Community Endorser. Will you add your name to endorse our campaign? We know we've got a long campaign ahead of us, and to succeed, we’re going to need to continue to build a movement. And for that, we need your help. We're counting on grassroots support from people like you to power our campaign. Become a community endorser today >> A ganar, Raquel Terán DONATE [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now, she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! subject: ICYMI: John Teichert's Vision for Maryland's Senate on FOX 45
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ec736184859a/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6668874?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**For Immediate Release** October 4, 2023Contact: info@teichertformaryland.com
**ICYMI: John Teichert's Vision for Maryland's Senate on FOX 45**
Air Force Brigadier General John Teichert (Ret), a seasoned fighter pilot and test pilot, discussed his candidacy for U.S. Senate in Maryland. Teichert's remarkable journey, from taking his oath of office alongside his future wife at the age of 17, to his three decades of dedicated service in the military, underlines his unwavering commitment to our Constitution and his deep love for the nation and the state of Maryland. As the conversation unfolded, Teichert addressed critical issues that matter to Marylanders: emphasizing his collaborative and mission-driven approach to leadership.Teichert shared his profound connection to his oath and his lifelong dedication to support and defend the Constitution. He remarked, "I love my country. I love this state. And I'm worried that we're headed in the wrong direction."
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e636d32959&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
Teichert's focus on issues critical to Marylanders was evident as he passionately discussed the need for a renewed emphasis on education that empowers young people while putting parents back in charge. He showed the importance of economic stability, public safety, and national security in today's challenging times.
**"We don't need politics. We don't need politicians. We need leaders again, to revive the spirit of America."**
Describing his approach as a "collaborative conservative," Teichert highlighted his ability to work across the aisle to achieve common goals. "I've got conservative values and principles, but my entire career in the United States Air Force and as a general, I was focused on getting the mission done," he explained.
Teichert's extensive engagement in the community, including running a small business aimed at developing the leaders our nation needs, reflects his multifaceted approach to leadership. He expressed his belief that these experiences are pivotal to "wrestling our nation and our state back to where we belong."
John Teichert's commitment to service, his deep-rooted love for Maryland, and his vision for a better future for all its residents make him a candidate worth watching. As he embarks on this journey to the United States Senate, his message of collaborative conservatism and unwavering dedication to American values stands out in today's political landscape.
###
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=9abd1c9254&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

Peter, we just got the news.
We've always said this would be a competitive and tough race. Now, a new poll is showing our race within single digits after David McCormick jumped in.
**[McCormick is closing in fast, and we need grassroots support right away to fight back. Please, Peter, rush a contribution to Bob Casey right now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231004-1?refcode=em20231004-1&refcode2=831_552475_FizUZ5&akid=831%2E552475%2EFizUZ5)**

Mitch McConnell's hand-picked candidate David McCormick is closing the gap. Once he starts spending his millions (and the money he's raising from dark money GOP billionaires) to blanket Pennsylvania's airwaves, we could be in real trouble.
Senate control is on the line, and the only way we'll be able to compete is with your help. **[Now is the time-- please rush a contribution so we can turn this around and stay in the lead of PA's Senate race. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231004-1?refcode=em20231004-1&refcode2=831_552475_FizUZ5&akid=831%2E552475%2EFizUZ5)**

Together,
Team Casey

Laura Gillen

body:
I’ve dedicated the rest of my life to this crucial movement, and I couldn’t be happier to count you as an ally in this work.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70966454/430835316/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YzRmYmRhLTA4NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ig1UVkRO_cUddzlJ_BXKFjl9xqRTrDk2OuFbcvlihv8=)

| [JOIN OUR MOVEMENT ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70966456/430835318/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231004-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YzRmYmRhLTA4NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ig1UVkRO_cUddzlJ_BXKFjl9xqRTrDk2OuFbcvlihv8=)
---
Jane Fonda here. Today, The Nation reported on an important conversation I had during Climate Week about my work with the PAC. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it and to share some thoughts with you.

I’ve dedicated the rest of my life to this crucial movement, and I couldn’t be happier to count you as an ally in this work. As we rally our people-power to take to the streets and vote out fossil fuel allies, I find myself becoming more hopeful with each passing week. And thanks to your ongoing support of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, _**I’m having a ball electing climate champions up and down the ballot across the country.**_

For far too long, the fossil fuel industry has maintained a stranglehold on our political system, and during the 2020 election, they poured in more than $139 million to keep their political allies in offices, setting back key climate progress, and hampering key legislation on climate at every level of government.

**That’s why the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to electing leaders who are not beholden to the influence of Big Oil and other corporate polluters.** It won’t happen overnight, but I know that together, we can grow to be a $100 million PAC and continue to elect federal and state legislators, city councilors, county commissioners, mayors, and more who are willing to fight for a livable future for all of us.

[_**Will you contribute $10 today to join our movement to keep up our strong momentum and elect even more climate champions?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70966457/430835319/931971737?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231004-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5YzRmYmRhLTA4NjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ig1UVkRO_cUddzlJ_BXKFjl9xqRTrDk2OuFbcvlihv8=)

clean_body: I’ve dedicated the rest of my life to this crucial movement, and I couldn’t be happier to count you as an ally in this work. | = | = | = Jane Fonda here. Today, The Nation reported on an important conversation I had during Climate Week about my work with the PAC. I wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it and to share some thoughts with you. I’ve dedicated the rest of my life to this crucial movement, and I couldn’t be happier to count you as an ally in this work. As we rally our people-power to take to the streets and vote out fossil fuel allies, I find myself becoming more hopeful with each passing week. And thanks to your ongoing support of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, I’m having a ball electing climate champions up and down the ballot across the country. For far too long, the fossil fuel industry has maintained a stranglehold on our political system, and during the 2020 election, they poured in more than $139 million to keep their political allies in offices, setting back key climate progress, and hampering key legislation on climate at every level of government. That’s why the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to electing leaders who are not beholden to the influence of Big Oil and other corporate polluters. It won’t happen overnight, but I know that together, we can grow to be a $100 million PAC and continue to elect federal and state legislators, city councilors, county commissioners, mayors, and more who are willing to fight for a livable future for all of us. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Together, they ousted Kevin McCarthy and threw the People’s House into chaos. Nancy Mace’s willingness to sow dysfunction in our government is another reminder that we can’t afford another two years of her in Congress. [_**Will you rush a contribution of $10 to support my campaign and defeat her in 2024?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70966511/430835489/-1846418929?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.10.04_B1_RapidResponse_Actives_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzBhNTM2MGMtMDk2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dBlU3bAJ0PSh7RqrpESuPRS8Dxa3OyqK7dfhgkWa-M0=) [CHIP IN >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70966512/430835490/983305604?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.10.04_B1_RapidResponse_Actives_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzBhNTM2MGMtMDk2My1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dBlU3bAJ0PSh7RqrpESuPRS8Dxa3OyqK7dfhgkWa-M0=) We all want leaders who will act to tackle our country’s greatest challenges, like climate change, gun violence, and protecting democracy. But instead of tackling our existing crises, Nancy Mace is creating new ones. House Republicans have made it clear that they cannot govern, Peter. Their interparty fighting – led by Mace, Gaetz, and their crew – has brought bipartisan legislation to a screeching halt. Enough is enough. We need leadership and action, not showboating and partisan games. Unfortunately, my opponent has shown us that the only way we’ll accomplish this is at the polls. South Carolinians are counting on Nancy Mace to lead, and she’s proven she can’t. clean_body: South Carolinians are counting on Nancy Mace to lead, and she’s proven she can’t. | = Peter – Nancy Mace just joined forces with Matt Gaetz and his crew. Together, they ousted Kevin McCarthy and threw the People’s House into chaos. Nancy Mace’s willingness to sow dysfunction in our government is another reminder that we can’t afford another two years of her in Congress. = = We all want leaders who will act to tackle our country’s greatest challenges, like climate change, gun violence, and protecting democracy. But instead of tackling our existing crises, Nancy Mace is creating new ones. House Republicans have made it clear that they cannot govern, Peter. Their interparty fighting – led by Mace, Gaetz, and their crew – has brought bipartisan legislation to a screeching halt. Enough is enough. We need leadership and action, not showboating and partisan games. Unfortunately, my opponent has shown us that the only way we’ll accomplish this is at the polls. South Carolinians are counting on Nancy Mace to lead, and she’s proven she can’t. I’m running because I’m ready to fight with every bone in my body for our state and the people in it. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Resolute in our mission, Michael B. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We need to have their backs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138603?t=1001&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M ]did you
see this op-ed from our Executive Director, Alexandra Rojas, in The Nation
today?

Over the last 6 years, Justice Democrats has been leading the fight of
recruiting and electing progressive primary challengers to oust
out-of-touch, entrenched incumbents who only serve the establishment.

But our movement is under threat. The same right-wing forces we overcame
to elect a new group of working-class lawmakers of color are back,
doubling down, [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138604?t=1002&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M ]pouring millions of dollars into electing corporate
Democrats that they can once again depend on to do the bidding of the
billionaire class.

We cannot underestimate groups like AIPAC and their millions of dollars as
they recruit challengers to our incumbents including Jamaal Bowman, Summer
Lee, and Ilhan Omar.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138605?refcode=em20231004-31172&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M ]Will you contribute $3 right now to help ensure we have
the resources to fight against AIPAC and other establishment, right-wing
groups who hate our progressive candidates?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/138605?refcode=em20231004-31172&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M ]Contribute $3

We’re going to do everything we can to protect our progressive fighters
from the right-wing groups who will spend heavily against us this cycle,
but we need you with us. The alternative is allowing a small group of
Republican donors to dictate our party’s membership and agenda in
Congress.

Together we will continue to transform the Democratic Party from the
inside out.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231004-31172-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31172_1203867_REss2M&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31172%2E1203867%2EREss2M

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
