name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: For the first time in U.S. history...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
For the first time in United States history, the Speaker of the House has been removed.
So how did this happen, and what does it mean?
– **Remember when McCarthy had to call 15 votes to win the Speakership?** He finally won because he made big concessions to the extreme right in his caucus — including a change to a key House rule, so that **only one person was required to introduce a ‘motion to vacate the Speaker’** , aka a vote on whether the Speaker should remain in his job. Previously, the rule required a majority of one party for the motion to come to the House floor for a full vote.
– This became a problem last weekend. The House avoided a government shutdown by passing a short-term spending bill that kept the government funded at current levels for another 45 days. GOP extremists were opposed to this bill, and were furious that McCarthy agreed to put it up for a vote. Accordingly, **Matt Gaetz filed a motion to oust McCarthy on Tuesday.**
– McCarthy might have been able to save himself. After Gaetz introduced the motion, McCarthy was entitled to a 48-hour waiting period before the removal vote. But, for some reason, McCarthy decided to waive that privilege and call the removal vote for the same day.
– **The House is now adjourned, so there won’t be a new Speaker for at least another 7 days.** If the GOP can’t elect a Speaker, the House will be stuck in the same procedural loop as the beginning of term when McCarthy couldn’t secure enough votes to become Speaker.
– **All legislation grinds to a halt until a Speaker is elected** , including the work that the House was supposed to do to resolve the government shutdown looming in 45 days.
**Alexandria voted to remove McCarthy because she refused to strengthen someone who voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election; who held the entire U.S. economy hostage during the debt ceiling negotiations; and who launched a baseless impeachment inquiry without a floor vote.**
Kevin McCarthy enabled and upheld some of the most extreme, racist, violent, law-breaking people in his party — who ultimately took him down — while going back on every deal he made with Democrats.
Alexandria and the Democratic Caucus knew that a vote for McCarthy would have empowered a dangerous dynamic in the Republican Party that represents a very real threat to our democracy. Period.
We will continue to update you on how the American people are being impacted by the chaos of GOP leadership. **Republican extremism has once again impeded the work of our government.**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231004.6IWQ8R&refcode=em20231004-5095-P_FND_RES_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231004?refcode=em20231004-5095-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=20&refcode2=5095_2526796_3ABdID&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231004-5095-P_FND_RES_MIS&t=21&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=22&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=23&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=24&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5095%2E2526796%2E3ABdID)

body:
It’s sad to see what’s happened to the city I grew up in...
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kcGumzAQRb9m2IHM2BhYsGjqZhO9blt1Exl7SAZhQ8G86P19RZR048W5V9Y9GhuWiYevDuoTIN7Zb4AI8hsgXtTp9099-XUx-Y-2_siNrtTjSPE7IKavhf5XX78UFCxPB61N5jt0DTqXUVfqVitdCi2yeyeH1lrdVsIhDr5XVDWqGqpeV9R7LTDjDgXKUgh1vLIpfNPIwVWCKonStQhKPDgWfo528mNa97AUbg7Z1N1TWrbnpDPgeSO3r1Q8OK7kj8bB7CflNtDKzubjzDHlwx79annjeMvdHAKnRAR4jm4SpexxQEGlsK2QNcjznsI1kOc9gDQvX33Abd5XRyCN46t9MWfDYvkWQZq30zuZY6KYQJpSKFUC6muc2IM0y58Rxw-Nf90TPk8iTdV-nhL6fszWzi8PnibedA1K3I4Jh9y_AAAA__-61ox8)
---
Friend,
I just finished the third day of my sham trial in New York.
For the past three days, I sat in a courtroom in the city I grew up in, the city I raised my family in, the city I built a tremendous organization in, the city I loved – and I listened to the Democrats fervently try to destroy everything my family and I have built.
The Left wants to take down “Trump Tower” – a world-famous New York landmark, they want to dissolve the Trump Organization, and their ultimate goal is to financially ruin me _and_ my family.
It was also here in New York that I was wrongfully arrested by a Soros-backed District Attorney earlier this year. It was the first time I was ever arrested in my entire life.
**Think about it – I went my entire life without ever being arrested, and then all of the sudden, I ran for president and I got arrested _4 times in 1 year_ – despite committing no crime at all.**
But the truth is: this is not the same city I knew and loved. Frankly, this is not even the same _country_ we once knew.
Radical Left thugs have let crime, vandalism, filth, left-wing extremism, and illegal immigration pollute what was once the greatest city in the world.
And that’s what they want to do to all of America.
Friend, I’m not running for President for myself. I’m running because I truly believe our country is dying. When I go back to a place like New York and see what’s happened, my resolve grows even stronger to save America.
2024 is our final chance to fix the greatest country in history – and I have absolute faith that with your support, we can turn it around, and turn it around FAST!
After writing a note on the utter destruction of our country, I have to say that if you are doing poorly right now, please don’t even think about donating. I simply wanted to share my thoughts with my top supporters like you at the conclusion of my second day on trial.
**[Please make a contribution to win the 2024 election in what truly is our _final chance_ to SAVE AMERICA.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUGPmzAQhX_NcAPZY2PgwKFZN6oatWpP7S1y7CGZCBsEZqP99xVRthcfvvdkvU_j4jzy8NFDcwDEG4cVEEF9AcSTPvz9aU5_Trb82jU_Smtq_dhTfAPE_DHT_-rrl4qi43GnjS1Cj75F7wvqpemMNlIYUdz6TjftpZMyUO3MYMJghjqoRtdyEKKVouAeBSophN5f1VahbdXga0G1QuU7BC0enKowJTeGe162OFd-isXY33Ke1-ekI-BxJb8tVD04LRT2xs7cO5Uu0sLelfeJUy6HLYXF8crpWvopRs6ZCPCY_CikuuCAgqRwnVANqOOW4zlS4C2Csi9fs8N12hZPoKzns3sx7-Ls-JpA2U-nz2RKmVIGZaXQWgKacxo5gLLt729v66_v1F6e8HkSZevu_ZAxXO7F0of5wePIq2lAi-s-YZf7FwAA__8BO4u6)**

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: EVENT: Join OLCV for our Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Jeff Merkley
body:
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70967401/430838939/1945785228?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiZWU1YWJlLTBiNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rqBMIMd8FzlRWI_G-gnqV85z9jc9ZowNDuxOa-oU9oY=&emci=7dc45d1a-ea62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=dbee5abe-0b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)Dear Peter, Climate chaos is hitting our planet hard, and the consequences can be seen everywhere. Places across the country reached record-breaking high temperatures–some even breaking multiple records just this summer alone–and Oregon was no exception. These extreme temperatures are threatening not just keystone species like native bees, but also our forests, farms, and fisheries, putting lives and livelihoods at risk. We’re taking bold steps to address the devastating effects of climate impacts at the state level, but it won’t be enough unless the entire country is in this together. That’s why it’s so important to support new opportunities for clean energy, jobs, justice, and nature conservation that are currently moving at the national level. [**Learn more about the ongoing fight for climate action and environmental protections in D.C. at our upcoming virtual town hall with Senator Jeff Merkley.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70967402/430838940/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiZWU1YWJlLTBiNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rqBMIMd8FzlRWI_G-gnqV85z9jc9ZowNDuxOa-oU9oY=&emci=7dc45d1a-ea62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=dbee5abe-0b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **OLCV Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Jeff Merkley**
**Date:** Thursday, October 26, 2023
**Time:** 12:00 - 1:15 PM PT
**Location:** Zoom - **[Register here and submit a question for the senator!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70967403/430838941/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiZWU1YWJlLTBiNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rqBMIMd8FzlRWI_G-gnqV85z9jc9ZowNDuxOa-oU9oY=&emci=7dc45d1a-ea62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=dbee5abe-0b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** **Senator Merkley is a climate and environmental champion.** He strongly supported and worked to pass the 2021 Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and Inflation Reduction Act, which made historic investments to help address the climate crisis and make progress on environmental justice. This year, he introduced the Pollinator Power Act to help reverse the decline in pollinator populations. **On October 26, Senator Merkley will update us on his legislation, talk to us about how the climate investments of the IRA will benefit Oregon, and answer selected audience questions.** [**RSVP today to stay up-to-date about the town hall, and submit your own questions for Senator Merkley.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/70967404/430838942/636880288?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRiZWU1YWJlLTBiNjMtZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rqBMIMd8FzlRWI_G-gnqV85z9jc9ZowNDuxOa-oU9oY=&emci=7dc45d1a-ea62-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=dbee5abe-0b63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Hope to see you there,
Britney VanCitters

clean_body: | | | Peter, Climate chaos is hitting our planet hard, and the consequences can be seen everywhere. Places across the country reached record-breaking high temperatures–some even breaking multiple records just this summer alone–and Oregon was no exception. These extreme temperatures are threatening not just keystone species like native bees, but also our forests, farms, and fisheries, putting lives and livelihoods at risk. We’re taking bold steps to address the devastating effects of climate impacts at the state level, but it won’t be enough unless the entire country is in this together. That’s why it’s so important to support new opportunities for clean energy, jobs, justice, and nature conservation that are currently moving at the national level. OLCV Virtual Town Hall on the Environment with Senator Jeff Merkley Date: Thursday, October 26, 2023 Time: 12:00 - 1:15 PM PT Location: Zoom - Senator Merkley is a climate and environmental champion. He strongly supported and worked to pass the 2021 Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and Inflation Reduction Act, which made historic investments to help address the climate crisis and make progress on environmental justice. This year, he introduced the Pollinator Power Act to help reverse the decline in pollinator populations. On October 26, Senator Merkley will update us on his legislation, talk to us about how the climate investments of the IRA will benefit Oregon, and answer selected audience questions. Hope to see you there, Britney VanCitters Organizing Manager, OLCV | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. _ | ---|---

Kat Cammack, the youngest Republican woman in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack, now in her second term, sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Are you ready for a fight? It's official, my friend: Kat's first challenger has entered the 2024 race. The Democratic primary is next August, so we don't know who we’ll be facing in the general election yet, but what we do know for sure is that whoever it is, they’ll have the full backing of the DCCC and the Democratic Party. Radical leftists have dreamed of flipping this seat and silencing the Liberty Movement for years, and they’re ready to spend whatever it takes to get it done. We can’t let them do that. Listen, Kat doesn’t have billionaire donors, dark money backers, or special interests bankrolling her campaign. Kat has us. We can’t let her down. Thank you, Team Kat | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack, the youngest Republican woman in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack, now in her second term, sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat War Room 5200 NW 43rd St, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- ==

name: George Whitesides
subject: I want your input on what’s happening in Congress.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70967526/430839418/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDZkZTBiZi0wYzYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omE8klPvvplwodFghac2qwbCd1-t5aNi3X565Lw_mAU=)
Republicans in Congress are right back where they started in January, Peter.

Kevin McCarthy has officially been ousted, and we're expecting another prolonged sideshow until a new Speaker is elected.

Today's GOP is clearly incapable of governing, and what's frustrating is that no work can be done until there's a Speaker -- including on finalizing a budget before the mid-November deadline. Failure to act means thousands of CA-27 residents will go without paychecks -- including our active duty military.

**What's even more frustrating? McCarthy's leadership was on shaky ground, and instead of working toward compromise, my opponent Mike Garcia voted to cut federal wildfire prevention funding by over $2.4 billion – while representing a district that contains some of the highest fire risk areas in the country. Votes like this are dangerous and could put constituents’ lives and homes in danger.**

Republicans in Congress have cast our country into chaos, and the blame lies squarely at the feet of guys like Garcia who claim to be problem solvers but engage in partisan nonsense.

[**I want to get your input on what's happening in Washington. What are your thoughts on McCarthy's removal and our path forward? Please take this short survey to let me know.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70967527/430839419/-879455285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDZkZTBiZi0wYzYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omE8klPvvplwodFghac2qwbCd1-t5aNi3X565Lw_mAU=&emci=e88d8db9-0c63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=146de0bf-0c63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=36198509)
| ****[Take The Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70967528/430839420/-879455285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDZkZTBiZi0wYzYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omE8klPvvplwodFghac2qwbCd1-t5aNi3X565Lw_mAU=&emci=e88d8db9-0c63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=146de0bf-0c63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=36198509)****
---

One thing is for sure, this saga makes it clear that we need new leadership -- in the House and in California's 27th District.

I look forward to hearing from you.

George
****[Take The Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70967529/430839421/-879455285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDZkZTBiZi0wYzYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=omE8klPvvplwodFghac2qwbCd1-t5aNi3X565Lw_mAU=&emci=e88d8db9-0c63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=146de0bf-0c63-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=36198509)****

body:
Friends – I wanted to send a quick note giving you an update on what’s been going on in Congress. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70967555/430839561/821192022?refcode=231004-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2ViNDkxNS0wZDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BuiH9ehb0bCafaFLuDOzL2Cqm41fS_Y6B7qs57lFeaU=) Friends – I wanted to send a quick note giving you an update on what’s been going on in Congress. **First:** We narrowly avoided a government shutdown by passing a measure that extends government funding until November 18th. We’re by no means in the clear. We still have to pass a fair budget that continues providing essential services to American families. **Next:** As you’ve probably heard by now, the Office of the Speaker of the House is vacant. Republicans and Democrats worked together to oust Kevin McCarthy from the role, and in the coming days, we’ll be working to restore leadership in the halls of Congress. **Now:** I’ll be keeping up the fight for NC-13 in Congress. But to really get things done, we must flip the House next November. And to flip the House, we must hold on to every single BLUE seat we have, including mine. body:
It’s time to wake up. The American people want more from their elected officials. | Peter,

I’ve never been one to back down from a fight.

I’ve been called every name in the books, but that hasn’t tempered my drive to ensure we have fair and LEGAL elections.

Peter, I am ready to take on another fight– helping conservatives win back a Senate majority.

Under Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats our nation is falling into disrepair. We need to fight back.

Our conservative movement is building like a storm. With your support, we can show the far Left that we will not bend to their will. [**We will NEVER give up.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7681abc77d5949e49e837b0e1a024ef6&_e=gfRQOIYOhVyP9H8OvESMm39r1mIlkJOsSVMAGF2UIGSO7A4peOfex_XWZpsFagsqPafX8Aq2dE13azk29OI4boYOtKqhPJDM9d6lr52bqbeEqI-IPE6Dbj7lr5Cv8dd003EHsJwKtH2EPNDQvm0Fu_apwTlJ65Mxcym_u5lWWg5P3fn9xPwft9o0-S1ZyxtRKDA08fCrl0T65cNN9_dtic-v08CHokBg1lnG0jlv17lw_z5FVzI1mWPVaUgvPyduVnoEhiSiwVr2Jg0URfYXmtlMUF96IwQKwPNmL3e0wR_tr25ZQ8SZkSCNU9gWyVN76w0JotgL4gERxw1Iw8TfberSHc6EKF7I53OlFfuyzBDyj4aQXSzFasNJeUD5wGOav00NCFN2ZuVLu7cfFrI8XevpuLfXwkvHudckjr2qBLgm-1xDZXbdiGvMGAMuqeks)

[**In the next 30 minutes, I am personally asking for your help. Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $24 to help us win back a Senate majority?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7681abc77d5949e49e837b0e1a024ef6&_e=gfRQOIYOhVyP9H8OvESMm39r1mIlkJOsSVMAGF2UIGSO7A4peOfex_XWZpsFagsqPafX8Aq2dE13azk29OI4boYOtKqhPJDM9d6lr52bqbeEqI-IPE6Dbj7lr5Cv8dd003EHsJwKtH2EPNDQvm0Fu_apwTlJ65Mxcym_u5lWWg5P3fn9xPwft9o0-S1ZyxtRKDA08fCrl0T65cNN9_dtic-v08CHokBg1lnG0jlv17lw_z5FVzI1mWPVaUgvPyduVnoEhiSiwVr2Jg0URfYXmuJNndvmspHuFnV6zlyBSfXGYH7Xxvumoz7hCoWIblJIhM-ZIpXIt_q71oqNLANB39rCmoVsAxuq0JKSO8ro3gSEQmWq86j2a7IYfvrRDg341C0q7TIsX48FQa6HazDsdawdE-Omp3oeAcrEOsWHUGdQhubj8qQceCTQhnXX8xy1)

The future of our great nation is in your hands.

Thank you,

Peter, I am ready to take on another fight– helping conservatives win back a Senate majority. Under Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats our nation is falling into disrepair. We need to fight back. Our conservative movement is building like a storm. With your support, we can show the far Left that we will not bend to their will. The future of our great nation is in your hands. And because we won’t let voter suppression attempts go unchecked. **Read more details of the case in our note below.** To this day, True the Vote continues to echo their rejected claims of “illegal voting” in the 2020 and 2021 elections. We’re determined to show that this pro-voter movement is stronger than their attempts to silence us. Let’s continue to protect the fundamental freedom to vote in Georgia and beyond.
Together,
The Fair Fight Team
— Forwarded message —
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/70967766/430840418/-1226380367?ms=bsc_emm_ff_20231004_f_ttv2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmE4NWM4Ni0xMDYzLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_skqX1v2EVT_-Udfmct9NMXJqTl-erRPuHzbZcXYGU=)
**Before the trial begins on October 26, we want to lay out key facts you need to know about Fair Fight’s case against True the Vote.**
* In 2020, TTV **pushed unsubstantiated claims that 67,000 ineligible voters cast their ballots** in the presidential election.
* Leading up to the 2021 U.S. Senate runoff election, TTV announced plans to **challenge the eligibility of over 364,000 registered Georgia voters** — a tried-and-true voter suppression tactic.
* Ultimately, TTV worked with its supporters to **submit challenges against a total of 250,783 voters across 65 counties.**
* Data analysis shows TTV was more likely to challenge individuals in counties with **higher proportions of Black and brown voters.**
* For that runoff, they also announced the recruitment of “citizen watchdogs” to **surveil absentee ballot dropboxes and incentivized their supporters with a fund of over $1 million** as “compensation” for reporting allegations of so-called “illegal voting.”
* While the overwhelming majority of TTV’s challenges were dismissed, they still **placed a burden on election workers** and local election administration while **intimidating voters** and discouraging them from participating in future elections.
* TTV’s fundraising continues to echo their claims that people voted illegally, despite a **persistent refusal to provide evidence** of supposed unlawful voting.

Mass challenges like those orchestrated by True the Vote weaken our democracy and silence eligible voters. And voter intimidation isn’t just wrong — it’s illegal. So we filed a lawsuit against True the Vote in December 2020, with our trial date set for later this month (October 26). We now have a long-awaited opportunity to seek justice for voters and deter other anti-voter groups from undermining free and fair elections.
Like the many federal voting rights cases that have come before, the stakes of our case are high, but this is a battle worth fighting **— because voter intimidation and baseless conspiracy theories have no place in our democracy.**
That’s why we continue to fight back both inside and outside the courtroom to help mitigate the dangerous effects of mass challenges.
We’re so grateful for your support along the way.
Thank you,
The Fair Fight Team
